Because their own last words were lost in the raging wind and rain of a terrible storm, nothing disturbs a wispy wayfarer more than mortal prayers. From afar a wayfarer is hauntingly silent, though upon approaching the thing one can hear a soft howl, as of distant winds.

A wispy wayfarer resembles a humanoid skull missing its lower jaw and with coins over its eye sockets. The skull hovers above the animated tatters of an old canvas sailcloth draped over a disembodied ship mast. The sail flaps in a slow-motion fury, even when there is no wind present, as though constantly remembering the storm that sent it to its doom.

Easy Loot

A wispy wayfarer's raging soul can be quieted only once all the treasure aboard its ship is removed—a challenge most adventuring parties wholeheartedly welcome. However, if even one copper piece remains aboard its ship, the wayfarer will continue to manifest, stubborn to the end.

Sitebound Spirit

When a mass tragedy like a shipwreck or theatre fire claims the lives of sailors, performers, or other inhabitants whose identities were inextricably tied to the vessel or building in which they perished, the end result is often a malevolent spirit such as a wispy wayfarer. These ghostly beings cling to the Material Plane with a vengeance, assuming billowy shapes that reflect the trappings of their sacred place of work.

Monster Part Subsystem

Wispy Wayfarer Creature 2

Monster Parts 5/12/22 gp

Eligible Refinements perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Deception, Lore [Sailing], Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, dexterity, energy resistant (acid, cold, electricity, fire, negative, sonic), evil, negative, sensory (darkvision), wild, winged

Reaver Beaver.name: 掠夺海狸 Reaver Beaver

Tail Sweep.name: 尾部横扫 Tail Sweep
Tail Sweep.description:
触发 一个位于河狸触及范围内的生物使用了站立动作；

效果 掠夺河狸对触发的生物进行一次尾巴打击。若该攻击为大成功，则该动作被扰乱。

Trigger A creature within the beaver's reach uses the Stand action;

Effect The reaver beaver makes a tail Strike against the triggering creature. If the attack is a critical hit, the action is disrupted.

Concussive Slap.name: 震荡掌掴 Concussive Slap
Concussive Slap.description:
如果劫掠海狸的尾巴打击命中一个@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}的生物，该生物必须进行一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:22|name:Concussive Slap DC|showDC:gm]{Fortitude}豁免，因为它被猛力砸向地面。

大成功或大失败成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到[[/r 1d6[bludgeoning]]]伤害。

失败 该生物受到[[/r 2d6[bludgeoning]]]伤害，并在1轮内获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}。

大成功或大失败失败 同失败，但该生物获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}，持续[[/r 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}。

If the reaver beaver's tail Strike hits a @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} creature, that creature must make a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:22|name:Concussive Slap DC|showDC:gm]{Fortitude} save as it is slammed into the ground.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes [[/r 1d6[bludgeoning]]] damage.

Failure The creature takes [[/r 2d6[bludgeoning]]] damage and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 round.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for [[/r 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

灵敏嗅觉 (模糊感官) 60 尺.name: 灵敏嗅觉 (模糊感官) 60 尺

Lumberjack Hatred.name: 伐木工仇恨 Lumberjack Hatred
Lumberjack Hatred.description:
当掠夺海狸对正在挥舞斧头的目标进行近战打击时，它在攻击掷骰中获得+1状态加值，并且其近战打击额外造成2点伤害。

When the reaver beaver makes a melee Strike against a target that is wielding an axe, it gains a +1 status bonus to attack rolls and deals 2 additional on melee Strikes.

Reaver Beaver.publicNotes:
从远处看，劫掠海狸与它那更无害的同名动物几乎没什么区别，除了它的体型要大得多。再靠近些观察，差异就会变得明显而骇人。充满仇恨的发光红眼在一张咆哮的、覆着酸液的巨口上方眯起，那张嘴被两枚匕首大小的门齿所主宰。一条粗厚、皮革般的尾巴从它粗壮的躯体后方伸出，尾巴上覆盖着锯齿状的尖刺；其身长可达8英尺，体重可超过300磅。

主流观点认为，邪恶德鲁伊创造了劫掠海狸，作为一种用来释放到定居者与破坏自然之人身上的武器；但无人能确切断言这些怪物的起源。可以确定的是，劫掠海狸拥有与其动物性祖先完全不相称的恶毒智力，并被驱使去恐吓任何侵入其领地的人。猎人、农夫与矿工都经常成为它们掠食的目标。劫掠海狸似乎对伐木工怀有特定的仇恨；附近存在劫掠海狸群落的最初迹象，往往是被摧毁的伐木营地或锯木厂的残骸。能述说袭击经过的幸存者十分罕见，但这些怪物把受害者的腿啃咬下来并将撕碎的肢体弃置在地的可怖习性，几乎不容对真凶产生任何怀疑。

劫掠海狸同普通海狸一样勤勉，但作为其自然近亲的扭曲回声，它们主要的筑造材料并非木头，而是受害者的尸体。位于聚居地上游、骇人的“尸坝”既能阻塞水流，也会以疾病污染水源。劫掠海狸的群落也以同样方式建成，常以其他动物的尸体补充类人生物尸体，堆出令人作呕的腐肉丘。这些阴森巢穴通常建在湖岸附近，并向水面之下延伸，其入口只有潜入恶臭的水下才能抵达。

劫掠海狸战术

在战斗中，劫掠海狸会先喷吐成片的酸性唾液，随后笨拙地一拥而上。它们常以令人不安的默契协同作战：一只攻击目标的腿将其绊倒在地，另一只则用强而有力的尾巴将如今倒地的受害者砸成肉泥。

怪物部位子系统

劫掠海狸 生物 5

怪物部位 18/45/80 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（轻型、中型）、察觉 物品、技能 物品（运动、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 强酸、灾祸、体质、能量抗性（正能量）、邪恶、感官（嗅觉）、力量、荒野

When seen from a distance, there is little to distinguish the reaver beaver from its more innocuous namesake, save its much larger size. Upon closer examination, the differences become obvious and terrifying. Glowing red eyes filled with hate squint over a snarling, acid-coated maw dominated by two incisors the size of daggers. A thick, leathery tail covered in jagged barbs extends from the back of a stocky frame which is up to 8 feet long and can weigh over 300 pounds.

Prevailing wisdom suggests that evil druids created reaver beavers as a weapon to unleash upon settlers and despoilers of nature, but no one can claim to know the monsters' origins for certain. What is known for sure is that reaver beavers possess a malicious intellect entirely out of line with their animalistic forebears and that they are driven to terrorize anyone who encroaches upon their domain. Hunters, farmers, and miners are all often targets of their predations. Reaver beavers seem to harbor a specific hatred for lumberjacks; often the first signs of a nearby colony of reaver beavers are the remains of a destroyed lumber camp or sawmill. Survivors who can speak of the assault are rare, but the monsters' grisly tendency to gnaw off their victims' legs and leave the shredded appendages behind leave little doubt as to the culprits.

Reaver beavers are equally as industrious as normal beavers, but, in a perverse echo of their natural kin, they favor not wood as their primary building material but rather the bodies of their victims. Horrific "corpse dams" upriver from settlements can obstruct the flow of water as well as befoul it with disease. Reaver beavers' colonies are constructed in the same way, often supplementing humanoid corpses with those of other animals to create obscene mounds of rotting flesh. These gruesome dens are usually built near the shore of a lake and extend underneath the surface, with the entrance accessible only by diving beneath the fetid water.

Reaver Beaver Tactics

In combat, reaver beavers unleash volleys of acidic spittle before swarming forward in an ungainly rush. They often work in tandem with disturbing coordination, one attacking a target's legs to topple them to the ground, the other using its powerful tail to pulverize the now-prone victim.

Monster Part Subsystem

Reaver Beaver Creature 5

Monster Parts 18/45/80 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing, slashing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, bane, constitution, energy resistant (positive), evil, sensory (scent), strength, wild

Swarm Assassin.name: 虫群刺客 Swarm Assassin

高等黑暗视觉 Greater Darkvision.name: 高等黑暗视觉 Greater Darkvision

Reactive Sting.name: 反应蜇刺 Reactive Sting
Reactive Sting.description:
触发 一个相邻生物以一次打击命中虫群刺客；

效果 一群虫子从虫群刺客被击中的部位爆发出来，跃向攻击者。触发生物必须在一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:17|name:Reactive Sting DC|showDC:gm]{Reflex} 豁免中成功，否则将感染暗影蝗虫毒素。

Trigger An adjacent creature hits the swarm assassin with a Strike;

Effect A swarm erupts from the impacted part of the swarm assassin and leaps out at the attacker. The triggering creature must succeed at a @Check[type:reflex|dc:17|name:Reactive Sting DC|showDC:gm]{Reflex} save or be afflicted with shadow locust poison.

Discorporate.name: 离体 Discorporate
Discorporate.description:
虫群刺客溶解其类人形态，变为无定形的蝗虫虫群。其装备落在其当前空间的地面上。在其离散形态中，虫群刺客可以挤过任何宽度如同一只蝗虫的空间。其数据变为@Compendium[pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.ZPAM4OavHmdgmGnw]{蜈蚣虫群}的数据，但它保留其智力，并且施加暗影蝗虫毒素而非蜈蚣虫群毒液。

在它通过花费一个动作（该动作具有移动（特征））将自身重新聚合之前，它不能使用其任何其他能力。

The swarm assassin dissolves its humanoid shape, becoming a shapeless swarm of locusts. Its equipment falls to the ground in its current space. In its discorporated form, the swarm assassin can squeeze through any space as wide as a locust. Its statistics change to those of a @Compendium[pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.ZPAM4OavHmdgmGnw]{Centipede Swarm}, but it retains its Intelligence and inflicts shadow locust poison instead of centipede swarm venom.

It cannot use any of its other abilities until it reincorporates itself by spending an action (this action has the move trait).

Poison Weapon.name: 毒素武器 Poison Weapon
Poison Weapon.description:
虫群刺客将其暗影蝗虫毒素分泌到其武器上。

The swarm assassin secretes its shadow locust poison onto its weapon.

Shadow Locust Poison.name: 暗影蝗虫毒素 Shadow Locust Poison
Shadow Locust Poison.description:
豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17|name:Shadow Locust 毒素 DC|traits:poison|showDC:gm]{Fortitude};

最大持续时间 6 轮;

阶段 1 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] 伤害 (1 轮);

阶段 2 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] 伤害 且 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{枯竭 1} (1 轮);

阶段 3 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] 伤害、枯竭 1，且 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} (1 轮)

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17|name:Shadow Locust Poison DC|traits:poison|showDC:gm]{Fortitude};

Maximum Duration 6 rounds;

Stage 1 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] damage (1 round);

Stage 2 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] damage and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (1 round);

Stage 3 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] damage, drained 1, and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} (1 round)

Swarm Assassin.publicNotes:
通过一种强大的阴影召唤仪式所创造，虫群刺客被召至物质位面时，随身带着一把不祥的黑色短剑与翻涌的暗色长袍，长袍遮蔽了它的特征。任何不幸瞥见长袍下那张面容的人，都会看到本应是血肉之处却是一团蠕动的昆虫群。这些昆虫是原产于影位面的有毒黑蝗，在强大的邪恶魔法作用下被束缚成类人形态。

一旦被召唤，虫群刺客便等待召唤者的命令，并尽其能力执行职责。虫群刺客会留在物质位面，直到命令完成或一个月相周期结束——以先到者为准。回到影位面后，虫群刺客会解体为一团嗡鸣的虫群，四散爬向该位面的黑暗角落。

邪恶的法师偶尔会召唤虫群刺客作为保镖，但更多时候，是卑劣的牧师召来这些恶魔般的仆从来对付异端或其教团的敌人。虫群刺客擅长追踪其目标，通常会在夜色掩蔽下行动。它们会避开文明地区，但其基础的智力等级使其在必要时能与毫无戒心的人互动。路边旅店的老板会低声谈起那种令人不安的嗡鸣声——它来自偶尔投宿的披斗篷客人；这些客人会用影位面特有的、印有巨龙徽记的硬币来购买情报与传闻。

虫群刺客通常会在其目标独自一人或远离最近定居点时发动攻击。它会从黑暗角落或灌木丛中发起袭击，以毒素削弱敌人后再滑回阴影之中，散开成一团虫群，随后在战场的另一处重新聚合，再次发动攻击。

幽魂般的敌人

对虫群刺客发动的攻击似乎会无效地穿过该生物，令许多惊慌的冒险者以为自己在与幽灵（特征）或幽魂作战。虫群刺客也很乐意延续这种传闻，以掩盖其真正的本质与弱点。

怪物部位子系统

虫群刺客 生物 3

怪物部位 7/18/30 gp

符合条件的精炼 护甲（轻型），察觉 物品，技能 物品（杂技、运动、潜行）

符合条件的灌注属性 敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），邪恶，强化，守序，毒素，感官（高等黑暗视觉），狂野，感知

Created by means of a powerful shadowy summoning ritual, a swarm assassin arrives on the Material Plane replete with an ominous black shortsword and billowing dark robes that obscure its features. Anyone unfortunate enough to catch a glimpse of the visage beneath the robes sees a swarming mass of insects where flesh should be. These insects are poisonous black locusts native to the Shadow Plane, bound together in humanoid shape with powerful unholy magic.

Once summoned, a swarm assassin awaits orders from its summoner and carries out its duties to the best of its ability. Swarm assassins remain on the Material Plane until their orders are completed or for one moon cycle, whichever comes first. Once back on the Shadow Plane, a swarm assassin discorporates into a humming mass of bugs that skitter to the plane's dark corners.

Evil wizards occasionally summon swarm assassins to serve as their bodyguards, but more often, vile clerics summon these fiendish servants to deal with heretics or enemies of their order. Swarm assassins excel at tracking down their targets and typically do so under cover of night. They avoid civilized areas, though their basic level of intellect allows them to interact with unsuspecting individuals when necessary. Roadside innkeepers whisper of the disturbing hum that emanates from such occasional cloaked guests, who pay for information and rumors with the distinct dragon-stamped coinage of the Shadow Plane.

A swarm assassin typically attacks its targets when they are alone or far from the nearest settlement. It launches its assault from dark corners or bushes, weakening foes with poison before slipping back into the shadows, spreading out as a bug swarm, then reincorporating at a different spot on the battlefield and attacking once more.

Spectral Enemies

Attacks made against swarm assassins seem to pass through the creature ineffectively, leading many panicked adventurers to believe they are fighting a ghost or specter. Swarm assassins are all too happy to perpetuate such myths in order to mask their true nature and vulnerabilities.

Monster Part Subsystem

Swarm Assassin Creature 3

Monster Parts 7/18/30 gp

Eligible Refinements armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties dexterity, energy resistant (positive), evil, fortification, lawful, poison, sensory (greater darkvision), wild, wisdom

Sklaggan.name: 斯克拉甘 Sklaggan

对抗心灵效果全豁免+1状态加值.name: 对抗心灵效果全豁免+1状态加值

Snag Weapon.name: 夺取武器 Snag Weapon
Snag Weapon.description:
触发 一个生物尝试用近战武器攻击斯克拉甘，并掷骰大成功或大失败为大失败；

效果 斯克拉甘用其生体护甲包裹住攻击者的武器。斯克拉甘尝试对触发生物进行 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm}，以其盗窃调整值代替运动。

Trigger A creature attempts to attack the sklaggan with a melee weapon and rolls a critical miss;

Effect The sklaggan encloses its biological armor around the attacker's weapon. The sklaggan attempts to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm} the triggering creature, using its Thievery modifier in place of Athletics.

Toxic Shadows.name: 剧毒阴影 Toxic Shadows
Toxic Shadows.description:
斯克拉甘会在其护甲中释放阴影般的有机化合物，使其接近的生物衰弱。斯克拉甘以其速度进行一次移动。任何位于斯克拉甘移动路径5尺内的生物受到[[/r 4d6[mental]]]伤害，并必须尝试一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:22|name:Toxic Shadows DC|traits:damaging-effect,mental,shadow|showDC:gm]{强韧}豁免。

斯克拉甘在[[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用毒性阴影。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，且为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心1}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，且为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心2}。

The sklaggan releases shadowy organic compounds in its armor to debilitate creatures it approaches. The sklaggan Strides up to its Speed. Any creature within 5 feet of the Sklaggan's path takes [[/r 4d6[mental]]] damage and must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:22|name:Toxic Shadows DC|traits:damaging-effect,mental,shadow|showDC:gm]{Fortitude} save.

The sklaggan can't use Toxic Shadows again for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

念动射弹 Telekinetic Projectile.name: 念动射弹 Telekinetic Projectile
念动射弹 Telekinetic Projectile.description:
你向目标射出区域中一个未固定的，无主的，1负载1以下的物体。对目标尝试一次法术攻击骰。如果你命中，你造成2d6的钝击，穿刺，或者挥砍伤害（对应于你所扔出的物体）。射出物体的特殊特征或者魔法特性不会影响该攻击或者伤害。

大成功 你造成双倍伤害。

成功 你造成完整伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d6。

护盾术 Shield.name: 护盾术 Shield
护盾术 Shield.description:
你举起一面力场构成的魔法护盾。这视同你使用了举起盾牌动作，赋予你在AC上的+1环境加值，直到你的下个回合开始，但这里不需要手来使用。

当该法术生效时，你可以使用你的魔法护盾来进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡 Shield Block}反应动作。该盾牌具有硬度5。你可以使用该法术的反应动作来减少任何来自法术或者魔法效果的伤害，即使这不造成物理伤害。在你使用盾牌格挡后，该法术结束，并且你无法在10分钟内再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾术}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾术免疫}

升阶（+2） 该盾牌的硬度增加5。

晕眩术 Daze.name: 晕眩术 Daze
晕眩术 Daze.description:
你侵入目标的精神，利用精神冲击令目标晕眩。该冲击造成1d6心灵伤害，具有基础意志豁免。如果目标在豁免中大失败，它获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 该伤害增加1d6。

讯息传递 Mindlink.name: 讯息传递 Mindlink
讯息传递 Mindlink.description: 你将你和目标的精神链接在一起，并且将通常需要10分钟来交流的信息在一瞬间通过精神传递给对方。

关照术 Status.name: 关照术 Status
关照术 Status.description:
只要你和目标处于相同的位面，并且均活着，你就会一直知晓其当前状态。你知晓目标和你相对的方向，与你的距离，以及任何正影响其的状态。

升阶（4环级） 该法术的射程增加到30尺，并且你能以至多10个生物为目标。

安定心神 Calm Emotions.name: 安定心神 Calm Emotions
安定心神 Calm Emotions.description:
你令区域内的生物强制冷静，令它们进入平和的状态；每个生物必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 对沉静的渴求令该生物在攻击骰上承受-1状态减值。

失败 任何会影响该生物的情绪效果会被压制，并且该生物无法进行敌对行为。如果该目标成为任何其他生物敌对行为的目标，它不再受到安定心神的影响。

大失败 如同失败，但是敌对行为不会结束该效果。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Qr5rgoZvI4KmFY0N]{法术效果：安定心神}

朦胧术 Blur (仅限自身).name: 朦胧术 Blur (仅限自身)
朦胧术 Blur (仅限自身).description: 目标的形态变得模糊不清。它获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]。由于该效果的原理，目标的位置仍然是显然的，目标不能使用该隐蔽来躲藏或潜行。

吸血鬼之触 Vampiric Touch.name: 吸血鬼之触 Vampiric Touch
吸血鬼之触 Vampiric Touch.description:
你的接触从目标身上抽出生命之血，以强化自身。你对目标造成6d6虚能伤害。你获得等于目标承受的虚能伤害（在抗力及类似效果生效后）一半的临时生命值。你在1分钟后失去任何剩余的临时生命值。

升阶 (+1) 该伤害增加2d6。

托梦术 Dream Message.name: 托梦术 Dream Message
托梦术 Dream Message.description:
你向你的目标的梦境中发送一段信息。该信息只能单向，至多为1分钟的谈话（大概150词）。如果目标入眠，它会立即收到信息。否则，它会在下一次入眠时收到。当它收到信息时，法术结束，并且你会知晓信息已送达。

升阶（4环级） 你能以至多10个你知晓并且曾遇见过的生物为目标。你必须向它们每个人发送相同的信息；该法术为不同目标分别计算结束。

异界传送 Plane Shift (Self Only; To Shadow P.name: 异界传送 Plane Shift (Self Only; To Shadow Plane Only)
异界传送 Plane Shift (Self Only; To Shadow P.description: 你和你的盟友穿过位面之间的屏障。目标移动到另一个位面，例如火焰位面，阴影位面，或者深渊。你必须对目的地位面有所了解，并且使用该位面的材料制作的魔法共鸣音叉作为该法术的器材。多数主要位面的共鸣音叉，如同异界传送法术本身一样，罕贵度为罕见。鲜为人知的位面和半位面的共鸣音叉通常罕贵度为稀有。该法术非常不精确，你会在某个目标（由你选择）上次到达该位面时所在的位置相距1d20×25英里的位置出现。如果对所有目标而言均是第一次旅行到特定位面，你会在位面上的一个随机位置出现。异界传送 不会提供返程的方法，但是通过再次施放异界传送令你能回到你之前所在的位面，除非有什么另外情况。

Skagappa.name: 斯卡加帕 Skagappa
Skagappa.description:
启动 1 交互；必须设置在生物通常睡觉位置的5英尺内（例如枕头或床下面）

斯克拉甘会使用这些由蠕动虫群构成的奇异球体，来拦截并解读睡眠对象的梦境。

持续1周，任何在斯卡加帕5英尺内睡觉的生物都会做越来越不安稳的梦。如果该生物处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}，则其在睡觉时必须进行一次@Check[type:flat|dc:5]。若失败，则该生物依旧疲乏，直到它再获得一次完整的整夜休息。

在这一周中的任何时间，获得斯卡加帕占有权的生物都可以利用其神秘力量，了解关于那名睡眠受到影响的生物、相当于10分钟的信息量。为此，该生物必须对斯卡加帕施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.D442XMADp01qJ7Cs]{Mindlink}并在一次@Check[type:occultism|dc:15|name:Skagappa DC|traits:alchemical,consumable,mental|showDC:gm]{Occultism}检定中成功。若检定失败，则该法术被浪费，不过施法者可以再次施放mindlink来额外尝试该检定。无论如何，每次接入斯卡加帕时都会传达相同的信息。在被放置于某个生物床边的一周后，斯卡加帕会散开，其组成的蠕虫会蜿蜒离去，并摧毁该物品。

Activate 1 Interact; must be set within 5 feet of where a creature typically sleeps (such as under its pillow or bed)

Sklaggans use these strange balls of writhing worms to intercept and interpret the dreams of sleeping subjects.

For 1 week, any creature that sleeps within 5 feet of the skagappa has increasingly fitful dreams. If it was @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}, the creature must succeed at a @Check[type:flat|dc:5] when it sleeps. On a failure, the creature remains fatigued until it gets another full night's rest.

At any point during this week, a creature who takes possession of the skagappa can tap into its occult powers to learn 10 minutes' worth of information about the creature whose sleep has been affected. To do so, the creature must cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.D442XMADp01qJ7Cs]{Mindlink} on the skagappa and succeed at a @Check[type:occultism|dc:15|name:Skagappa DC|traits:alchemical,consumable,mental|showDC:gm]{Occultism} check. On a failed check, the spell is wasted, though the caster can attempt the check additional times by casting mindlink again. Regardless, the same information is imparted each time the skagappa is tapped into. One week after it was placed near a creature's bedside, the skagappa unravels and its constituent worms slither away, destroying the item.

Sklaggan.publicNotes:
来自暗影位面的地下深处，斯克拉根是瘦骨嶙峋的双足畸形体，拥有无口的面孔、细韧的四肢，以及末端带着覆满泥垢之利爪的细长手指。它们入侵其他位面，并使用怪诞的有机科技来捕获并对当地原住民进行实验。对斯克拉根而言，每一个活生物都值得被侵入——且彻底——地检查。

斯克拉根所使用的有机材料与武器，与物质位面居民所熟悉的任何天然物质都相去甚远。相反，这些工具与斯克拉根本身一样异质，由令人不安的生物部件构成，例如由肌肉组织制成、不断扭动的线圈；从微小孔隙中可见地吸气与呼气的黏滑石块；以及由柔软、类似脑组织的物质制成的触须状短杖，其外缠绕着光滑的黑色几丁质。

斯克拉根最受欢迎的器具之一，是一种名为斯卡加帕的搏动的、拳头大小的虹吸装置。当斯克拉根选定一个实验对象时，它会记录该生物的睡眠规律，并把一只斯卡加帕藏在对象床边附近。反复暴露于该装置之下（通常约一周）便能使对象疲惫到足以轻易被捕获，更不必说斯卡加帕所截获并储存的心灵信息。斯克拉根会在其研究区域的偏远地带建立半移动式实验室，以便更快速地对被绑走的当地人进行其残忍的实验。

有机转移者

斯克拉根会通过使用其独特生物科技的奇异仪式，在地下实验室与其他位面之间往返转移。非斯克拉根研究者试图复制这些仪式的尝试总是以失败告终，并且多半会导致梦魇般的肉体突变。

怪物部件子系统

斯克拉根 生物 5

怪物部件 18/45/80 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型、中型、重型），察觉 物品，技能 物品（杂技、欺骗、医疗、神秘学、潜行、巧手）

符合条件的灌注属性 破灭，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），邪恶，智力，心灵，负能量，感官（黑暗视觉），法术（秘法：朦胧，安抚情绪，恍惚，梦境信息，心灵链接，位面转移，护盾，状态，念动力投射物，吸血鬼 接触），原始

Hailing from the subterranean depths of the Plane of Shadow, sklaggans are scrawny, bipedal abominations with mouthless faces, wiry limbs, and spindly fingers tipped with dirt-encrusted claws. They invade other planes and use perverse organic technology to capture and conduct experiments on native inhabitants. To a sklaggan, every living creature is worthy of invasive—and thorough—examination.

The organic materials and weapons sklaggans employ are far from any natural substance familiar to dwellers of the Material Plane. Rather, these tools are as alien as the sklaggans themselves, consisting of disturbing biological parts such as writhing coils made of muscle tissue, slimy stones that visibly inhale and exhale from microscopic pores, and tentacular rods of spongy brain-like matter wrapped in slick black chitin.

One of a sklaggan's most popular implements is a throbbing, fist-sized siphoning device called a skagappa. When a sklaggan has selected a subject for experimentation, it notes the creature's sleeping patterns and hides a skagappa near the subject's bedside. Repeated exposure to this device, usually about a week, can leave a subject exhausted enough for easy capture, to say nothing of the psychic information intercepted by and stored within the skagappa. Sklaggans set up semi-mobile laboratories in remote parts of the region they are studying in order to conduct their gruesome experiments on abducted locals more quickly.

Organic Shifters

Sklaggans shift from their subterranean laboratories to other planes and back via strange rituals that make use of their unique bio-technology. Non-sklaggan researchers' attempts to replicate these rituals always result in failure and, more often than not, nightmarish physical mutations.

Monster Part Subsystem

Sklaggan Creature 5

Monster Parts 18/45/80 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light, medium, heavy), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Deception, Medicine, Occultism, Stealth, Thievery)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), evil, intelligence, mental, negative, sensory (darkvision), spells (Occult: blur, calm emotions, daze, dream message, mindlink, plane shift, shield, status, telekinetic projectile, vampiric touch), wild
Sklaggan.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs mental

Skotogelia.name: 斯科托格利亚 Skotogelia

Solidifying Light.name: 凝固光 Solidifying Light
Solidifying Light.description:
斯科托格利亚只要仍待在阴影或黑暗中，就具有幽灵（特征）或灵体般的物质一致性。然而，任何时候斯科托格利亚处于明亮照明的区域内，它就会骤然变得清晰，并失去虚体（特征）以及其抗力。

Skotogelias have the material consistency of a ghost or spirit as long as they remain in shadows or darkness. However, any time a skotogelia is in an area of bright illumination, it snaps into focus and loses the incorporeal trait and its resistances.

Spell Esoterica.name: 法术秘学 Spell Esoterica
Spell Esoterica.description:
斯科托格利亚可以使用神秘学对任何法术、魔法物品、地点或持续效果进行辨识魔法，无论其根源为何。

A skotogelia can use Occultism to Identify Magic on any spell, magical item, location, or ongoing effect, regardless of tradition.

念动射弹 Telekinetic Projectile.name: 念动射弹 Telekinetic Projectile
念动射弹 Telekinetic Projectile.description:
你向目标射出区域中一个未固定的，无主的，1负载1以下的物体。对目标尝试一次法术攻击骰。如果你命中，你造成2d6的钝击，穿刺，或者挥砍伤害（对应于你所扔出的物体）。射出物体的特殊特征或者魔法特性不会影响该攻击或者伤害。

大成功 你造成双倍伤害。

成功 你造成完整伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d6。

稳定伤势 Stabilize.name: 稳定伤势 Stabilize
稳定伤势 Stabilize.description: 生命能量将目标从鬼门关拉回。目标失去 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死 Dying} 状态，但它仍然 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识 Unconscious}，并为0生命值。

阅读灵光 Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
阅读灵光 Read Aura.description:
你专注于目标物体，拓展神智，以感受魔法灵光。当你完成施法后，你得知该物品是否具有魔法。你或者你共有了灵光情报的人在对该物品@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]时获得+2环境加值。如果该物体是幻象，仅当该效果的环级低于你的阅读灵光环级时你才能发现此事实。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.J6OhRNSN23KzOPRL]

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多10个物体为目标。

升阶（8环级） 你能以任意数量物体为目标。

传讯术 Message.name: 传讯术 Message
传讯术 Message.description:
你无声地念出言语，这段言语会直接送到目标耳中，而不是从你的嘴中念出。其他人听起来顶多是你与它们正常说话，但法术目标会如同正站在你身边一般听到你的言语。目标可以通过一个反应动作做出一段简要回应，或者根据其意愿，也可以通过其下个回合的自由动作来回应，但它如此做时必须能看见你，并且在射程内。如果它做出回应，它的回应会直接送达你的耳中，如同最初的信息一般。

升阶（3环级） 法术的射程增加到500尺。

侦测魔法 Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
侦测魔法 Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

讯息传递 Mindlink.name: 讯息传递 Mindlink
讯息传递 Mindlink.description: 你将你和目标的精神链接在一起，并且将通常需要10分钟来交流的信息在一瞬间通过精神传递给对方。

固锁术 Lock.name: 固锁术 Lock
固锁术 Lock.description:
目标的锁结构闭合锁住，且被不可见的魔法防护紧紧压住。当你用魔法锁住一个目标时，你设定一个用以开启它的运动或者贼活DC，等于你的法术DC或者基础锁DC+4状态加值，取较高者。任何本来能够开启被本法术影响的锁的钥匙或者密码组在法术持续时间中无法开启该锁，但该钥匙或者组合会在开启该锁的检定上赋予+4环境加值。如果目标被开启，法术结束。如果目标没有被另外阻碍或者锁住，你可以在接触该目标时，通过一个交互动作解锁并开启它。这不会结束该法术。你可以在任何时间，任何距离解消该法术。

升阶（2环级） 持续时间无限，但你必须花费6gp的贵金属作为额外消耗。

浮碟术 Floating Disk.name: 浮碟术 Floating Disk
浮碟术 Floating Disk.description:
一个由魔法力量组成的浮碟在与你相邻的位置形成。该浮碟直径为2尺，跟随在你身后五尺，悬浮于地面之上。它能负载至多5负载的物体（这些物体必须能稳定放在其表现上）。当法术结束时，浮碟上的物品会坠落到地面上。

如果生物尝试踩到浮碟上，或者浮碟超载，或者某人尝试将浮碟抬高或令浮碟离地面更远，或者你移动到了浮碟的30尺以外，法术结束。

愚者之触 Touch of Idiocy.name: 愚者之触 Touch of Idiocy
愚者之触 Touch of Idiocy.description:
你令目标精神迟钝；目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 2}。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 4}。

黑暗术 Darkness.name: 黑暗术 Darkness
黑暗术 Darkness.description:
你创造一片黑暗的帷幕，光线无法穿透，并且光源无法在区域中发光。光线无法进入该区域，并且任何非魔法光源，例如火炬或者提灯，在区域中不会发出任何光线，即使其光照可能到达黑暗术之外也是如此。这也会压制等于或低于你的黑暗术环级的魔法光亮。光线无法穿透，所以在区域中的生物无法看到外面。对于外面，这看起来如同一团纯粹黑暗的球。

升阶（4环级） 即使具有黑暗视觉的生物（但不包括高等黑暗视觉）也几乎无法看穿这黑暗。它们透过黑暗看到的生物视为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]。

通晓语言 Comprehend Language.name: 通晓语言 Comprehend Language
通晓语言 Comprehend Language.description:
在你施放该法术时，目标会理解其正听到或者阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会令其能够理解密文，使用隐喻表达的含义，或者类似的内容（由GM所判定）。如果目标能够听见数种语言并且了解该情况，它能选择要理解的那种语言；否则，随机选择这种语言。

升阶 （3环级） 该目标也能使用该语言交流。

升阶 （4环级） 你能以至多10个生物作为目标，并且这些目标也能使用该语言交流。

读心术 Mind Reading.name: 读心术 Mind Reading
读心术 Mind Reading.description:
你通过一次短暂的心灵接触来尝试阅读目标的想法。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。目标会暂时免疫你的读心术1小时。

大成功 目标得知当施放该法术时你模糊的表层想法。

成功 你得知目标的智力调整值是高于，等于，还是低于你。

失败 你得知当施放该法术时目标模糊的表层想法，并且你得知目标的智力是高于，等于，还是低于你。

大失败 如失败，并且在法术持续时间中，你可以维持该法术来再次侦测目标的表层想法。目标不会获得另外的豁免。

极化认知 Hypercognition.name: 极化认知 Hypercognition
极化认知 Hypercognition.description: 你高速分类整理与你当前情况相关的信息。如施放该法术的一部分，你可以立即使用6个回忆知识动作。对于这些动作，你不能使用任何在你回忆知识时触发的特殊能力，反应动作，或者自由动作。

Shadowy Smear.name: 暗影污迹 Shadowy Smear
Shadowy Smear.description:
频率 每轮一次；

效果 斯寇托格利亚进行一次暗影之拳打击，不造成伤害。改为在命中时，目标变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1轮。在大成功或大失败命中时，目标变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明} 1轮，然后目眩 1轮。

Frequency once per round;

Effect The skotogelia makes a shadow fist Strike that deals no damage. Instead, on a hit, the target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round. On a critical hit, the target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round, then dazzled for 1 round.

Solid Umbra.name: 凝实暗影 Solid Umbra
Solid Umbra.description:
斯科托格莉亚能够自愿在短暂的持续时间内褪去其虚体（特征）伪装，通常是为了移动或将妖精界的典籍或卷轴留在物质位面上；

频率 每天一次；

效果 该斯科托格莉亚失去虚体（特征）及其抗力，持续 1 分钟。

Skotogelias can willfully shed their incorporeal guises for a short duration, typically to move or leave tomes or scrolls from the fey realm on the Material Plane;

Frequency once per day;

Effect The skotogelia loses the incorporeal trait and its resistances for 1 minute.

Skotogelia.publicNotes:
斯科托格利亚斯是轻飘飘、类似缚灵（特征）的类人生物，起源于妖精界中罕见的地区；这些地区以某种方式与暗影位面相互交融。它们最常在图书馆、学院及其他高等学府中被遇见，因此乍看之下往往会被误认为是暴力的幽灵（特征）或其他灵体。恰恰相反，斯科托格利亚斯是和平而书卷气的研究者，十分乐意帮助同样热爱知识或嗜书如命的同伴。

斯科托格利亚斯摒弃了大多数妖精同类那种反复无常、且常常流于轻佻的生活方式，转而一心一意将精力投入到研究并保存某一特定研究领域的学识之中。它们追随、检视并编目记录自己所能掌握的一切与所选主题相关的事物。为了整理并保存研究成果，斯科托格利亚斯在妖精界维持着浩瀚的图书馆，使用一种魔法的幽影文字，将其潦草写在其原生位面中不断变换的参天巨树、起伏丘陵与旋转湖泊的阴影里。当然，斯科托格利亚斯也明白，并非每个生物都能读懂它们那极其复杂的书面语言。因此，它们常以更通行的语言誊写研究发现的副本，然后把这些卷轴与典籍散布到物质位面的各地图书馆角落与缝隙中。

斯科托格利亚斯也确实意识到，有些知识最好严密封存，或至少不应被自由散播。若某本书或资源显得格外危险，斯科托格利亚斯往往会将其秘密藏在妖精界的某处，并只在自己心智的加固锁匣中记录那禁忌学识的确切位置。不过，狡黠的斯科托格利亚斯也偶尔会在某些地方留下线索或痕迹，使得一位既有技能又知识渊博的生物可能找得到这些危险文献；这些线索之径是斯科托格利亚斯的“考验”，用以判定某个存在是否有资格承载这般强大的知识。

学识的守护者

尽管斯科托格利亚斯最为人所知的是它们惊人的好学与和平的簿记习性，但没有什么比威胁它们栖居的图书馆更能迅速激起斯科托格利亚斯的怒火。若其研究的安全受到破坏，斯科托格利亚斯将不惜一切——必要时甚至冒着生命危险——来保护其领地。

怪物部件子系统

斯科托格利亚斯 生物 5

怪物部件 18/45/80 gp

可用精炼 护甲（轻型），察觉 物品，技能 物品（奥秘、学识[任意三项]、自然、秘学、宗教、隐匿）

可用灌注属性 破敌，敏捷，能量抗性（酸、寒冷、电击、火焰、负能量、音波），智力，负能量，感官（黑暗视觉），狂野，有翼

Skotogelias are wispy, wraith-like humanoids who originate from rare regions of the fey realm that somehow mix and mingle with the Shadow Plane. They are most often encountered in libraries, academies, and other places of higher learning, where they are understandably mistaken at first glance for violent ghosts or other spirits. To the contrary, skotogelias are peaceful and bookish researchers who are only too happy to help a fellow lover of knowledge or bibliophile.

Skotogelias eschew the capricious and oft-frivolous lifestyles of most of their fey brethren, instead single-mindedly focusing their efforts on researching and preserving lore about a particular area of study. They follow, examine, and catalog everything they can about their subject of choice. To organize and preserve their research, skotogelias maintain vast libraries in the fey realm using a magical umbral script scrawled in the shadows of the ever-shifting towering trees, rolling hills, and spinning lakes of their native plane. Of course, skotogelias recognize that not every creature is fluent in their incredibly complex written language. So they often make copies of their findings in more common tongues, then disperse such scrolls and tomes by leaving them in the nooks and crannies of libraries all over the Material Plane.

Skotogelias do realize that some knowledge is best kept under wraps or at least not freely dispersed. If a book or resource seems particularly dangerous, a skotogelia is apt to secret it somewhere on the fey realm, logging the forbidden lore's exact location only in the fortified lockbox of the skotogelia's own mind. Wily skotogelias have, however, been known to occasionally leave clues or tracks to such dangerous documents in places where a skilled and knowledgeable creature might be able to find them; such trails of clues are the skotogelia's "test" to determine if a being is worthy of bearing such powerful knowledge.

Guardians of Lore

Though skotogelias are best known for their sheer studiousness and peaceful bookkeeping, there is no quicker way to rouse a skotogelia's ire than by threatening the library in which they dwell. If the safety of its research is compromised, a skotogelia will stop at little—risking life itself, if need be—to protect its domain.

Monster Part Subsystem

Skotogelia Creature 5

Monster Parts 18/45/80 gp

Eligible Refinements armor (light), perception item, skill items (Arcana, Lore [Any Three], Nature, Occultism, Religion, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, dexterity, energy resistant (acid, cold, electricity, fire, negative, sonic), intelligence, negative, sensory (darkvision), wild, winged

Springjaw Doll.name: 弹簧颌玩偶 Springjaw Doll

Nondescript Doll.name: 不起眼的玩偶 Nondescript Doll
Nondescript Doll.description:
弹颚玩偶在欺骗检定以及用于伪装成普通瓷制玩偶的DC上具有自动结果18。

The springjaw doll has an automatic result of 18 on Deception checks and DCs to pass as a simple porcelain doll.

Wind Up.name: 上紧发条 Wind Up
Wind Up.description:
24小时，@Check[type:thievery|dc:13|name:上发条DC|traits:action:disable-a-device|showDC:gm]{盗窃}检定，待机

要让一具发条装置行动，它必须由另一名生物使用一把独特的钥匙上发条。这需要1分钟。一旦上好发条，它会在所列出的时间内保持可运作状态，通常为24小时；在这段时间结束后，它将无法察觉其周围环境，且在再次上发条前无法行动。某些发条装置的能力要求它们消耗自身剩余的部分可运作时间。它们不能消耗超过自己所拥有的时间，并会在剩余时间降至0时立即停机。如果不清楚某具发条装置上一次上发条是什么时候，大多数发条装置看守者会在一个固定的时间为所有发条装置上发条，通常是上午8点。

在其上发条条目中列出“待机”的发条装置，可以以一个3动作行动进入待机模式。处于待机时，它的可运作时间不会减少，但它仍能感知其周围环境（察觉承受-2减值）。它不能行动，只有一个例外：当它察觉到一个生物时，它可以以反应动作（）退出待机（若合适则掷先攻）。

一名生物可以尝试禁用装置来把发条装置的发条松开（使用上发条条目中列出的DC）。每次成功，该发条装置失去1小时的可运作时间。即使该发条装置处于待机模式，也可以这么做。

24 hours, @Check[type:thievery|dc:13|name:Wind Up DC|traits:action:disable-a-device|showDC:gm]{Thievery} check, standby

For a clockwork to act, it must be wound with a unique key by another creature. This takes 1 minute. Once wound, it remains operational for the listed amount of time, usually 24 hours, after which time it becomes unaware of its surroundings and can't act until it's wound again. Some clockworks' abilities require them to spend some of their remaining operational time. They can't spend more than they have and shut down immediately once they have 0 time remaining. If it's unclear when a clockwork was last wound, most clockwork keepers wind all their clockworks at a set time, typically 8 a.m.

A clockwork that lists standby in its wind-up entry can enter standby mode as a 3-action activity. Its operational time doesn't decrease in standby, but it can sense its surroundings (with a -2 penalty to Perception). It can't act, with one exception: when it perceives a creature, it can exit standby as a reaction (rolling initiative if appropriate).

A creature can attempt to Disable a Device to wind a clockwork down (with a DC listed in the wind-up entry). For each success, the clockwork loses 1 hour of operational time. This can be done even if the clockwork is in standby mode.

Wind-Up Scream.name: 发条尖啸 Wind-Up Scream
Wind-Up Scream.description:
频率 每日一次；

触发 发条颌骨玩偶被一次近战攻击命中；

效果 发条颌骨玩偶会发出尖锐的机械尖啸，以警告其主人有危险的入侵者。玩偶5英尺内的生物必须在一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15|name:Wind-Up Scream DC|traits:sonic|showDC:gm]{Fortitude} 豁免中成功，否则将 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} 1轮。大失败时，该生物还会 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 1轮。

Frequency once per day;

Trigger The springjaw doll is hit with a melee attack;

Effect The springjaw doll lets loose a shrill, mechanical screech to alert its master of dangerous intruders. Creatures within 5 feet of the doll must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15|name:Wind-Up Scream DC|traits:sonic|showDC:gm]{Fortitude} save or be @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 round. On a critical failure, a creature is also @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round.

Gnaw.name: 啃咬 Gnaw
Gnaw.description:
被弹簧颚娃娃的颚部擒抱的生物在被擒抱期间会受到[[/r 1d4[bleed]]]伤害。

A creature grabbed by the springjaw doll's jaw takes [[/r 1d4[bleed]]] damage as long as it is grabbed.

Turn the Screws.name: 拧紧螺丝 Turn the Screws
Turn the Screws.description:
需求 弹颚娃娃的颚中有一名生物 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱}；

效果 弹颚娃娃将其金属手指猛戳进该生物体内。娃娃对被擒抱的生物进行一次近战手指弩栓打击，攻击掷骰调整值为+9；如果它掷出命中失败，则改为成功；如果它掷出成功，则改为大成功。

Requirements The springjaw doll has a creature @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} in its jaw;

Effect The springjaw doll jabs its metallic fingers into the creature. The doll makes a melee finger bolts Strike with a +9 attack roll modifier against the grabbed creature; if it rolls a failure to hit, it gets a success instead, and if it rolls a success it gets a critical success.

Springjaw Doll.publicNotes:
弹颚人偶看起来不过是一尊做工精致的瓷制人偶，高约2-1/2英尺，重20磅。然而在其天真无邪的外表之下，这人偶藏着由沉重发条钟表机关组成的复杂结构。弹颚人偶发动攻击时，它的脸会裂开，露出骇人的金属颚，能够猛然合拢并撕裂血肉。

修补匠与玩具匠打造弹颚人偶，用来守护他们的店铺与居所。大多数人甚至没意识到这些不起眼的人偶竟是凶猛——有时甚至致命——的守卫。与其他钟表机关生物一样，弹颚人偶在被制造出来时就能被编程，以执行少量动作或一套特定流程。某位格外有才或傲慢的工程师可能会为了像敲开核桃这样卑微的用途而制作弹颚人偶；虽然弹颚人偶本身没有意志或人格，但那些被造来进行这种不光彩劳役的人偶，仍然有种古怪倾向：比纯粹的偶然所能解释的更频繁地咬到主人的手指。

弹颚人偶体内的复杂机关对那些对机械、陷阱制作或钟表机关装置感兴趣的人而言很有价值。要正确拆解一具弹颚人偶需要1小时，并进行一次成功的 @Check[type:crafting|dc:20|name:Disassemble Springjaw Doll|traits:|showDC:gm]{制造} 检定。弹颚人偶内部零件的价值应与其等级相称。

每具弹颚人偶的外观都因制作者的奇思妙想而各不相同，但有些人偶的能力与此处展示的个体大相径庭。这类人偶可能会从手指射出电弧（在这种情况下它们不具有对电击的弱点），也可能改为喷吐油与火。弹颚人偶也存在更大的变体；这类与人等高的人偶可能会被误认为蜡像、栩栩如生的人体模特，或普通裁缝店里的人台，以便更好地出其不意袭击潜在的窃贼。

被守护的宝藏

弹颚人偶自身没有宝藏，但它们常被用来守护其制造者的宝藏。一旦被瘫痪，弹颚人偶本身也会成为懂得如何给这复杂玩具重新上弦并重新编程的窃贼的一份绝佳战利品。

怪物部件子系统

弹颚人偶 生物 1

怪物部件 3.5/7/13 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺）、护甲（光）、察觉 物品、技能 物品（运动、潜行）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌、敏捷、能量抗性（负能量、正能量）、感官（黑暗视觉）、音波、力量、野性

A springjaw doll appears to be nothing more than a finely made porcelain doll standing about 2-1/2 feet tall and weighing 20 pounds. Underneath its innocent exterior, however, the doll hides a complex structure of heavy clockwork machinery. When a springjaw doll attacks, its face splits open, revealing terrifying metallic jaws capable of clamping down and rending flesh.

Tinkers and toymakers construct springjaw dolls to guard their shops and domiciles. Most people don't even realize that these unassuming dolls are fierce—and even sometimes deadly—wardens. Like other clockwork creatures, upon its creation a springjaw doll can be programmed to perform a small selection of actions or a specific routine. A particularly talented or haughty engineer might craft a springjaw doll for a purpose as menial as cracking walnuts; while springjaw dolls have no will or personality of their own, dolls created to perform such inglorious drudgery nevertheless have a peculiar tendency to nip at their master's fingers a little more often than can be attributed to pure chance.

The complex machinery inside a springjaw doll is valuable to those interested in machinery, trap creation, or clockwork devices. It takes 1 hour and a successful @Check[type:crafting|dc:20|name:Disassemble Springjaw Doll|traits:|showDC:gm]{Crafting} check to properly disassemble a springjaw doll. The value of the springjaw doll's internal parts should be appropriate to its level.

Every springjaw doll looks different depending on the whims of its creator, but some dolls have vastly different abilities than the one presented here. Such dolls might fire bolts of electricity out their fingers (in which case they lack weakness to electricity), while others might instead breathe oil and fire. Larger variants of springjaw dolls also exist; such human-sized dolls might be mistaken for wax sculptures, lifelike mannequins, or common dressmakers' dummies to better surprise would-be thieves.

Guarded Treasures

Springjaw dolls have no treasure on their own, but they are often used to guard the treasures of their creators. Once disabled, a springjaw doll itself makes a fine prize for a burglar who knows how to rewind and reprogram the complex toy.

Monster Part Subsystem

Springjaw Doll Creature 1

Monster Parts 3.5/7/13 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, dexterity, energy resistant (negative, positive), sensory (darkvision), sonic, strength, wild

Eyesore.name: 碍眼之物 Eyesore

Stolen Vision.name: 被窃的视野 Stolen Vision
Stolen Vision.description:
一只至少偷走过一只眼睛的眼疮具有视野。额外的眼睛会赋予它额外的视野类型；若至少有4只眼睛，它拥有@Compendium[pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.fFu2sZz4KB01fVRc]{微光视觉}；若至少有6只眼睛，它拥有@Compendium[pf2e.familiar-abilities.0Xrkk46IM43iI1Fv]{黑暗视觉}；若有8只或更多眼睛，它拥有@Compendium[pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.9qV49KjZujZnSp6w]{全向视野}。

一只典型的眼疮有6只眼睛。

An eyesore that has stolen at least one eye has vision. Additional eyes grant it additional vision types; with at least 4 eyes it has @Compendium[pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.fFu2sZz4KB01fVRc]{Low-Light Vision}, with at least 6 eyes it has @Compendium[pf2e.familiar-abilities.0Xrkk46IM43iI1Fv]{Darkvision}, and with 8 or more eyes it has @Compendium[pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.9qV49KjZujZnSp6w]{All-Around Vision}.

A typical eyesore has 6 eyes.

-1 Status to All Saves vs Blindness.name: 对抗失明的所有豁免获得-1状态惩罚 -1 Status to All Saves vs Blindness

Enucleate.name: 摘除 Enucleate
Enucleate.description:
对抗一个无助的、@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}或睡着的生物时，眼害有时会本能地尝试使用其“偷取眼睛”能力，在不惊扰或唤醒对象的情况下，无痛地取出该生物的眼睛。

眼害进行一次盗窃检定，对抗目标的察觉 DC。成功时，眼害偷走一只眼睛，如同“偷取眼睛”所述。若眼害的盗窃检定失败，目标会察觉到这次尝试，并在可能的情况下醒来。

Against a helpless, @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, or asleep creature, an eyesore will sometimes instinctively attempt to use their Steal Eye ability to painlessly extract the creature's eyes without disturbing or waking the subject.

The eyesore attempts a Thievery check opposed by the target's Perception DC. On a success, the eyesore steals a single eye, as per Steal Eye. If the eyesore fails its Thievery check, the target becomes aware of the attempt, waking up if possible.

Steal Eye.name: 窃取之眼 Steal Eye
Steal Eye.description:
眼疮体内所有未被消化的眼睛都会与其在30尺内视野可见的一个目标对视。该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:18|name:Steal Eye DC|traits:arcane,concentrate,transmutation,visual|showDC:gm]{Fortitude} 豁免。若其失败且尚未被此能力施加 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}，它会失去一只眼睛并永久目眩。若该生物在豁免中大成功或大失败地失败、已因该能力而目眩，或因其他原因仅剩一只眼睛，则一次大成功或大失败地失败会使该生物失去其剩余的眼睛并永久 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}（状态）。

被偷走的眼睛会立刻出现在眼疮体内，受其控制，并可能提升其视野。被偷走的眼睛可以在眼疮死亡后1小时内，从一具新鲜的眼疮尸体上取回。

生物可以通过一次成功的 @Check[type:medicine|dc:20|name:Implant Stolen Eye DC|showDC:gm]{Medicine} 检定，将取回的眼睛放回空的眼眶；这会在1分钟后恢复该生物的视野，并移除目眩与目盲（状态）（大成功或大失败的失败会导致眼睛被毁）。将异体眼植入非其原本的眼眶，则需要改为一次成功的 @Check[type:medicine|dc:24|name:Implant Foreign Eye DC|showDC:gm]{Medicine} 检定。要使该过程成功，眼睛必须新鲜且带有眼疮体液的湿润。1小时后，死去眼疮体内的眼睛分解得太严重，已毫无用处。

All non-digested eyes within the eyesore lock gazes with a target it can see within 30 feet. That creature must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:18|name:Steal Eye DC|traits:arcane,concentrate,transmutation,visual|showDC:gm]{Fortitude} save. If it fails and has not been @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} by this ability, it loses an eye and becomes permanently dazzled. If the creature critically fails the save, was already dazzled by this ability, or otherwise only has one eye, a critically failed save causes the creature to lose their remaining eye and be permanently @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}.

Stolen eyes immediately appear within the eyesore, under its control and potentially improving its vision. Stolen eyes can be retrieved from the fresh corpse of an eyesore within 1 hour of the eyesore's death.

A creature can place a reclaimed eye back into an empty eye socket with a successful @Check[type:medicine|dc:20|name:Implant Stolen Eye DC|showDC:gm]{Medicine} check, which restores the creature's vision after 1 minute and removes the dazzled and blinded conditions (a critical failure results in destroying the eye). Implanting a foreign eye into a socket other than its original requires a successful @Check[type:medicine|dc:24|name:Implant Foreign Eye DC|showDC:gm]{Medicine} check instead. Eyes must be fresh and damp from the fluid of the eyesore for this process to succeed. After 1 hour, the eyes in a dead eyesore are too decomposed to be of any use.

Eyesore.publicNotes:
有时被称为“蛇发女妖克星”，眼疮是一团带霉味的绿蓝色半透明黏液团，其中漂浮着数十颗脱离躯体的眼球，正处于不同的消化阶段。与大多数软泥怪不同，眼疮拥有视野，尽管这种视野来源极其骇人：来自受害者被偷走的眼睛。

眼疮体重在80到120磅之间，通常包含四到八颗眼球。任何拥有视野并注视眼疮体内被困的众多眼睛的生物，都有风险让自己的眼睛被魔法移除并加入眼疮的收藏，使可怜的目标失明，并进一步促进眼疮的生长。当眼疮吞食了足够数量的眼睛以实现繁殖（通常为12颗）时，它会分裂为两个完全相同的克隆体，从而传播自身。

眼疮的确切起源已湮没于时代之中。传奇称第一只眼疮是由一位嫉妒的宁芙的情人之躯被液化后创造出来的，但也有一些故事将鸣谢归于狗头人，称它们创造眼疮以防护游荡的蛇发女妖、鸡蛇与美杜莎。

不合胃口的生物

眼疮认为无眼的生物或缺乏视野的生物毫无趣味，不值得它们关注。幼年的眼疮甚至会被诸如布质眼罩之类的凡俗小把戏所欺骗。然而，潜在猎物只要显露出哪怕一丝眼球的迹象，就足以让眼疮陷入贪婪的狂乱。

怪物部件子系统

眼疮 生物 3

怪物部件 7/18/30 gp

符合条件的精炼 察觉 物品，技能物品（巧手）

符合条件的灌注属性 酸蚀、克星、体质、能量抗性（酸蚀、正能量）、强化、防感（可变：微光视野、黑暗视觉）、力量、原野

Sometimes referred to as "basilisk's bane," the eyesore is a musty green-blue lump of semi-translucent goo in which dozens of disembodied eyeballs float in various stages of digestion. Unlike most oozes, eyesores possesses a sense of vision, albeit one gained from a particularly macabre source: the stolen eyes of their victims.

An eyesore ranges from 80 to 120 pounds and typically contains four to eight eyeballs. Any creature with vision that looks upon the multitudinous eyes trapped within an eyesore risks having their own eyes magically removed and added to the eyesore's collection, blinding the poor subject and furthering the growth of the eyesore. Eyesores propagate themselves by splitting into two identical clones when they have consumed a sufficient number of eyes to do so (usually 12).

The exact origin of eyesores is lost to time. Legends say the first eyesore was created from the liquefied body of a jealous nymph's paramour, but some stories credit kobolds with creating eyesores to protect against roaming basilisks, cockatrices, and medusas.

Unappetizing Creatures

Eyesores regard eyeless creatures or creatures that lack vision as uninteresting and unworthy of their attention. Young eyesores can even be fooled by mundane trickery such as a cloth blindfold. However, potential prey that displays even the merest hint of an ocular orb can stir an eyesore into a ravenous frenzy.

Monster Part Subsystem

Eyesore Creature 3

Monster Parts 7/18/30 gp

Eligible Refinements perception item, skill items (Thievery)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, bane, constitution, energy resistant (acid, positive), fortification, sensory (variable: low-light vision, darkvision), strength, wild
Eyesore.allSaves: -1 status to all saves vs. blindness

Unarmored.name: 无甲胄 Unarmored

Armorsense (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 护甲感知（模糊）60尺 Armorsense (Imprecise) 60 feet
Armorsense (Imprecise) 60 feet.description:
一名未穿护甲者能够感知护甲和类似的防护装备。

An unarmored can sense armor and similar protective equipment.

Rejuvenation.name: 复苏 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
当一个无护甲者被摧毁时，它会在与其绑定的地点于[[/r 2d4 #days]]{2d4天}后重新形成，且完全治愈。只有在真诚地赠予它一套价值至少1,400 gp的护甲时，无护甲者才会被永久且立即摧毁。被赠予的那套护甲会与离去的灵体一同消失。

When an unarmored is destroyed, it re-forms after [[/r 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} at the site to which it is bound, fully healed. An unarmored is permanently and instantly destroyed only if earnestly gifted a suit of armor worth at least 1,400 gp. The gifted suit of armor disappears along with the departing spirit.

Deny Shield.name: 拒斥盾牌 Deny Shield
Deny Shield.description:
触发 无甲者能看见的30尺内的一名生物使用盾牌格挡反应动作（）；

效果 无甲者用意志令触发的生物的盾牌瞬间非物质化，使所有触发盾牌格挡的来袭伤害绕过盾牌格挡。

Trigger A creature within 30 feet of the unarmored that it can see uses the Shield Block reaction;

Effect The unarmored wills the triggering creature's shield to momentarily dematerialize, allowing all incoming damage that triggered the Shield Block to bypass the Shield Block.

Transport Armor.name: 运输护甲 Transport Armor
Transport Armor.description:
伸出一根手指并发出无声的尖啸，无甲者以30英尺内一名穿着护甲的生物为目标。无甲者试图切断目标与其护甲的联系，并将护甲迅速送往以太位面。目标必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:31|name:Transport Armor DC|traits:conjuration, divine, teleportation|showDC:gm]{意志} 豁免。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物与其护甲之间的纽带不足以抵挡无甲者的干扰。该生物的护甲在被传送至以太位面时变得幽灵般、半透明。护甲立即被卸下，并对物质位面上的生物变得不可见且无法触及。1轮后，护甲在其最后被穿戴之处最近的空置空间中重新实体化。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但护甲会在以太位面停留1分钟。护甲在物质位面重新实体化时，会出现在距离其最后被穿戴之处100英尺内的随机方向。

Pointing a finger and issuing a silent scream, the unarmored targets a creature wearing armor within 30 feet. The unarmored attempts to sever the target's connection to its armor and whisk the armor to the Ethereal Plane. The target must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:31|name:Transport Armor DC|traits:conjuration, divine, teleportation|showDC:gm]{Will} save.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature's bond to its armor isn't strong enough to withstand the unarmored's meddling. The creature's armor turns ghostly and translucent as it is transported to the Ethereal Plane. The armor is instantly unequipped and becomes invisible and untouchable to creatures on the Material Plane. After 1 round, the armor rematerializes in the nearest empty space to where it was last worn.

Critical Failure As failure, but the armor remains on the Ethereal Plane for 1 minute. The armor rematerializes on the Material Plane in a random direction within 100 feet of where it was last worn.

Unarmored.publicNotes:
几乎没有什么事比关键道具失踪更让冒险者懊恼了，而对战士及其珍贵的护甲来说更是加倍如此。当一名战士在生命最后时刻哀叹自己的命运——相信若是自己穿着更好的护甲就能活下来——其愤怒、绝望与执念会导致其灵体升起，化为一名无甲者。

被锚定在其殒命之地，且无法从悲惨命运中解脱，无甲者只渴求两件事：获得一套完美的护甲，并将其悲剧施加于他人。它对任何穿着格外华丽道具的人都怀有强烈憎恨。为确保这些装备精良之人遭受与它相同的失落，无甲者会将受害者的护甲灵体转移至以太位面，然后无情地击倒这名骤然失去防护的战士。

以太萃取

知道自己可能会遭遇无甲者的冒险者，最好准备一个“以太游移”法术或其他能在物质位面与以太位面之间快速往返的手段。如此一来，遭受无甲者“护甲传送”力量的受害者便能迅速取回自己的装备。这类准备能显著阻滞—并激怒—无甲者。

怪物部件子系统

无甲者 生物 12

怪物部件 250/560/1,030 gp

符合条件的精炼 察觉 物品，技能 物品（威吓、潜行）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸害、混乱、魅力、敏捷、能量抗性（酸、寒冷、电击、火焰、负能量、音波）、邪恶、加固、负能量、感官（黑暗视觉）、狂野、翼化

Few things frustrate adventurers more than when essential gear goes missing, and this is doubly true for warriors and their precious armor. When a fighter spends their final moments lamenting their fate—believing they would have survived if only they had been wearing better armor—the individual's anger, despair, and obsession can cause their spirit to rise as an unarmored.

Anchored to the location of their demise and unable to move on from their grim fate, unarmored desire only two things: to acquire the perfect suit of armor and to inflict their tragedy upon others. They bear great hatred for anyone wearing particularly spectacular gear. To ensure such well-equipped individuals suffer the same loss as it, an unarmored spirits away its victim's armor to the Ethereal Plane before mercilessly striking down the suddenly unprotected warrior.

Ethereal Extraction

Adventurers who know that they might run up against an unarmored do well to prepare an ethereal jaunt spell or other means of quickly going back and forth between the Material and Ethereal Planes. Doing so allows victims of the unarmored's armor-teleporting powers to quickly retrieve their equipment. Such preparations can dramatically stymie—and enrage—an unarmored.

Monster Part Subsystem

Unarmored Creature 12

Monster Parts 250/560/1,030 gp

Eligible Refinements perception item, skill items (Intimidation, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, dexterity, energy resistant (acid, cold, electricity, fire, negative, sonic), evil, fortification, negative, sensory (darkvision), wild, winged

Dishrag Dervish.name: 抹布旋舞者 Dishrag Dervish

Rejuvenation.name: 复苏 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
当抹布旋舞者被摧毁时，它会在其所绑定的酒馆包厢或饮酒大厅内于[[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4天}后重新成形态，且完全痊愈。只有当有人把它的酒馆清理干净时，抹布旋舞者才能前往来世；根据场所的状况，这可能需要数小时或数天。

When a dishrag dervish is destroyed, it re-forms after [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} within the taproom or drinking hall it is bound to, fully healed. A dishrag dervish can move onto the afterlife only if someone cleans up its tavern, which might take hours or days depending on the state of the place.

Incorporeal Swarm Defenses.name: 虚体虫群防御 Incorporeal Swarm Defenses
Incorporeal Swarm Defenses.description:
使用幽灵接触武器造成的伤害仍会因抹布旋舞者的钝击与穿刺抗力而降低。

Damage dealt with ghost touch weapons is still reduced by the dishrag dervish's bludgeoning and piercing resistances.

Site Bound.name: 场地束缚 Site Bound
Site Bound.description:
抹布苦行僧不能离开其所束缚的酒馆吧台或饮酒大厅超过120英尺。

A dishrag dervish cannot stray more than 120 feet from the taproom or drinking hall to which it is bound.

Ectoplasmic Dishwater.name: 灵质洗碗水 Ectoplasmic Dishwater
Ectoplasmic Dishwater.description:
豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:21|name:Ectoplasmic Dishwater DC|traits:divine, necromancy, poison|showDC:gm]{Fortitude};

最大持续时间 6轮;

阶段 1 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] 伤害和 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}（1轮）;

阶段 2 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] 伤害、off-guard，以及 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}（1轮）;

阶段 3 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] 伤害、off-guard，以及 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}（1轮）

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:21|name:Ectoplasmic Dishwater DC|traits:divine, necromancy, poison|showDC:gm]{Fortitude};

Maximum Duration 6 rounds;

Stage 1 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] damage and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} (1 round);

Stage 2 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] damage, off-guard, and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 round);

Stage 3 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] damage, off-guard, and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (1 round)

Swarming Rags.name: 蜂拥的破布 Swarming Rags
Swarming Rags.description:
抹布旋舞者空间内的每个敌人都会受到[[/r 1d8[bludgeoning]]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:21|name:Swarming Rags DC|traits:damaging-effect,divine, evocation|showDC:gm]{基础反射}豁免），外加灵质洗碗水。

Each enemy in the dishrag dervish's space takes [[/r 1d8[bludgeoning]]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:21|name:Swarming Rags DC|traits:damaging-effect,divine, evocation|showDC:gm]{basic Reflex} save) plus ectoplasmic dishwater.

Greasy Spill.name: 油腻溢洒 Greasy Spill
Greasy Spill.description:
抹布旋舞者倾倒肮脏的水桶并拧干污秽的海绵，在一个持续 1 分钟的 @Template[type:burst|distance:15] 内制造一滩滑腻的水洼。每个位于该区域内站立的生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:20|name:Greasy Spill DC|showDC:gm]{反射} 豁免或一次 @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:20|name:|showDC:gm]{特技动作} 检定，否则将会倒地 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。使用一个动作移动进入受影响区域的生物必须尝试一次反射豁免或一次特技动作检定以进行平衡。在该区域内以调整步法或匍匐移动的生物无需尝试检定或豁免。

The dishrag dervish dumps grimy buckets and wrings out filthy sponges, creating a slippery puddle in a @Template[type:burst|distance:15] that lasts for 1 minute. Each creature standing in the area must succeed at a @Check[type:reflex|dc:20|name:Greasy Spill DC|showDC:gm]{Reflex} save or @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:20|name:|showDC:gm]{Acrobatics} check or fall @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. Creatures using an action to move into the affected area must attempt either a Reflex save or an Acrobatics check to Balance. A creature that Steps or Crawls doesn't have to attempt a check or save.

Dishrag Dervish.publicNotes:
哗啦作响地穿过污渍斑斑的走廊，泼溅着越过变形的吧台，并在满是灰尘的壁橱里阴影森然地徘徊，被称为“抹布旋舞灵”的成群灵体出没于酒馆、酒吧及其他共饮纵乐的公共场所遗址。

旅店与酒馆里最辛劳的雇员——侍者、仆役、吧台伙计，以及其他处在行业最底层的人——通常会从客人和雇主两边承受最多的虐待与羞辱。更可悲的是，当暴动的暴民或穷凶极恶的纵火者以毁灭降临于这类场所时，这些工人也往往最可能在这场攻击中丧命。因此也就不难理解，为何有时在一次攻击之后的余波里，这些可怜的灵魂会拒绝前往来世，直到他们所受的屈辱被纠正为止。

为了在生前带给他们无尽痛苦的建筑里纠缠不休，这些复仇的灵魂会显现为肮脏的抹布、碎裂的扫帚，以及装着污浊洗碗水的水桶，哗啦作响地穿过饮酒大厅，恐吓任何仍胆敢光顾这桩罪孽生意的人。没过多久，这间闹鬼的饮酒场所便会彻底倒闭；然而即便如此，抹布旋舞灵仍会继续在其旧日折磨者的废墟中作祟，直到最后一滴酒精都从建筑的地板木条间被擦洗干净。

暴躁的戒酒主义者

在废弃的酒馆里，抹布旋舞灵会以被丢弃的清洁用品或寻常垃圾的模样大咧咧地藏在眼前，直到它们肮脏的领地被打扰。这些灵体尤其憎恶喧闹的狂欢者、死不悔改的乱丢垃圾者，以及任何公开崇拜纵欲或酒宴之神的人。战斗中，抹布旋舞灵会一心一意地以这类酒鬼与自夸之徒为目标，忽视所有其他人，直到它解了复仇之渴。

缚地灵体

当船难或剧院火灾这类大规模悲剧夺走水手、表演者或其他居民的性命，而他们的身份又与他们殒命的船只或建筑密不可分时，其结果往往会诞生一种恶毒的灵体，例如飘渺旅人。这些幽魂般的存在怀着怨恨紧抓物质位面不放，呈现出翻涌飘荡的形貌，映照出他们神圣工作场所的种种器具与装饰。

怪物部位子系统

抹布旋舞灵 生物 4

怪物部位 12/27/50 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型），察觉 物品，技能 物品（威吓，学识[酒精]，隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 bane, chaotic, charisma, dexterity, energy resistant（acid, cold, electricity, fire, negative, sonic）, evil, fortification, negative, 毒素, sensory（黑暗视觉）, wild, winged

Clattering down stained hallways, sloshing across warped bars, and looming in dusty closets, the swarming spirits called dishrag dervishes haunt the ruins of pubs, bars, and other communal places of libationary indulgence.

The hardest-working employees of public houses and taverns—waiters, servants, bar hands, and others at the bottom rungs of the business—typically sustain the most abuse and indignity from guests and employers alike. Tragically, when destruction visits the establishment in the form of riotous mobs or belligerent arsonists, these same workers are also among the most likely to perish in the attack. Perhaps it is no wonder, then, why sometimes in the aftermath of an attack these poor souls refuse to move onto the afterlife until the indignities they've suffered have been set right.

To haunt the building that caused them so much agony in life, these vengeful souls manifest as grubby dishrags, splintered brooms, and buckets of scummy dishwater that clatter across the drinking hall and terrorize anyone who still dares patronize the sinful business. It isn't long before the haunted drinking establishment goes out of business completely; yet, still, a dishrag dervish will go on haunting the ruins of its former tormentors until the last drop of alcohol is scrubbed from the building's floorboards.

Tempestuous Teetotalers

In abandoned taverns, dishrag dervishes hide in plain sight as discarded cleaning supplies or common trash until their sordid domain is disturbed. These spirits particularly despise rowdy revelers, unrepentant litterers, and anyone who openly worships a god of debauchery or libations. In combat, a dishrag dervish will single-mindedly target such bacchants and braggadocios, ignoring all others until it has slaked its thirst for vengeance.

Sitebound Spirit

When a mass tragedy like a shipwreck or theatre fire claims the lives of sailors, performers, or other inhabitants whose identities were inextricably tied to the vessel or building in which they perished, the end result is often a malevolent spirit such as a wispy wayfarer. These ghostly beings cling to the Material Plane with a vengeance, assuming billowy shapes that reflect the trappings of their sacred place of work.

Monster Part Subsystem

Dishrag Dervish Creature 4

Monster Parts 12/27/50 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Intimidation, Lore [Alcohol], Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, dexterity, energy resistant (acid, cold, electricity, fire, negative, sonic), evil, fortification, negative, poison, sensory (darkvision), wild, winged

Yomhibdi.name: Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi
Yomhibdi.tokenName: Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi Yomhibdi

Water Vulnerability.name: 水弱点 Water Vulnerability
Water Vulnerability.description:
水会稀释幽墨比迪的墨汁形态并削弱怪物的生命力。当幽墨比迪在水中开始其回合，或被水浇淋（无论是通过法术还是其他某种效果，例如往它身上泼一桶水），它会受到[[/r 2d6 #damage]]{2d6 伤害}。

Water dilutes a yomhibdi's inky form and saps the monster of vitality. When the yomhibdi starts its turn in water or is doused with water (either through a spell or some other effect, such as pouring a bucket of water over it), it takes [[/r 2d6 #damage]]{2d6 damage}.

精神质询 Mind Probe.name: 精神质询 Mind Probe
精神质询 Mind Probe.description:
你将你的精神投射入一个生物的精神以寻找信息。除非其通过一次成功豁免抵抗你，否则你可以获得目标的记忆与知识。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 法术持续时间的每一轮中，你可以维持该法术来询问一个不同的问题，并尝试发现答案。对于每个问题，目标可以尝试一次欺骗检定，对抗你的法术DC；如果目标成功，你不会得知答案，并且当大成功时，目标会提供给你一个假的答案，并且你信以为真。在你向目标提问过一个问题后，再次提问该问题，即使通过另一次施放的精神质询，也会得到相同的结果。

大失败 如同失败，并且目标在对抗你的问题的欺骗检定上承受-4环境减值。

Dredge Sorrow.name: 挖掘悲伤 Dredge Sorrow
Dredge Sorrow.description:
约姆希布迪探查30尺内一名生物的心灵，将其自我怀疑与缺乏原创性的感受引至表面，以便约姆希布迪能以这些负面情绪为食。目标必须尝试一次@Check[type:will|dc:21|name:Dredge Sorrow DC|traits:emotion, healing, mental|showDC:gm]{意志}豁免。

约姆希布迪在[[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}内无法再次施展挖掘悲伤。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标在1轮内处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}。

失败 目标在2轮内处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，且约姆希布迪恢复[[/br 14 #hit points]]{14生命值}。

大失败 目标在3轮内处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 3}，且约姆希布迪恢复[[/br 28 #hit points]]{28生命值}。

The yomhibdi plumbs the psyche of a creature within 30 feet and brings to the surface their feelings of self-doubt and unoriginality so that the yomhibdi can feast on these negative emotions. The target must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:21|name:Dredge Sorrow DC|traits:emotion, healing, mental|showDC:gm]{Will} save.

The yomhibdi can't Dredge Sorrow again for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 2 rounds, and the yomhibdi regains [[/br 14 #hit points]]{14 Hit Points}.

Critical Failure The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3} for 3 rounds, and the yomhibdi regains [[/br 28 #hit points]]{28 Hit Points}.

Flick Ink.name: 轻弹墨迹 Flick Ink
Flick Ink.description:
约姆希布迪向5英尺内的单一对手甩出一团墨汁。目标必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:17|name:Flick Ink DC|traits:visual|showDC:gm]{反射} 豁免。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲（状态）}。该生物或一名相邻的生物可以花费2 动作擦去墨汁并移除目盲（状态）。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但需要花费3 动作擦去墨汁。

The yomhibdi flicks a glob of ink at a single opponent within 5 feet. The target must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:17|name:Flick Ink DC|traits:visual|showDC:gm]{Reflex} save.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}. The creature or an adjacent creature can spend 2 actions to wipe away the ink and remove the blinded condition.

Critical Failure As failure, but it takes 3 actions to wipe away the ink.

Yomhibdi.publicNotes:
尤姆希布迪是吞噬信息的憎恶，外形像由墨迹潦草的词语、短语与符号构成的漂浮类人生物。它们由艺术家、诗人与作家在未完成作品前放弃时所浪费的墨水与挥霍的情绪能量，于以太位面显现。它一旦显现，便会开始永无止境地寻找那些失败或自我破坏的创作者作为食粮。挫败、疲惫与绝望是尤姆希布迪最爱的佳肴；当它榨干受害者的这些负面情绪后，尤姆希布迪便会将创作者整个吞噬。

构成尤姆希布迪的词语与句子通常会扭结成大致的类人形态，因为类人生物是最常提供促成尤姆希布迪诞生之情绪的来源。它们通常约5英尺高但重量不足20磅，不过它们能在一定程度上重组身体，将墨色“利爪”拉长，以打击远处的敌人。

被困在物质位面的尤姆希布迪会被学习、艺术与文化之地所吸引——任何拙劣之辈与无才的创作者可能聚集的地方。并不罕见的是，一群尤姆希布迪（称为一个“故事”）会把巢穴设在旧图书馆的隐蔽角落，或是大歌剧院与剧院下方的地道里。在那里，它们融入阴影并伏击，随时准备打击任何痛苦不堪、陷入沉思而徘徊经过的诗人或剧作家。作为被遗忘的思想与故事的回声，这些生物通常会从受害者那里盗走写作作品，而它们的巢穴里可能藏有珍贵书籍，甚至是魔法卷轴。

对创作的依赖

尤姆希布迪存在的唯一目的就是以凡人创作者的负面情绪为食。若它无法找到维生来源——例如在荒野中，或在不鼓励创造力的极端务实社会里——尤姆希布迪会逐渐散开并融化成一滩墨水。

怪物部件子系统

尤姆希布迪 生物 4

怪物部件 12/27/50 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），察觉物品，技能物品（特技动作、运动、潜行）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌，混沌，魅力，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），加固，精神，感官（黑暗视觉），法术（神圣：心灵探查），力量，狂野

Yomhibdis are information-devouring abominations that resemble floating humanoids made of ink-scrawled words, phrases, and symbols. They manifest on the Ethereal Plane from the wasted ink and squandered emotional energies of artists, poets, and writers who give up on works before they're finished. As soon as it manifests, a yomhibdi begins its never-ending search for the failed or self-sabotaging creatives on whom it feeds. Frustration, exhaustion, and despair are the yomhibdi's favorite dishes; once it has sapped a victim of these negative emotions, the yomhibdi consumes the creator whole.

The words and sentences that compose a yomhibdi typically twist together into a roughly humanoid shape, since humanoids are the most common providers of the emotions that lead to a yomhibdi's creation. They typically stand about 5 feet tall but weigh less than 20 pounds, though they can reconfigure their bodies to a certain extent, lengthening their inky "claws" to strike at distant foes.

Yomhibdis trapped on the Material Plane gravitate toward places of learning, art, and culture—anywhere that hacks and untalented creators might congregate. It is not unusual for a group of yomhibdis (called a story) to make their lair in the hidden nook of an old library or in the tunnels beneath great opera houses and theaters. There, they blend into the shadows and lie in ambush, ready to strike at any agonizing poets or playwrights who wander by lost in thought. As echoes of forgotten thoughts and stories, these creatures commonly steal works of writing from their victims, and their lairs might contain valuable books or even magic scrolls.

Creative Reliance

Yomhibdi exists solely to feed on the negative emotions of creative mortals. If it is unable to find a source of sustenance—such as in wilderness or hyper-pragmatic societies that don't foster creativity—a yomhibdi will gradually unspool and melt into a puddle of ink.

Monster Part Subsystem

Yomhibdi Creature 4

Monster Parts 12/27/50 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), fortification, mental, sensory (darkvision), spells (Divine: mind probe), strength, wild

Prismatic Ooze.name: 虹彩软泥 Prismatic Ooze

Resistance to Ranged.name: 对远程的抗力 Resistance to Ranged
Resistance to Ranged.description:
虹彩软泥对远程武器弹药15具有抗力，并且对投掷武器15具有抗力

The Prismatic Ooze has Resistance to ranged weapon ammunition 15, and thrown weapons 15

Prismatic Vulnerability.name: 虹彩弱点 Prismatic Vulnerability
Prismatic Vulnerability.description:
虹光软泥怪对某些法术具有弱点，这些法术对应特定颜色。当虹光软泥怪成为下列法术之一的目标时，施法者可以进行一次反制检定（第9等级，DC 33）。若成功，该法术会反制虹光软泥怪对应的颜色。反制某个颜色会移除软泥怪与该颜色对应的免疫与抗力，并使软泥怪的【虹光接触】中该颜色的效果失效。虹光软泥怪的各色、可反制每种颜色的法术，以及当该颜色被反制时会被禁用的抗力与免疫如下：

红色 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.3puDanGfpEt6jK5k]{Cone of Cold}（火焰免疫与远程武器弹药抗力）

橙色 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.g8QqHpv2CWDwmIm1]{Gust of Wind}（投掷武器抗力）

黄色 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate}（酸蚀、寒冷、电击、力场、负能量、正能量与音波免疫）

绿色 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.115Xp9E38CJENhNS]{Passwall}（毒素免疫）

蓝色 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{Magic Missile}（听觉与石化免疫）

靛色 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.DyiD239dNS7RIxZE]{Searing Light}（预言系免疫）

紫色 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic}（无）。

A prismatic ooze is vulnerable to certain spells, which correspond to certain colors. When the prismatic ooze is targeted by one of the spells listed below, the caster can make a counteract check (9th level, DC 33). If successful, the spell counteracts the corresponding color of the prismatic ooze. Counteracting a color removes the ooze's immunities and resistances that correspond to that color and disables that color of the ooze's Prismatic Touch. A prismatic ooze's colors, the spell that can counteract each color, and the resistances and immunities disabled when the color is counteracted are:

Red @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.3puDanGfpEt6jK5k]{Cone of Cold} (fire immunity and ranged weapon ammunition resistance)

Orange @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.g8QqHpv2CWDwmIm1]{Gust of Wind} (thrown weapons resistance)

Yellow @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate} (acid, cold, electricity, force, negative, positive, and sonic immunities)

Green @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.115Xp9E38CJENhNS]{Passwall} (poison immunity)

Blue @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{Magic Missile} (auditory and petrification immunities)

Indigo @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.DyiD239dNS7RIxZE]{Searing Light} (divination immunity)

Violet @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (none).

Prismatic Touch.name: 虹彩接触 Prismatic Touch
Prismatic Touch.description:
被虹彩软泥的假足打击命中的生物，或在软泥回合开始时被虹彩软泥通过@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}的生物，会根据软泥当时所呈现的颜色而承受一个额外效果。随后该生物对虹彩接触免疫，直到软泥下个回合开始。

掷骰[[/r 1d8]]以决定哪种颜色影响目标。若该颜色已被反制（见虹彩弱点），则虹彩接触没有效果。每个效果的DC均为38。

  • 1. 红色：[[/r 3d6[fire]]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:38|name:Prismatic Touch Red DC|traits:damaging-effect, arcane|showDC:gm]{基础 反射}豁免）
  • 2. 橙色：[[/r 3d8[acid]]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:38|name:Prismatic Touch Orange DC|traits:damaging-effect, arcane|showDC:gm]{基础 反射}豁免）
  • 3. 黄色：[[/r 4d6[electricity]]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:38|name:Prismatic Touch Yellow DC|traits:damaging-effect, arcane|showDC:gm]{基础 反射}豁免）
  • 4. 绿色：[[/r 2d6[poison]]]伤害，外加1分钟的@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:38|name:Prismatic Touch Green DC|traits:damaging-effect, arcane|showDC:gm]{基础 强韧}豁免；成功时不会虚弱）
  • 5. 蓝色：@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.znv4ECL7ZtuiagtA]{Flesh to Stone} @Check[type:fortitude|dc:38|name:Prismatic Touch Violet DC|traits:arcane, transmutation|showDC:gm]{意志}
  • 6. 靛色：@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{Warp Mind} @Check[type:will|dc:38|name:Prismatic Touch Violet DC|traits:arcane, emotion, enchantment, incapacitation, mental|showDC:gm]{意志}
  • 7. 紫色：目标获得1分钟的@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}。成功的@Check[type:will|dc:38|name:Prismatic Touch Violet DC|traits:arcane|showDC:gm]{意志}豁免可抵消；在严重失败的豁免下，目标被送往另一个位面，其效果如同@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Plane Shift}。
  • 8. 强力打击：目标受到两种颜色影响——掷骰两次，若结果重复或掷出8则重掷。

A creature hit by the prismatic ooze's pseudopod or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} by the prismatic ooze at the start of the ooze's turn experiences an additional effect depending on which color the ooze is at that moment. The creature is then immune to Prismatic Touch until the start of the ooze's next turn.

Roll [[/r 1d8]] to determine which color affects the target. If the color has been counteracted (see Prismatic Vulnerability), then Prismatic Touch has no effect. Each effect is DC 38.

  • 1. Red: [[/r 3d6[fire]]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:38|name:Prismatic Touch Red DC|traits:damaging-effect, arcane|showDC:gm]{basic Reflex} save)
  • 2. Orange: [[/r 3d8[acid]]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:38|name:Prismatic Touch Orange DC|traits:damaging-effect, arcane|showDC:gm]{basic Reflex} save)
  • 3. Yellow: [[/r 4d6[electricity]]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:38|name:Prismatic Touch Yellow DC|traits:damaging-effect, arcane|showDC:gm]{basic Reflex} save)
  • 4. Green: [[/r 2d6[poison]]] damage plus @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 minute (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:38|name:Prismatic Touch Green DC|traits:damaging-effect, arcane|showDC:gm]{basic Fortitude} save; no enfeebled on a success)
  • 5. Blue: @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.znv4ECL7ZtuiagtA]{Flesh to Stone} @Check[type:fortitude|dc:38|name:Prismatic Touch Violet DC|traits:arcane, transmutation|showDC:gm]{Will}
  • 6. Indigo: @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{Warp Mind} @Check[type:will|dc:38|name:Prismatic Touch Violet DC|traits:arcane, emotion, enchantment, incapacitation, mental|showDC:gm]{Will}
  • 7. Violet: The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 minute. A successful @Check[type:will|dc:38|name:Prismatic Touch Violet DC|traits:arcane|showDC:gm]{Will} save negates; on a critically failed save, the target is sent to another plane, with the effect of @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Plane Shift}.
  • 8. Potent Strike: The target is affected by two colors-roll twice, rerolling duplicates or results of 8.

Consume Magic.name: 消耗魔法 Consume Magic
Consume Magic.description:
需求 一名被棱彩软泥怪 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} 的生物正受到一个持续的法术影响；

效果 棱彩软泥怪尝试反制（反制调整值 [[/r 1d20 +27]]{+27} 且反制等级 8）影响被擒抱生物的最高等级法术。若成功，该法术被反制，且棱彩软泥怪恢复 [[/r 30 #hit points]]{30 Hit Points}。

Requirements A creature @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} by the prismatic ooze is affected by an ongoing spell;

Effect The prismatic ooze attempts to counteract (counteract modifier [[/r 1d20 +27]]{+27} and counteract level 8) the highest-level spell affecting the grabbed creature. If successful, the spell is counteracted and the prismatic ooze regains [[/r 30 #hit points]]{30 Hit Points}.

Dazzling Burst.name: 炫目爆发 Dazzling Burst
Dazzling Burst.description:
频率 每分钟一次；

效果 @Template[type:burst|distance:30]内的每个生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:37|name:Dazzling Burst DC|traits:visual|showDC:gm]{Fortitude} 豁免。一名生物在成功时获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} 1轮，在失败时获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} 1轮，而在大失败时失明1分钟。

Frequency once per minute;

Effect Each creature in a @Template[type:burst|distance:30] must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:37|name:Dazzling Burst DC|traits:visual|showDC:gm]{Fortitude} save. A creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round on a success, @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round on a failure, and blinded for 1 minute on a critical failure.

Magic Sense 120 feet.name: 魔法感知 120英尺 Magic Sense 120 feet
Magic Sense 120 feet.description:
虹彩泥怪能够感知魔法的存在。

A prismatic ooze can sense the presence of magic.

Prismatic Ooze.publicNotes:
当强大的法师试验魔法时，奇异而可怖的造物便是不可避免的结果。虹彩软泥怪就是此类邪奥摆弄可能导致的一种后果。虹彩软泥怪闪烁着鲜艳的虹彩光泽，在让受害者目眩神迷后，便使其遭受无数有害的魔法效果。

原初虹彩软泥怪

在罕见的情况下，虹彩软泥怪会在原初魔法强烈的区域中自发出现。一些妖精界探险者曾描述，他们在高空中目击过岛屿大小的虹彩软泥怪翱翔其上；不过值得庆幸的是，这类巨兽至今尚未抵达物质位面。

怪物部件子系统

虹彩软泥怪 生物 17

怪物部件 1,875/4,300/8,000 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），察觉物品，技能物品（运动）

符合条件的灌注属性 强酸，破邪，体质，电击，能量抗性（强酸、寒冷、电击、火焰、力场、负能量、正能量、音波），火焰，强化，精神，毒素，力量，狂野，有翼

When powerful mages experiment with magic, strange and terrible creations are the inevitable result. The prismatic ooze is one potential consequence of such eldritch tinkering. Shimmering with vibrant iridescent colors, a prismatic ooze dazzles its victims before subjecting them to a myriad of harmful magical effects.

Primal Prismatic Oozes

In rare cases, a prismatic ooze can spontaneously appear in areas of strong primal magic. Some fey realm explorers have given accounts of spotting island-sized prismatic oozes soaring high in the sky above, though, thankfully, no such behemoths have yet made it to the Material Plane.

Monster Part Subsystem

Prismatic Ooze Creature 17

Monster Parts 1,875/4,300/8,000 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), perception item, skill items (Athletics)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, bane, constitution, electricity, energy resistant (acid, cold, electricity, fire, force, negative, positive, sonic), fire, fortification, mental, poison, strength, wild, winged

Mogadb.name: 莫加德布 Mogadb

Tumble Over.name: 翻滚越过 Tumble Over
Tumble Over.description:
mogadb 通过其皮囊内动物的强力翻腾来移动，而非任何传统的移动方式。mogadb 无视自然困难地形。

A mogadb moves by the forceful heaving of the animals within its skin sack, not any traditional means of locomotion. The mogadb ignores natural difficult terrain.

灵敏嗅觉 (模糊感官) 30 尺.name: 灵敏嗅觉 (模糊感官) 30 尺

Slough Skin.name: 蜕皮 Slough Skin
Slough Skin.description:
触发 该mogadb在单一轮内受到30点或更多挥砍伤害；

效果 该mogadb的容器被摧毁，留下一个动物虫群。这不会破坏将虫群维系在一起的法术；虫群继续以@Compendium[pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.sPClc6y3dT3XZupv]{鼠虫群}的方式进行攻击，其最大生命值等于该mogadb剩余的生命值。

Trigger The mogadb takes 30 or more slashing damage in a single round;

Effect The mogadb's vessel is destroyed, leaving behind a swarm of animals. This does not break the spell holding the swarm together, which continues to attack as a @Compendium[pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.sPClc6y3dT3XZupv]{Rat Swarm} with a maximum number of Hit Points equal to the mogadb's remaining Hit Points.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
mogadb 喷吐出它体内的一部分虫群，形成一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:15]。区域内每个生物受到 [[/r 1d6[piercing]]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:18|name:Breath Weapon DC|traits:damaging-effect, primal|showDC:gm]{基础反射} 豁免）。豁免失败的生物会暴露于污秽热。

mogadb 在 [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 轮} 内无法再次使用吐息武器。

The mogadb spews out some of its internal swarm in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15]. Each creature in the area takes [[/r 1d6[piercing]]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:18|name:Breath Weapon DC|traits:damaging-effect, primal|showDC:gm]{basic Reflex} save). A creature that fails the save is exposed to filth fever.

The mogadb can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Filth Fever.name: 污秽热 Filth Fever
Filth Fever.description:
由污秽热导致的 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心} 和 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷} 状态不会自行好转，直到该疾病被治愈为止。

豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:14|name:Filth Fever DC|traits:disease|showDC:gm]{强韧};

阶段 1 携带者且无不良效果（[[/br 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 小时}），

阶段 2 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1 天），

阶段 3 恶心 1 且 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}（1 天），

阶段 4 昏迷（1 天），

阶段 5 死亡

The @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} conditions from filth fever don't improve on their own until the disease is cured.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:14|name:Filth Fever DC|traits:disease|showDC:gm]{Fortitude};

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect ([[/br 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 hours}),

Stage 2 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 day),

Stage 3 sickened 1 and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 day),

Stage 4 unconscious (1 day),

Stage 5 dead

Mogadb.publicNotes:
一团蠕动的害虫被缝进皮囊之中，莫加德布是邪恶妖精制造的仆役生物与守卫者。其创造者会寻找或召唤大量微小动物——通常是蜥蜴、老鼠以及其他细小的爬行动物与哺乳动物——随后施行一场仪式，将它们施法驱使，使其作为单一的大型掠食野兽行动。仪式在被附魔的虫群被封入某种皮制容器时完成。该容器可以简单到只是一个粗糙的袋子，隐约呈四足生物的形状；也可以华丽到如同逼真的毛绒玩具；甚至可能只是熊或大型猫科动物的防腐兽皮。无论容器外观如何，虫群都能灵活地驱动它，而莫加德布也会毫无差错地侍奉其主人。

尽管没有中枢智能，莫加德布的组成虫群仍会像单一野兽般行动：以四条“腿”潜行游荡，并用其肢体如同大型四足动物般攻击，虽然其移动带有一种可辨识的无骨质感。撞击会令莫加德布的皮囊泛起波纹，而当该生物张口进食或向敌人呼出害虫时，内部的虫群清晰可见。随着莫加德布受损，皮制容器上的裂口与撕裂会露出其中翻涌的群体，它们以诡异的协同方式行动。

许多冒险者会将莫加德布误认为被活化的物体，或其他类型的魔法构装生物，偶尔甚至会误认为诸如次元袋之类的魔法物品。小魔怪等诡术妖精对此类恶作剧乐在其中，并会以此为明确目标来制作他们的莫加德布。

尤其残忍的妖精据说会制造整群莫加德布，甚至将其当作战兽骑乘；在此过程中，他们会彻底抽干某个区域内的微小动物以供其仪式所需。遭遇一群莫加德布及其骑手是令人毛骨悚然的景象，鲜有人会欢迎，而能活着讲述此事者更是寥寥。这类行径很少不被察觉，并常常引发与德鲁伊结社及来自妖精世界的善意存在之间的对抗。

摧毁莫加德布

莫加德布可以通过成功施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.OyFCwQuw8XRazsNr]{移除诅咒}法术而被摧毁，不过在施法时要让该生物停留在同一处可能会很困难。更强大的魔法也可能同样有效。否则，将被困的动物从其邪恶命运中解救出来的唯一方法，就是摧毁皮制容器并驱散虫群。

怪物部位子系统

莫加德布 生物 3

怪物部位 7/18/30 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺），护甲（轻型），察觉物品，技能物品（运动、生存）

符合条件的灌注属性 克敌，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），感官（昏暗视野，嗅觉），力量，野性

A squirming mass of vermin sewn into a skin sack, mogadbs are created as servitor creatures and protectors by wicked fey. The creator finds or summons a large number of tiny animals—typically lizards, mice, and other minute reptiles and mammals—then enacts a ritual that ensorcells them into acting as a single large predatory beast. The ritual is completed when the enchanted swarm is sealed into a skin vessel of some kind. This vessel can be as simple as a rough sack vaguely shaped like a four-legged creature, as ornate as a lifelike plush toy, or even simply the preserved hide of a bear or great cat. No matter the vessel's appearance, the swarm animates it ably, and the mogadb serves its master unerringly.

While it has no central intelligence, a mogadb's constituent swarm nonetheless behaves like a single beast, prowling about on four "legs" and attacking with its limbs like a large quadruped, though it has a discernible boneless quality to its movement. Impacts cause the mogadb's skin to ripple, and the swarm inside is visible whenever the creature opens its mouth to feed or exhale vermin at foes. As the mogadb becomes damaged, rents and tears in the skin vessel reveal the writhing horde within, acting in eerie concert.

Many adventurers mistake mogadbs for animated objects or other types of magical construct creatures or occasionally even magic items like bags of holding. Trickster fey such as gremlins take great joy in such antics and craft their mogadbs with this exact goal in mind.

Particularly cruel fey have been known to craft whole packs of mogadbs, even riding them as war beasts, in the process totally draining an area of tiny animals to feed their rituals. Encountering a pack of mogadbs and their riders is a terrifying sight that few would welcome, and even fewer might live to tell about. Such acts rarely go unnoticed and often result in confrontations with druidic circles and well-meaning beings from the fey world.

Destroying Mogadbs

A mogadb can be destroyed with a successful @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.OyFCwQuw8XRazsNr]{Remove Curse} spell, though it may be difficult to keep the creature in one place while casting. More powerful magic might be effective as well. Otherwise the only way to free the trapped animals from their wicked fate is by destroying the skin vessel and dispersing the swarm.

Monster Part Subsystem

Mogadb Creature 3

Monster Parts 7/18/30 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), sensory (low-light vision, scent), strength, wild

Venomous Snakedead.name: 毒蛇亡灵 Venomous Snakedead

Snakedead Venom.name: 蛇亡毒液 Snakedead Venom
Snakedead Venom.description:
豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17|name:Snakedead Venom DC|traits:poison|showDC:gm]{Fortitude};

最长持续时间 6 轮;

阶段 1 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] (1 轮);

阶段 2 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] 且 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 1} (1 轮)

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17|name:Snakedead Venom DC|traits:poison|showDC:gm]{Fortitude};

Maximum Duration 6 rounds;

Stage 1 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] (1 round);

Stage 2 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (1 round)

Winding Neck.name: 盘绕颈部 Winding Neck
Winding Neck.description:
蛇死者的獠牙打击无视对蛇死者相邻生物的掩蔽与高等掩蔽。

A snakedead's fangs Strike ignores cover and greater cover against creatures adjacent to the snakedead.

Coil Neck.name: 盘绕颈部 Coil Neck
Coil Neck.description:
剧毒的蛇死者盘起脖颈，将其以獠牙进行的触及从10尺提高至15尺。在蛇死者用獠牙打击后，其脖颈会再次松开。

The venomous snakedead coils its neck, increasing its reach with its fangs from 10 to 15 feet. After the snakedead Strikes with its fangs, its neck becomes uncoiled again.

Coiled Opportunity.name: 盘绕的良机 Coiled Opportunity
Coiled Opportunity.description:
如同借机攻击，但毒蛇亡灵只有在受益于盘颈时才能使用此反应动作（）。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AttackOfOpportunity]
