As Attack of Opportunity, but the venomous snakedead can use this reaction only if it's benefiting from Coil Neck.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AttackOfOpportunity]

Venomous Snakedead.publicNotes:
毒蛇尸鬼是通过邪恶的奥术手段创造出的骇人之物，在这一过程中，作为祭品的受害者——总是一名有感知的类人生物——会被毒蛇反复咬噬。与此同时，人们吟诵黑暗的咒语，并将蛇血浇在祭品的裂伤之上。这些仪式会剥夺该生物的感知能力，并将其变形为无心智的畸形怪物。

毒蛇尸鬼保留了其类人的躯体，但其命运的痕迹清晰可见。它的身体布满咬痕，血管因淤滞的黑色、绿色与紫色液体而鼓胀。毒蛇尸鬼的双眼也呈现出相似的黑、绿或紫色调。其口中生有滴落毒液的獠牙，但最能说明一切的是这生物那筋肉虬结的颈项——在创造仪式的过程中被拉长，并被灌注了死灵系的力量。

尽管毒蛇尸鬼是无心智生物，因此并不具备社会观念，但用于创造它的奥术魔法会将该生物与同类绑定在一起。若其创造者被杀或主动释放毒蛇尸鬼，它会自然而然地被吸引向其他蛇尸鬼。毒蛇尸鬼聚集成大型群体乃至成群结队的现象并不罕见，而目击者谈及此类现象时，常描述这些存在表现出类似蜂群心智的行为，并展示其自身独特的亵渎仪式。至于这些仪式究竟能达成什么目的，则无人知晓。

据说，毒蛇尸鬼最早由一个侍奉奇异蛇形恶魔的女巫结社所创造。女巫们试图创造一种符合其主人的形象之物，一种会在凡人世界执行女巫命令的生物。她们的成功超乎想象，因为蛇尸鬼不仅与神圣存在有着神秘联系，也与其他蛇尸鬼相互连结。女巫们意识到蛇尸鬼之间这条尚未被充分利用的纽带所蕴含的潜力，可用于传播其恶魔霸主的讯息，便将创造蛇尸鬼的方法散布给各地的其他法师与死灵法师，使其蛇尸鬼造物得以聚集，并在世界各处掀起死亡。

毒蛇尸鬼出没地点

在蛇被高度崇敬而类人生物却不受重视的地方，毒蛇尸鬼更为常见。地下城市、沙漠神庙与丛林高塔都可能栖居这些污秽生物——无论它们是作为施虐者的奴隶、法老的仆从，还是法师的守卫。

怪物部件子系统

毒蛇尸鬼 生物 2

怪物部件 5/12/22 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺），护甲（轻型、中型），技能物品（特技动作、运动）

符合条件的灌注属性 体质，敏捷，能量抗性（负能量），邪恶，负能量，毒素，感官（微光视野），力量，野性

Venomous snakedead are horrific creatures created through vile arcane means during which the sacrificial victim—always a sentient, humanoid creature—is bitten numerous times by poisonous snakes. All the while, dark incantations are chanted and snake blood is poured onto the sacrifice's lacerations. These rites strip the creature of its sentience and transform it into a mindless abomination.

A venomous snakedead retains its humanoid body but shows clear signs of its fate. Its body is covered in bite marks and its veins swell with stagnant black, green, and purple fluids. The eyes of a venomous snakedead have a similarly black, green, or purple hue to them. Its mouth sports fangs dripping with venom, but most telling of all is the creature's sinewy neck, lengthened in the process of the creation rites and imbued with necromantic strength.

While a venomous snakedead is a mindless creature and, as such, does not have a sense of society, the arcane magic used to create it binds the creature to others of its kind. If its creator is killed or willingly releases the venomous snakedead, it will naturally be drawn to other snakedead. It is not unheard of for venomous snakedead to gather in large groups or even hordes, and witnesses of such phenomena speak of the beings' hivemind-like behavior and the display of their own unique profane rituals. What, exactly, these rituals accomplish is anyone's guess.

It is said that venomous snakedead were first created by a coven of witches serving strange serpentine demons. The witches sought to create a creature in their patrons' image, a creature that would do the witches' bidding in the mortal realm. They were more successful than they had dared hope, for the snakedead shared a mystical connection not only with the divine, but with other snakedead. Realizing the untapped potential of this link between snakedead to spread their demonic overlords' message, the witches spread the means of creating snakedead to other wizards and necromancers throughout the land, allowing their snakedead creations to gather together and wreak death upon the world.

Venomous Snakedead Locations

Venomous snakedead are more common in places where snakes are held in high regard and humanoids are not. Underground cities, desert temples, and jungle towers might all host these foul creatures, whether as sadists' slaves, pharaohs' servants, or wizards' guardians.

Monster Part Subsystem

Venomous Snakedead Creature 2

Monster Parts 5/12/22 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing), armor (light, medium), skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics)

Eligible Imbued Properties constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (negative), evil, negative, poison, sensory (low-light vision), strength, wild

Ice Zuggle.name: 冰祖格尔 Ice Zuggle

Element Sense.name: 元素感知 Element Sense
Element Sense.description:
祖格尔可以在所列射程内以一种模糊感官侦测元素魔法的来源。这包括任何具有元素、空气、土、火或水（特征）特征的生物、法术或能力。

Zuggles can detect sources of elemental magic within the listed range as an imprecise sense. This includes any creatures, spells, or abilities with the elemental, air, earth, fire, or water trait.

Zuggle Orbs.name: 祖格尔宝珠 Zuggle Orbs
Zuggle Orbs.description:
冰祖格尔拥有[[/br 1d6+2 #orbs]]{1d6+2 祖格尔球}

祖格尔会自然地产生拳头大小、注入元素的蛋白质球团，并将其储存在沿着脊柱、靠近背鳍处延伸的专门囊袋中。祖格尔可以将这些球团发射向捕食者以自卫，但炼金术士和其他人则看重这些“祖格尔球”独特的魔法性质，并会小心地在不惊吓或伤害祖格尔的情况下将其取出。

Ice Zuggles have [[/br 1d6+2 #orbs]]{1d6+2 Zuggle Orbs}

Zuggles naturally produce fist-sized globules of element-infused protein, which they store in specialized pouches that run the length of their spine near their fin. A zuggle can launch these globules at predators for self-defense, but alchemists and others prize these "zuggle orbs" for their unique magical properties and take care to extract them without scaring or hurting the zuggle.

Defensive Ball.name: 防御球 Defensive Ball
Defensive Ball.description:
触发 zuggle 被一次近战或远程攻击命中；

效果 zuggle 蜷缩成防御球，获得对抗该次触发攻击的 AC +3 环境加值。当处于其防御球形态时，zuggle 的 AC 提升至 20，它无法进行近战打击，并且它会处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} 直到它花费一个动作从球中滚出来（此动作具有操作（特征））。

Trigger The zuggle is hit with a melee or ranged attack;

Effect The zuggle curls into a defensive ball, granting it a +3 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. While in its defensive ball form, the zuggle's AC increases to 20, it can't perform melee Strikes, and it is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} until it spends an action to roll out of its ball (this action has the manipulate trait).

Elemental Absorption.name: 元素吸收 Elemental Absorption
Elemental Absorption.description:
冰祖格以寒冷能量为食，但过量会导致它们爆炸。

触发 冰祖格被一个造成寒冷伤害的效果命中，但尚未掷出伤害；

效果 冰祖格吸收该能量，恢复等同于本应造成的寒冷伤害的生命值。如果此治疗使祖格的生命值超过其最大生命值，它将超出的数值转化为临时生命值。如果这会使祖格拥有超过15点临时生命值，它会立刻爆炸，造成[[/r 4d4[cold]]]{4d4 寒冷伤害}，范围为一个@Template[type:burst|distance:10]（@Check[type:reflex|dc:18|name:Elemental Absorption DC|basic:true] 豁免）。

Ice zuggles feed on cold energy, but too much can cause them to explode.

Trigger The ice zuggle is hit by an effect that deals cold damage, but the damage hasn't yet been rolled;

Effect The ice zuggle absorbs the energy, regaining Hit Points equal to the cold damage that would have been dealt. If this heals the zuggle in excess of its maximum HP, it gains the excess amount as temporary HP. If this would give the zuggle more than 15 temporary HP, it immediately explodes, dealing [[/r 4d4[cold]]]{4d4 cold damage} in a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] (@Check[type:reflex|dc:18|name:Elemental Absorption DC|basic:true] save).

Ice Zuggle.publicNotes:
这些不起眼的小家伙在元素位面上十分常见，它们四处爬行以寻找食物。尽管它们可爱的外表很能让人放下戒心，而且通常会成为其家乡位面更强大居民的猎物，但祖格尔仍会对那些粗心或毫无准备的位面穿行者构成威胁。

祖格尔有数十种变种——从常见的岩石祖格尔与火焰祖格尔，到更奇异的类型，如西罗科祖格尔、泥浆祖格尔与盐水祖格尔。几乎所有祖格尔都共享相同的基本形态，外观类似由元素物质构成的大型毛虫或木象甲。每只祖格尔背部都有一条中央鳍片，可展开以侦测并吸收周遭的元素灵光。除鳍片外，祖格尔的身体会因其最近吸收的元素灵光类型而产生极大差异。位于水位面的祖格尔可能长有鳍与鳃；而位于土位面的祖格尔则可能有岩石般的甲壳与利爪。在多元宇宙的其他地方，也能见到祖格尔试图吸取它们所能获得的任何元素灵光。在充斥着各种元素魔法的地区，祖格尔的解剖结构可能会真正地怪诞离奇，并可能拥有数量不等的独特能力。

祖格尔绝不友善，但它们的好奇心常被误认为讨喜的性情。祖格尔跟在施法者身边，啜饮施放法术时溢散的元素副产物，这种情况并不罕见。一只饥饿的祖格尔在终于遇到元素力量的来源时，可能会表现出反复无常的行为或攻击性。甚至还出现过少数案例：饥饿的祖格尔在对强力元素源狼吞虎咽得太快后发生爆炸。

祖格尔球

祖格尔会自然产生拳头大小、灌注元素的蛋白质团块，并将其储存在沿其脊柱、靠近鳍片处延伸的专门囊袋中。祖格尔可以将这些团块发射向捕食者以自卫，但炼金术士等人则珍视这些“祖格尔球”的独特魔法性质，并会小心翼翼地在不惊吓或伤害祖格尔的情况下将其取出。

怪物部件子系统

冰霜祖格尔 生物 2

怪物部件 5/12/22 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（轻型，中型），察觉 物品，技能 物品（运动、隐匿、生存）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸害，混沌，寒冷，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（寒冷，正能量），感官（微光视野），原野，感知

These unassuming critters are a common sight on the elemental planes, where they crawl about in search of sustenance. Though their cute appearance is disarming and they are typically prey to the more powerful denizens of their home planes, zuggles still pose a threat to unwary or unprepared plane hoppers.

Dozens of varieties of zuggle exist—from common rock and fire zuggles to more exotic types like sirocco, mud, and brine zuggles. Nearly all zuggles share the same basic form, which resembles a large caterpillar or wood weevil made of elemental matter. Each zuggle has a central fin along its backside that expands to detect and absorb ambient elemental auras. Other than its fin, the body of a zuggle can vary greatly depending on what type of elemental aura it has recently absorbed. A zuggle on the Plane of Water might have fins and gills, whereas a zuggle on the Plane of Earth might have a rocky carapace and claws. Elsewhere in the multiverse, zuggles can be found trying to feed off of any elemental auras that they can get. In places suffused with all kinds of elemental magic, a zuggle might have a truly bizarre anatomy and might have any number of unique abilities.

While they aren't friendly by any means, zuggles are curious in a way that is often mistaken for an endearing disposition. It is not uncommon for a zuggle to follow around a spellcaster and sup up any spilled elemental byproducts from cast spells. A starving zuggle might display erratic behavior or aggression when it finally comes upon a source of elemental power. There have even been a few instances of a starving zuggle exploding after feasting too quickly on a potent elemental source.

Zuggle Orbs

Zuggles naturally produce fist-sized globules of element-infused protein, which they store in specialized pouches that run the length of their spine near their fin. A zuggle can launch these globules at predators for self-defense, but alchemists and others prize these "zuggle orbs" for their unique magical properties and take care to extract them without scaring or hurting the zuggle.

Monster Part Subsystem

Ice Zuggle Creature 2

Monster Parts 5/12/22 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, cold, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (cold, positive), sensory (low-light vision), wild, wisdom

Runebranded Aurochs.name: 符文烙印野牛 Runebranded Aurochs
Runebranded Aurochs.tokenName: 符文烙印的原牛 Runebranded Aurochs

Storm Step.name: 风暴步 Storm Step
Storm Step.description:
每当野牛作为疾跑或践踏动作的一部分移动至少其完整的速度时，它会在轰鸣的风暴云翻涌中离地而起。

直到其下个回合结束前，野牛可以毫不费力地攀爬垂直和水平表面，它不会因坠落而受到伤害，并且它的攻击额外造成 [[/r 1d6[electricity]]] 伤害。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-bestiary-effects.doAX8lN9hKSJBrZK]{效果：风暴踏步}

Whenever the aurochs moves at least its full Speed as part of a Stride or Trample action, it rises off the ground on a billow of thunderous storm clouds.

Until the end of its next turn, the aurochs can effortlessly climb vertical and horizontal surfaces, it takes no damage from falls, and its attacks deal an additional [[/r 1d6[electricity]]] damage.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-bestiary-effects.doAX8lN9hKSJBrZK]{Effect: Storm Step}

灵敏嗅觉 (模糊感官) 30 尺.name: 灵敏嗅觉 (模糊感官) 30 尺

Lightning Horns.name: 闪电角 Lightning Horns
Lightning Horns.description:
触发 符文烙印的原牛受到电击伤害；

效果 蓝色的电弧在原牛的双角之间噼啪作响，仿佛它们是一对避雷针。下一次符文烙印的原牛触碰另一名生物时，电能会释放。被触碰的生物受到等同于触发该能力的电击伤害的电击伤害。

Trigger The runebranded aurochs takes electricity damage;

Effect Blue bolts of electricity crackle between the aurochs's horns as though they were a pair of lightning rods. The next time the runebranded aurochs touches another creature, the electricity discharges. The touched creature takes electricity damage equal to the electricity damage that triggered this ability.

Runebranded Aurochs.publicNotes:
这头野性牛科动物在其远古牧群中格外显眼。它明显高出一掌，皮肤更暗、更像皮革，其上布满发光的疤痕，形似未完成的符文；它的眼睛闪着一抹倔强的光。它看上去警惕且随时准备战斗，角与蹄如同抛光金属般闪亮。

在被称为原牛（aurochs）的远古牛种出没的荒野之地，有些个体会因魔法意外、命运或操弄而变得更为狂野、更为强壮、也更为致命；它们甚至掌控自然界诸元素的力量。这些非凡的原牛会成为传奇，且会被那些为肉、皮革或运动而狩猎此类生物的人，或试图驯服这类野兽的人所觊觎与珍视。它们皮下长出的奇异纹路使这些生物得名“符文烙印原牛（runebranded aurochs）”；当然也有其他更花哨的称呼，比如元素原牛、风暴牛群与闪电公牛。

剥皮后的符文烙印原牛能提供坚韧皮革，适合用来制作，但其皮上的符文纹路在该生物死亡后很少还保有任何持久的魔法。只有最强大或最年长的符文烙印原牛——那些在荒野中繁盛存活了异常漫长岁月，或以其他方式承受过命运过度无常摆布者——其皮上的符文才可能具备可转移至武器或护甲上的力量。此类原牛往往还会发展出更为怪异的能力，如魔法飞行、对其元素的完全免疫，甚至体型与智力的进一步提升。

更稀有的品种

此处所呈现的符文烙印原牛由一场带有魔法电荷的风暴或其他电性过程所造就。尽管这是该动物的常见形态，其他来源也能让符文烙印原牛转而与火焰、寒冷或更奇异的元素同调。这类原牛拥有相似能力，但其攻击与抗力会对应不同的能量类型。

不可驯服

符文烙印原牛很少会自愿让人骑乘或从事家畜劳役。驯兽师也许能找到办法将这类动物用于展示，或作为格外蛮横的守卫兽，但符文烙印原牛总会试图挣脱，以返回荒野并寻找其他原牛。

怪物部位子系统

符文烙印原牛 生物 4

怪物部位 12/27/50 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺）、护甲（轻型、中型）、察觉 物品、技能 物品（运动）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸根、体质、电击、能量抗性（电击、正能量）、感官（微光视野、嗅觉）、力量、狂野

This wild bovine stands out among its ancient herd. Easily a hand taller, with darker leathery skin, pockmarked with glowing scars that look like incomplete runes, its eyes shine with an ornery light. It looks wary and ready for a fight, and its horns and hooves shine like polished metal.

In the wild places where the ancient breed of cattle known as aurochs roam, there are those specimens that, whether through magical accident, fate, or manipulation, develop to be even wilder, stronger, and deadlier than their already formidable kin, with powers over the very elements of the natural world. These extraordinary aurochs become legendary and prized among those who hunt such creatures for meat, leather, or sport or those who seek to tame such wild beasts. The strange markings that develop along their hides have given these creatures the name "runebranded aurochs," though other colorful names exist as well, such as elemental aurochs, storm cattle, and lightning bulls.

While a skinned runebranded aurochs can provide strong leather suitable for crafting, the rune markings on its hide rarely possess any lasting magic after the creature's death. Only the most powerful or eldest runebranded aurochs—those who have thrived in the wilds for an exceptionally long time or were otherwise subject to excessive whims of destiny—might bear runes on their hides capable of being transferred to weapons or armor. Such aurochs are apt to develop even stranger abilities such as magical flight, total immunity to their element, and even advanced size and intellect.

Rarer Breeds

The runebranded aurochs presented here was created by a magically charged storm or some other electrical process. Although this is a common form of the animal, other sources can make runebranded aurochs attuned instead to fire, cold, or more exotic elements. Such aurochs possess similar abilities, but their attacks and resistances are of a different energy type.

Unbreakable

A runebranded aurochs will rarely take a rider or do domesticated work willingly. Beastmasters may find means by which to keep such animals for show or as particularly brutish guard beasts, but runebranded aurochs will always try to break free in order to seek the wilds and other aurochs.

Monster Part Subsystem

Runebranded Aurochs Creature 4

Monster Parts 12/27/50 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Athletics)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, electricity, energy resistant (electricity, positive), sensory (low-light vision, scent), strength, wild
Runebranded Aurochs.prototypeToken: 符文烙印的原牛 Runebranded Aurochs

Mechanical Artillerist (Shrapnel Blast).name: 机械炮手（破片爆炸） Mechanical Artillerist (Shrapnel Blast)

借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity.name: 借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity

Final Detonation.name: 最终爆炸 Final Detonation
Final Detonation.description:
当一名机械炮兵被降至0生命值时，其内部黑火药储备会发生自燃，引发炮兵在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内爆炸。区域内的每个生物受到[[/r 4d6 #fire]]{4d6火焰伤害}（@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|name:Final Detonation DC|traits:damaging-effect,fire|showDC:gm]{基础反射}豁免；在大失败时，该生物还会被击倒为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}）。

When a mechanical artillerist is reduced to 0 Hit Points, its internal reservoir of black powder cooks off, causing the artillerist to explode in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. Each creature in the area takes [[/r 4d6 #fire]]{4d6 fire damage} (@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|name:Final Detonation DC|traits:damaging-effect,fire|showDC:gm]{basic Reflex} save; on a critical failure, the creature is also knocked @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}).

Sensitive Components.name: 敏感材料 Sensitive Components
Sensitive Components.description:
极端温度会干扰机械炮术师的引擎。当机械炮术师受到寒冷伤害时，它会在1轮内陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} 状态。若它受到火焰伤害，则会在1轮内陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} 状态，并且它可以用其额外动作来执行疾走或打击。在同一轮内受到额外的寒冷或火焰伤害不会加重这些状态。

Extreme temperatures can interfere with a mechanical artillerist's engine. When a mechanical artillerist takes cold damage, it is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round. If it takes fire damage, it is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} for 1 round and it can use its extra action to either Stride or Strike. Additional cold or fire damage in a single round does not increase these conditions.

Shrapnel Blast.name: 破片爆炸 Shrapnel Blast
Shrapnel Blast.description:
炮术师从大口径炮管发射一阵小型弹片，对@Template[type:cone|distance:15]内的每个生物造成[[/r 3d8 #slashing]]{3d8 挥砍伤害}（@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|name:Shrapnel Blast|traits:damaging-effect|showDC:gm]{基础 反射}豁免）。

The artillerist launches a spray of small projectiles from a wide-bore barrel, dealing [[/r 3d8 #slashing]]{3d8 slashing damage} to each creature in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] (@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|name:Shrapnel Blast|traits:damaging-effect|showDC:gm]{basic Reflex} save).

Mechanical Artillerist (Shrapnel Blast).publicNotes:
尽管魔法是许多世界最强军队背后的主导力量，但某些国家在战争方面仍偏好科学、技术或纯粹火力。黑火药和火器或许是当代最重要的技术创新之一，但被称为“机械炮术师”的巨型战争机器，寄望城将成为其中最后的一批。在那些魔法无法使用、不可靠或不受欢迎的战区，机械炮术师是战场上无可争议的霸主。

机械炮术师由整洁的内部机械结构驱动，以稳定节奏引爆受控体积的黑火药。其燃料罐的易爆特性使得一台受损或被摧毁的炮术师几乎与一台完全运作中的一样危险。

虽然最常见的情况是单独遭遇机械炮术师，但它们也可能以小队形式结成群组。在这种情况下，这些构装体通常各自带有一些变体并被赋予特定的战斗职责：一台炮术师被指定为队伍的前锋盾墙，一台被指定为主力突击武器，另一台位于后方，装载多种远程导弹。

各种形状与体型

与其统一的引擎相对，炮术师的外观可以千差万别。许多机械炮术师看起来像螃蟹、熊等动物的棱角分明的金属版本，有时甚至像人类。有些可能仅在一侧配备一排喷壳火炮，而另一些则从四面八方喷吐火焰。

怪物部位子系统

机械炮术师 生物 7

怪物部位 45/100/180 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（重型），盾牌，察觉 物品，技能 物品（运动）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（负能量，正能量），火焰，感官（黑暗视觉），力量，坚固，狂野

Although magic is the predominant force behind many of the world's most powerful militaries, some nations still favor science, technology, or sheer firepower when it comes to warfare. Black powder and firearms may have been some of the most significant technological innovations of the current era, but the massive war machines called mechanical artillerists promise to be among the last. In war zones where magic is impossible, unreliable, or undesirable, mechanical artillerists are the undisputed juggernauts of the battlefield.

Mechanical artillerists are powered by tidy internal mechanisms that detonate controlled volumes of black powder at a steady clip. The volatile nature of its fuel tanks makes a compromised or destroyed artillerist nearly as dangerous as a fully operational one.

Although most commonly encountered in isolation, mechanical artillerists might group together in small squads. In such cases, the constructs usually each bear a few variations and are given specific combat roles, with one artillerist designated as the group's forward shield, one designated as the primary assault weapon, and one in the rear, loaded with a variety of long-range missiles.

All Shapes and Sizes

In contrast to their uniform engines, artillerists' exteriors can vary wildly. Many mechanical artillerists resemble angular, metallic versions of animals such as crabs, bears, and sometimes even humans. Some might bear a single stripe of shell-spewing cannons, while others release gouts of fire from every side.

Monster Part Subsystem

Mechanical Artillerist Creature 7

Monster Parts 45/100/180 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (heavy), shield, perception item, skill items (Athletics)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (negative, positive), fire, sensory (darkvision), strength, sturdy, wild

Salt Glider.name: 盐滑翔者 Salt Glider

Fluidsense (Imprecise) (1 mile).name: 液体感知（不精确）（1英里） Fluidsense (Imprecise) (1 mile)
Fluidsense (Imprecise) (1 mile).description:
盐潜行者能在一英里外侦测到液体，从大片水域到药水，甚至到猎物动物体内的血液。这是一种模糊感官，且盐潜行者无法在大量液体中分辨出较小量的液体。例如，盐潜行者无法用液体感官侦测到藏在湖中的生物，只能侦测到那片湖。

Salt stalkers can detect fluids up to a mile away, from large bodies of water to potions to even the blood in a prey animal's body. This is an imprecise sense, and salt stalkers cannot pick out smaller amounts of liquid within large amounts of liquid. For example, a salt stalker couldn't detect a creature hiding within a lake with fluidsense, only the lake.

Rainsense.name: 雨觉 Rainsense
Rainsense.description:
盐滑翔者能够感知大气压力的细微变化，从而准确预测接下来24小时的天气。

A salt glider can sense minute changes in atmospheric pressure in order to accurately predict the weather for the next 24 hours.

Water Vulnerability.name: 水弱点 Water Vulnerability
Water Vulnerability.description:
水会迅速降解覆盖在盐潜行者身上的棘刺。盐潜行者浸没在水中、被困在暴雨中或以其他方式被淋湿时，会陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}。

能暂时将盐潜行者浇透的法术或效果，例如@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.jfVCuOpzC6mUrf6f]{Hydraulic Push}或一桶水，会使盐潜行者陷入slowed 1，持续[[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}。

只要它以这种方式处于slowed状态，盐潜行者就不能进行棘刺打击。

Water rapidly degrades the spines that cover a salt stalker. A salt stalker immersed in water, stuck in a rain storm, or otherwise soaked is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}.

Spells or effects that temporarily drench a salt stalker, such as @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.jfVCuOpzC6mUrf6f]{Hydraulic Push} or a bucket of water, cause the salt stalker to become slowed 1 for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

As long as it is slowed in this way, a salt stalker cannot make spines Strikes.

Ambush Attackers.name: 伏击攻击者 Ambush Attackers
Ambush Attackers.description:
当两个或更多盐滑翔者与同一个敌人相邻时，盐滑翔者的攻击对该敌人额外造成 [[/r 1d6]]{1d6 伤害}。

When two or more salt gliders are adjacent to the same foe, salt gliders' attacks deal an additional [[/r 1d6]]{1d6 damage} to that foe.

Desiccation Venom.name: 脱水毒液 Desiccation Venom
Desiccation Venom.description:
盐潜者的牙齿与棘刺会注入一种可怕的有毒胆汁，猛烈地令目标脱水，使其更容易受到高温影响。恶心（状态）与对火焰的弱点无法结束或被减少，直到毒素被治愈；

豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24|name:Desiccation Venom DC|traits:injury,poison|showDC:gm]{强韧};

最大持续时间 1小时；

阶段 1 [[/r (2d4+4)[poison]]] 伤害，外加对火焰的弱点3（1分钟）；

阶段 2 [[/r (2d6+4)[poison]]] 伤害，外加对火焰的弱点6（1分钟）；

阶段 3 [[/r (2d8+4)[poison]]] 伤害，外加 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1} 与对火焰的弱点9（10分钟）

A salt stalker's teeth and spines inflict a terrible, toxic bile that violently dehydrates the target, making them more susceptible to heat. The sickened condition and weakness to fire can't end or be reduced until the poison is cured;

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24|name:Desiccation Venom DC|traits:injury,poison|showDC:gm]{Fortitude};

Maximum Duration 1 hour;

Stage 1 [[/r (2d4+4)[poison]]] damage plus weakness to fire 3 (1 minute);

Stage 2 [[/r (2d6+4)[poison]]] damage plus weakness to fire 6 (1 minute);

Stage 3 [[/r (2d8+4)[poison]]] damage plus @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} and weakness to fire 9 (10 minutes)

Fling Spines.name: 甩射棘刺 Fling Spines
Fling Spines.description:
需求 盐滑翔者正在飞行；

效果 盐滑翔者猛烈地甩动身体，向下方的敌人抛射一阵刺针齐射。盐滑翔者进行三次刺针打击，每次针对不同的目标。它的多重攻击减值直到完成全部三次攻击后才会增加。

Requirements The salt glider is flying;

Effect The salt glider whips its body about violently, flinging a volley of spines at enemies below. The salt glider makes three spines Strikes, each against a different target. Its multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after it makes all three attacks.

Gliding Drop.name: 滑翔坠落 Gliding Drop
Gliding Drop.description:
盐滑翔者步行，抓住一个自愿的中型或更小的生物，然后在携带其盟友的情况下飞行至其飞行速度。在这次移动结束时，盐滑翔者将该生物丢到下方的地面上。

被丢下的生物因从该高度坠落而受到的伤害比通常少 10 点。若被携带的生物是盐潜行者，且其落在与一名敌人相邻的位置，它可以花费一个反应动作（）对该生物进行一次近战打击。

盐滑翔者可以借由在一次对抗该生物强韧 DC 的运动学检定中成功，用此能力抓住一个不自愿的生物。若检定失败，盐滑翔者未能抓住该生物，不过它仍然可以完成其移动。

The salt glider Strides, grabs a willing Medium or smaller creature, then Flies up to its fly Speed while carrying its ally. At the end of this movement, the salt glider drops the creature onto the ground below.

The dropped creature takes 10 less damage than usual for a fall from that height. If the carried creature was a salt stalker and it lands adjacent to an enemy, it can spend a reaction to make a melee Strike against that creature.

The salt glider can grab an unwilling creature with this ability by succeeding at an Athletics check against the creature's Fortitude DC. On a failure, the salt glider fails to grab the creature, though it can still finish its movement.

Sand Stilts.name: 沙行高跷 Sand Stilts
Sand Stilts.description:
盐滑翔者在沙质沙漠中无视困难地形。

Salt gliders ignore difficult terrain in sandy deserts.

Salt Glider.publicNotes:
盐翔者高悬在苍白的沙漠天空之上，作为其盐潜袭者群的远视之眼。经验丰富的沙漠旅人会将盐翔者视为迫近的盐潜袭者攻击的先兆。在大多数情况下，仅仅看到盐翔者就意味着可能已经太迟了。

盐潜袭者本就拥有诡异地薄、呈膜状的外皮，而盐翔者将这一特征推向了极致。凭借其昆虫般的翅膀、细长的腿与鼓胀的红眼，人们完全可能把远处的盐翔者误认作一只特大号的蚊子或会飞的白蚁。然而近距离观察时，盐翔者与其同样异质的盐潜袭者同族之间的联系——无论多么扭曲或怪物化——都几乎不会让人怀疑。

在陆地上，盐翔者能将翅膀卷成紧实的管状，并在其上保持平衡，像踩着怪诞高跷般行走。尽管如此，它们修长而笨拙的躯干使得基于陆地的移动十分困难，因此盐翔者几乎总是选择飞行。同样的躯干既轻巧又柔韧，使盐翔者能将脊柱甩动到其他盐潜袭者两倍之远——当它们自上方骚扰猎物时，会频繁使用这一战术。

盐翔者对其群体的用处并不只在战斗方面。它们翅膀上的微小丝状物让盐翔者能以惊人的精确度侦测天气模式的变化，并以尖锐、嘶哑的吠声将信息传递给同族。只要稍有逼近的降雨或沙暴的迹象，盐翔者就会飞向掩蔽处。精明的沙漠流浪者若看到盐翔者撤退，便能相当可靠地断定恶劣天气已在地平线之外。

空投

在混合狩猎群中，盐翔者以喜欢把同伴抬起并运送穿越战场而闻名，尽管它们只能在短距离内做到这一点。此能力显著提升所有参与其中的盐潜袭者的机动性，并使该群体能够发动令人胆寒的突然袭击。

盐潜袭者

盐潜袭者是狡猾的伏击型掠食者，依靠群体战术来骚扰并耗尽猎物；其猎物包括任何愚蠢到足以穿行于盐潜袭者所盘踞沙漠地带的动物。盐潜袭者只栖息在最炎热、最干燥的沙漠中，那里几乎无人敢于踏足。在这些不宜居的沙海之中，甚至连一株仙人掌都无法扎根，盐潜袭者却能繁盛兴旺。

与几乎所有其他生命形态不同，盐潜袭者将水视为禁忌。若它们试图消化液体，其异质的解剖结构便会剧烈排斥；因此盐潜袭者依赖严格的脱水肉类食性。对它们而言幸运的是，盐潜袭者不同寻常的生物学特性也使其能轻易将湿食物晾干：盐潜袭者的咬击会注入强效的吸湿性毒液，在数分钟内就会让受害的生物显著脱水。一旦毒素完成作用，狩猎群中的盐潜袭者便会发出可怖的嚎叫，向其余同族示意该享用盛宴了。

怪物部位子系统

盐翔者 生物 8

怪物部位 64/140/250 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍），护甲（轻型），察觉物品，技能物品（特技动作、运动、隐匿、生存）

符合条件的灌注属性 bane，dexterity，energy resistant（positive），poison，wild，winged，wisdom

Salt gliders loom high overhead in pale desert skies, acting as the far-seeing eyes of their salt stalker packs. Experienced desert travelers recognize a salt glider as the herald of an impending salt stalker attack. In most cases, the mere sight of a salt glider indicates that it may already be too late.

Whereas salt stalkers already have eerily thin, membranous hides, salt gliders take this attribute to its extreme. With their insectile wings, spindly legs, and bulging red eyes, one could be forgiven for mistaking a distant salt glider for an oversized mosquito or flying termite. Up close, however, a salt glider leaves little doubt as to its relation, however warped or monstrous, to its similarly alien salt stalker kin.

On land, salt gliders can roll up their wings into tight tubes and balance on them to walk about like grotesque stilts. Nevertheless, their long, clumsy torsos makes land-based movement difficult, so salt gliders almost always choose to fly. This same torso is light and flexible enough that salt gliders can whip their spines up to twice as far as other salt stalkers—a tactic they make frequent use of as they harry their prey from above.

Salt gliders' usefulness toward their pack extends beyond just combat. Tiny filaments on their wings allow gliders to detect changes in weather patterns with incredible accuracy, and they relay this information to their kin with sharp, rasping barks. A salt glider flies for cover at the merest hint of encroaching rain or sandstorm. Canny desert wanderers who spot salt gliders on the retreat can reliably bet that foul weather is just over the horizon.

Air Drops

In mixed hunting packs, salt gliders famously enjoy lifting and carrying their pack mates across the battlefield, though they can only do so for short distances. This ability dramatically enhances the maneuverability of all salt stalkers involved and enables the pack to conduct harrowing surprise attacks.

Salt Stalker

Salt stalkers are cunning ambush predators that rely on pack tactics in order to harry and exhaust their prey, which includes any animal foolhardy enough to wander through salt stalkers' stretch of desert. Salt stalkers live in only the hottest and driest deserts, where few people even dare to go. In these uninhabitable sandscapes, where even a single cactus fails to take root, salt stalkers flourish.

Unlike nearly every other form of life, salt stalkers regard water as anathema. Their alien anatomy violently revolts if they so much as try to digest fluids, and so salt stalkers rely on a strict diet of dehydrated meat. Fortunately for them, salt stalkers' unusual biology also makes it easy for them to dry out wet food: a salt stalker's bite injects a potent hygroscopic venom, dramatically dehydrating afflicted creatures in a matter of minutes. Once the poison has done its work, the salt stalkers in the hunting pack howl terribly, signaling to the rest of their kin that it's time to feast.

Monster Part Subsystem

Salt Glider Creature 8

Monster Parts 64/140/250 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), poison, wild, winged, wisdom

Ardeodaemon.name: 炎狱魔神 Ardeodaemon

Ash Fever.name: 灰烬热病 Ash Fever
Ash Fever.description:
焚尸魔的爪子留下的灰烬残渣会感染生物和物体，使其更容易被点燃。

被焚尸魔的爪子打击造成伤害的生物必须在一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20|name:Ash Fever DC|traits:curse, divine|showDC:gm]{Fortitude} 豁免中成功。受到焚尸魔爪子伤害的物体会自动在其豁免中失败，并在完整持续时间内承受一次失败的效果。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物获得火焰弱点 4。这会持续 1 分钟，或直到某个生物以一次成功的 @Check[type:medicine|dc:20|name:Clean Wound DC|showDC:gm]{Medicine} 检定清理伤口为止，以先发生者为准。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但火焰弱点 8。

Ashy residue from the ardeodaemon's claws infect creatures and objects, making them more susceptible to burning.

A creature damaged by the ardeodaemon's claw Strike must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20|name:Ash Fever DC|traits:curse, divine|showDC:gm]{Fortitude} save. Objects that take damage from ardeodaemon's claws automatically fails its save and suffers the effects of a failure for the full duration.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature gains fire weakness 4. This lasts for 1 minute or until a creature makes a successful @Check[type:medicine|dc:20|name:Clean Wound DC|showDC:gm]{Medicine} check to clean the wound, whichever comes first.

Critical Failure As failure, but fire weakness 8.

Burning Resin.name: 燃烧树脂 Burning Resin
Burning Resin.description:
阿尔德奥魔吐出一团燃烧的树脂，覆盖30尺内的一个5尺方格。该团块在该方格中制造一处火焰，并会蔓延至任何相邻且包含可燃材料的方格。若燃料耗尽，火焰会在3轮后熄灭。

任何在其回合开始时处于火焰中，或试图穿过火焰移动的生物，都必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:20|name:Burning Resin DC|traits:divine, evocation, fire|showDC:gm]{反射} 豁免，否则受到 [[/r 4d6[fire]]]{4d6 火焰伤害} 并受到 [[/r 2[persistent,fire]]] 伤害。

阿尔德奥魔在 [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮} 内无法再次使用燃烧树脂。

The ardeodaemon vomits out a glob of burning resin, covering a single 5-foot square within 30 feet. The glob creates a fire in the square that spreads to any adjacent squares containing flammable material. If it runs out of fuel, the fire burns out in 3 rounds.

Any creature that starts its turn or attempts to move through the fire must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:20|name:Burning Resin DC|traits:divine, evocation, fire|showDC:gm]{Reflex} save or take [[/r 4d6[fire]]]{4d6 fire damage} and [[/r 2[persistent,fire]]] damage.

The ardeodaemon can't use Burning Resin again for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Flame Jump.name: 烈焰跃迁 Flame Jump
Flame Jump.description:
对一只焚狱魔而言，所有火焰都是相连的；

需求 焚狱魔邻接一处小型或更大的火焰；

效果 焚狱魔跃入火焰之中，并毫发无伤地在紧邻该火焰或100英尺内任意其他小型或更大的火焰旁的一处未被占据的空间中现身。

To an ardeodaemon, all fires are connected;

Requirements The ardeodaemon is adjacent to a Small or larger fire;

Effect The ardeodaemon leaps into the flames and emerges unscathed in an unoccupied space next to that fire or any other Small or larger fire within 100 feet.

定位术 Locate.name: 定位术 Locate
定位术 Locate.description:
你了解目标的方位（如果你选择一个特定物品，例如 "我母亲的剑") 或者最近的目标（如果你选择一类物品，例如 "剑")。如果目标是特定物体，你必须曾经通过你自身的感官观察过它。如果是一类物体，你仍然需要有该类物体的精确内心印象。如果你和目标之间有铅或者流动的水，该法术无法定位该物体。这意味着你可能找一类物体时，因为最近的那个在铅或者流动的水后面，而获得较远的结果。

升阶（5环级） 你能以一个特定生物或者族裔为目标，而不是物体。但你必须遇见过或者近距看过你想要作为目标的生物或者族裔。

敲击术 Knock.name: 敲击术 Knock
敲击术 Knock.description:
你令目标更容易被打开。敲击术赋予任何通过运动或者贼活检定尝试打开目标门、锁或者容器的生物+4状态加值。你能以施放敲击术的一部分，尝试一次贼活检定来打开目标，并且即使你未受训也加上你的等级。

敲击术反制@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Azoh0BSoCASrA1lr]{固锁术 Lock}。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.OSapCU8heNHst21y]{法术效果：敲击术}

侦测阵营 Detect Alignment (随意施法) (仅限善良).name: 侦测阵营 Detect Alignment (随意施法) (仅限善良)
侦测阵营 Detect Alignment (随意施法) (仅限善良).description:
当你感受到阵营灵光时，视野中会闪动光芒。选择混乱，邪恶，善良或者秩序。你侦测该阵营的灵光。你不会获得存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择不侦测你知晓已经有该阵营的生物或者效果。

只有6或者更高等级的生物具有阵营灵光——除非是神术施法者，不死生物，或者外层位面（Outer Sphere的存在）。

升阶（2环级） 你能了解到各个灵光的位置和强度。

固锁术 Lock.name: 固锁术 Lock
固锁术 Lock.description:
目标的锁结构闭合锁住，且被不可见的魔法防护紧紧压住。当你用魔法锁住一个目标时，你设定一个用以开启它的运动或者贼活DC，等于你的法术DC或者基础锁DC+4状态加值，取较高者。任何本来能够开启被本法术影响的锁的钥匙或者密码组在法术持续时间中无法开启该锁，但该钥匙或者组合会在开启该锁的检定上赋予+4环境加值。如果目标被开启，法术结束。如果目标没有被另外阻碍或者锁住，你可以在接触该目标时，通过一个交互动作解锁并开启它。这不会结束该法术。你可以在任何时间，任何距离解消该法术。

升阶（2环级） 持续时间无限，但你必须花费6gp的贵金属作为额外消耗。

侦测魔法 Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
侦测魔法 Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

燃火术 Produce Flame.name: 燃火术 Produce Flame
燃火术 Produce Flame.description:
一小团火焰在你的手心产生，你可以通过近战或者远程将其射出。进行一次法术攻击骰，对抗你的目标的AC。这通常是一次远程攻击，但是你也可以对你无武装触及中的生物尝试一次近战攻击。

在成功时，你造成2d4火焰伤害。在大成功时，目标承受双倍伤害，以及@Damage[(@item.level)d4[persistent,fire]]伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d4，以及重击时的持续伤害增加1d4。

Ardeodaemon.publicNotes:
所有天灾魔都在寻求让世界变得不如其本来面貌，但没有谁比烬噬天灾魔更为专注。据说它们由那些在骇人火灾中死去之人的堕落灵魂形成，这些所谓的“食灰者”会寻找机会与地点，让它们的火焰造成悲惨且不可替代的伤害。待收割的田地、拥挤的公寓楼、繁忙的图书馆，都是烬噬天灾魔纵火的偏好目标。若不受干预，烬噬天灾魔会在行动前侦察其目标数日，找出最能放大一星火花或一场集中烈焰后果的方式。当它们并非为纵火而纵火时，烬噬天灾魔会寻找更强大、具备火焰能力且可供其效力的生物，不过它们始终怀着把主人引向自身破坏性目标的念头。

烬噬天灾魔若有可能会避免正面冲突，更倾向于用其燃烧树脂点燃火焰，将火势助长到足以确保毁灭的程度，然后在远处旁观这场大火。然而，只要有人试图扑灭或闷熄它们的火焰，烬噬天灾魔总能找到意志去凶狠地攻击对方。

炽焰表亲

颇能说明问题的是：烬噬天灾魔相对常见且地位低微，而其地狱亲族——普拉高斯——却是地狱中最强大的魔鬼之一。这揭示了它们起源上的根本差异：一场大火可以夺走许多邪恶凡人的性命，而这些人随后会化为烬噬天灾魔。相反，一个注定会成为普拉高斯的纵火犯，只需一簇恰到好处的火焰就能夺走上千条性命。

怪物部件子系统

烬噬天灾魔（火焰天灾魔）生物 4

怪物部件 12/27/50 gp

可用精炼 武器（挥砍），护甲（轻型，中型），察觉物品，技能物品（特技，运动，宗教，隐匿，求生）

可用灌注属性 破敌，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（火焰，正能量），邪恶，火焰，精神，感官（黑暗视觉），法术（神术：侦测阵营，侦测魔法，敲击术，定位术，锁闭术，制造火焰），原野，感知

All daemons seek to make the world less than it is, but none are more keenly focused than ardeodaemons. Believed to be formed from the corrupted souls of those who died in horrific fires, these so-called ash eaters seek opportunities and places where their flames can cause tragic and irreplaceable damage. Fields ready for the harvest, crowded tenement buildings, and busy libraries are favored targets for an ardeodaemon's arson. If left to their own devices, ardeodaemons scout out their targets for days before acting, finding the best ways to maximize the consequences of a single spark or a concentrated blaze. When not pursuing arson for arson's sake, ardeodaemons seek out stronger creatures with fire abilities whom they can serve, though always with the hopes of steering their masters toward their own destructive goals.

Ardeodaemons avoid confrontation if possible, preferring to set fires with their burning resin, stoke the flames long enough that doom is assured, then watch the conflagration from afar. However, an ardeodaemon always finds the will to fiercely attack anyone attempting to douse or suffocate their fires.

Fiery Cousins

It is telling that the ardeodaemon is a relatively common and lowly daemon, whereas its infernal kin, the puragaus, is one of the most powerful devils in Hell. This speaks to the fundamental differences in their origins: A single blaze can claim the lives of many evil mortals who then become ardeodaemons. Conversely, a single arsonist destined to become a puragaus can claim a thousand lives with just one well-placed flame.

Monster Part Subsystem

Ardeodaemon (Fire Daemon) Creature 4

Monster Parts 12/27/50 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (slashing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Religion, Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (fire, positive), evil, fire, mental, sensory (darkvision), spells (Divine: detect alignment, detect magic, knock, locate, lock, produce flame), wild, wisdom

Dredgenaut.name: 无畏挖掘者 Dredgenaut

高等黑暗视觉 Greater Darkvision.name: 高等黑暗视觉 Greater Darkvision

回溯过去 Retrocognition.name: 回溯过去 Retrocognition
回溯过去 Retrocognition.description:
你开启神识以接受心灵回响，并获得过去在你所在位置发生的事情的印象。回溯过去会显示从前一天到法术持续时间前一分钟所发生事件的心灵印象，然后会显示再前一天到再前一分钟，以此类推。这些回响并不会如图像一般展现，但是会展示一些表现此时的情绪和对过去情况的晦涩暗示的印象。如果你通过一个印象看到了痛苦或混乱的事件，你必须通过一个DC30甚至50的意志豁免，由该时间的严重程度决定，否则该法术结束。GM决定该时间是否痛苦，并决定该DC。

升阶（8环级） 你每分钟专注会获得在之前一年发生的事件的印象，而不是之前一天的，但细节非常模糊，令你更难从所有事件中找到最为重要的那个。

升阶（9环级） 你每分钟专注会获得在之前一世纪发生的事件的印象，而不是之前一天的，但细节非常模糊，令你更难从所有事件中找到最为重要的那个。

震荡图纹 Vibrant Pattern.name: 震荡图纹 Vibrant Pattern
震荡图纹 Vibrant Pattern.description:
你创造一个由剧烈跳动的光芒组成的图纹。在图纹中的生物 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩 Dazzled} 。除此之外，在你施放时处于图纹中的生物，进入图纹中的生物，在图纹中结束回合的生物，或者对图纹使用搜索或者交互动作的生物在此时必须尝试一次意志豁免。已经被图纹所 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲 Blinded} 的生物无需尝试新的豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 图纹令该生物目盲。如果它离开了图纹，在它每个回合结束时，它可以尝试一次新的豁免，以从目盲状态中回复，此处最大持续时间为1分钟。

大失败 该生物目盲，持续1分钟。

定位术 Locate.name: 定位术 Locate
定位术 Locate.description:
你了解目标的方位（如果你选择一个特定物品，例如 "我母亲的剑") 或者最近的目标（如果你选择一类物品，例如 "剑")。如果目标是特定物体，你必须曾经通过你自身的感官观察过它。如果是一类物体，你仍然需要有该类物体的精确内心印象。如果你和目标之间有铅或者流动的水，该法术无法定位该物体。这意味着你可能找一类物体时，因为最近的那个在铅或者流动的水后面，而获得较远的结果。

升阶（5环级） 你能以一个特定生物或者族裔为目标，而不是物体。但你必须遇见过或者近距看过你想要作为目标的生物或者族裔。

窥视魔眼 Prying Eye.name: 窥视魔眼 Prying Eye
窥视魔眼 Prying Eye.description: 你在你能看见的500尺范围内，创造一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}、漂浮的、直径1寸的眼睛。它如你通常的视觉感官，能看见所有的方向，并且会持续将其所见传送给你。每轮你第一次维持该法术时，你可以移动该眼睛30尺，且只看见眼睛前方的事物，或者移动其10尺，但能看到周围所有方向的事物。眼睛移动离开你能到达的距离没有限制，但是当你和眼睛不再处于相同的位面时，法术立即结束。你如果你想通过眼睛尝试察觉检定，你可以通过眼睛尝试搜索动作。对眼睛造成的任何伤害会摧毁它并结束该法术。

真视术 True Seeing (常驻法术).name: 真视术 True Seeing (常驻法术)
真视术 True Seeing (常驻法术).description: 你可以看见60尺内的事物的本来面貌。GM秘密骰反制检定，对抗区域中的所有幻术或者变形效果，但这只会决定你是否能看破它（例如，如果该检定成功对抗了一个变形法术，你可以看见该生物的本来形态，但你不会结束该变形法术）。

Calamity Vent.name: 灾厄喷口 Calamity Vent
Calamity Vent.description:
疏浚无畏者迅速烧毁其体内储存的一部分该死的超自然证据，然后从遍布全身的排气口释放出炽热的、灌注了时代的能量。每个处于@Template[type:burst|distance:30]内的生物都会受到[[/r {6d8[fire],6d8[mental]}]]{6d8火焰与6d8心灵伤害}（@Check[type:reflex|dc:34|name:Calamity Vent DC|traits:damaging-effect,arcane,evocation,fire,mental,time|showDC:gm]{基础反射}豁免）。

受影响的生物会立刻每承受2点心灵伤害就老化1之年。

The dredgenaut rapidly burns off some of the damning supernatural evidence stored in its body, then releases the fiery, time-infused energy from vents all over its body. Each creature in a @Template[type:burst|distance:30] takes [[/r {6d8[fire],6d8[mental]}]]{6d8 fire and 6d8 mental damage} (@Check[type:reflex|dc:34|name:Calamity Vent DC|traits:damaging-effect,arcane,evocation,fire,mental,time|showDC:gm]{basic Reflex} save).

Affected creatures instantly age 1 year per 2 mental damage taken.

Inexorable March.name: 无情进军 Inexorable March
Inexorable March.description:
疏浚巨械以其速度进行步行，在移动进入每个生物的空间时将其推开，且若它们试图阻止其移动则会对其造成伤害。

生物可以通过在一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:38|name:Inexorable March DC|traits:damaging-effect|showDC:gm]{强韧} 豁免中成功来尝试拦住去路。若为大成功或大失败中的大成功，抵抗的生物不受伤害；否则，它会如同被疏浚巨械的脚击中一般受到伤害。

The dredgenaut Strides up to its Speed, pushing back each creature whose space it moves into and damaging them if they try to stop its movement.

A creature can attempt to bar the way by succeeding at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:38|name:Inexorable March DC|traits:damaging-effect|showDC:gm]{Fortitude} save. On a critical success, the resisting creature takes no damage; otherwise, it is damaged as if hit by the dredgenaut's foot.

Temporal Trauma.name: 时间创伤 Temporal Trauma
Temporal Trauma.description:
当被浓缩、作为燃料燃烧并排放时，由疏浚巨械收集的证据会如一波心灵创伤般席卷活生物，并扰乱时代本身的流动。

任何被疏浚巨械的时序光束打击所造成伤害的生物，会立刻每承受2点精神伤害便衰老1之年（例如，承受20点精神伤害的生物会衰老10之年）。

When condensed, burned as fuel, and vented, evidence collected by a dredgenaut washes over living creatures as a wave of psychic trauma and disruption to the flow of time itself.

Any creature damaged by a dredgenaut's chrono beam Strike instantly ages 1 year per 2 mental damage taken (for example, a creature that takes 20 mental damage ages 10 years).

Dredgenaut.publicNotes:
第一台掘证机本应是最后一台。传说中，它由一个绝望的社群制造；该社群腐败的领导层长期以某桩古老罪行之名剥夺民众的公正。社群的拾荒者收集废金属与往昔美好时代的小饰物，然后将一切熔铸在一起，造出一个构装体，用以揭露那桩古老罪行的充分证据，并迫使领导者承认其暴行。然而，领导者设法盗走了掘证机，并利用这具强大的构装体追猎其创造者。这些才华横溢的发明家之尖叫声，数里之外仍清晰可闻。于是，制造掘证机的秘密也就为众人所知。

掘证机是一种由废金属制成、以奥术有毒径流为燃料的强大构装体。强大的国家与私营公司用掘证机在战场与毁坏的城市中拖曳搜寻犯罪证据——无论是敌人的还是自己的。为收集证据，掘证机会拾起值得注意的物品或生物，并将其丢入它脸上的孔口，将其“吞下”以备之后投放。由于尚未完全明了的原因，掘证机尤其容易收集超自然或具有心灵共鸣的证据；这类证据一旦被摧毁，便会对附近的活生物造成剧烈的衰老效果。

孤注一掷

尽管其主要目标是收集证据，但有时掘证机必须暂时放弃该任务以确保自身安全。通过重新配置内部各种道具与管路，掘证机可以将已收集的证据从储存舱导入其引擎核心，使引擎在魔法物品、被困的灵体以及其他秘 occult 现象在构装体体内分解时过热。随后，掘证机可以通过其面部发射一道“时流光束”，或通过从其身体排放能量而释放这股多余能量，形成一次突如其来的爆发。

怪物部件子系统

掘证机 生物 14

怪物部件 560/1,250/2,300 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、挥砍），护甲（重型），盾牌，察觉物品，技能物品（运动）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌，体质，能量抗性（负能量、正能量），火焰，心灵，感官（高等黑暗视觉，真知），法术（奥术：定位，窥探眼，回溯知觉，真知，鲜明图案），力量，坚固，野性

The first dredgenaut was supposed to be the last. It was made, so the legend goes, by a desperate community whose corrupt leadership had long denied its people justice for some ancient crime. The scavengers of the community collected scrap metal and trinkets of better times, then fused everything to create a construct that would uncover ample evidence of the ancient crime and force the leaders to acknowledge their atrocities. Yet, the leaders managed to steal the dredgenaut and use the powerful construct to track down its creators. The screams of these talented inventors could be heard for miles around. And so it was that the secrets of creating dredgenauts were revealed to all.

A dredgenaut is a powerful construct made of scrap metal and fueled by arcane toxic runoff. Powerful nations and private companies use dredgenauts to trawl for criminal evidence-either their enemies' or their own-in battlefields and ruined cities. To collect evidence, the dredgenaut picks up noteworthy items or creatures and drops them into the aperture on its face, "swallowing" them for later deposit. For reasons not entirely understood, dredgenauts are particularly prone to collecting supernatural or psychically resonant evidence that, when destroyed, can have dramatic aging effects on nearby living creatures.

Desperate Measures

Though its primary objective is to gather evidence, sometimes a dredgenaut must temporarily forego this mission in order to ensure its own safety. By reconfiguring various internal gears and tubes, the dredgenaut can funnel collected evidence from its storage compartments into its engine core, causing the engine to overheat as magic items, trapped spirits, and other occult phenomena break down in the construct's body. The dredgenaut can then release this excess energy either via a "chrono beam" from its face or by venting the energy from its body in a sudden burst.

Monster Part Subsystem

Dredgenaut Creature 14

Monster Parts 560/1,250/2,300 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, slashing), armor (heavy), shield, perception item, skill items (Athletics)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, energy resistant (negative, positive), fire, mental, sensory (greater darkvision, true seeing), spells (Arcane: locate, prying eye, retrocognition, true seeing, vibrant pattern), strength, sturdy, wild

Fungal Raptor.name: 真菌迅猛龙 Fungal Raptor

灵敏嗅觉 (模糊感官) 60 尺.name: 灵敏嗅觉 (模糊感官) 60 尺

Curse of Blood.name: 鲜血诅咒 Curse of Blood
Curse of Blood.description:
接触洁净的血液会伤害真菌迅猛龙。每当迅猛龙5英尺内的一个生物受到穿刺或挥砍伤害（包括来自迅猛龙自身攻击的伤害）时，真菌迅猛龙受到[[/r 2d4[poison]]]伤害。

然而，当前受血腥疾病影响的生物不会触发此效果。

Contact with clean blood harms a fungal raptor. Each time a creature within 5 feet of the raptor takes piercing or slashing damage (including from the raptor's own attacks), the fungal raptor takes [[/r 2d4[poison]]] damage.

However, creatures currently affected by sanguinary disease do not trigger this effect.

Diseased Wake.name: 病疫尾流 Diseased Wake
Diseased Wake.description:
真菌迅猛龙以其飞行速度飞行至多其飞行速度距离，展开双翼，将其下方至多15英尺的区域覆盖上致命孢子。孢子持续1分钟。除真菌迅猛龙以外的生物透过孢子观察时，其视觉察觉检定承受-2环境减值。

任何在其回合开始时处于孢子区域内的生物，或穿过充满孢子的空间的生物，都必须对迅猛龙的血腥疾病进行豁免。

The fungal raptor flies up to its fly Speed, spreading its wings and coating the area up to 15 feet below with deadly spores. The spores last for 1 minute. Creatures other than the fungal raptor looking through the spores take a -2 circumstance penalty to visual Perception checks.

Any creature that starts its turn in the area of the spores or moves through a spore-ridden space must save against the raptor's sanguinary disease.

Sanguinary Disease.name: 血腥疾病 Sanguinary Disease
Sanguinary Disease.description:
无血生物免疫。恶心（状态）不会自行改善，直到疾病被治愈。

豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24|name:Sanguinary Disease DC|traits:disease|showDC:gm]{Fortitude};

阶段 1 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1小时）；

阶段 2 恶心 1 且 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 1}（[[/br 1d4 #hours]]{1d4小时}）；

阶段 3 恶心 1 且 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 2}（[[/br 2d4 #hours]]{2d4小时}）；

阶段 4 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}（1天）；

阶段 5 死亡

Bloodless creatures are immune. The sickened condition does not improve on its own until the disease is cured.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24|name:Sanguinary Disease DC|traits:disease|showDC:gm]{Fortitude};

Stage 1 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 hour);

Stage 2 sickened 1 and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} ([[/br 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 hours});

Stage 3 sickened 1 and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} ([[/br 2d4 #hours]]{2d4 hours});

Stage 4 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (1 day);

Stage 5 dead

偷袭 Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
偷袭 Sneak Attack.description: 该生物的打击对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]的生物造成额外1d6精准伤害。

Fungal Raptor.publicNotes:
对未经训练的眼睛来说，真菌猛禽起初看起来像是一具患病的鸟类骷髅（特征）。然而事实上，这种丑陋的生物是一种自然形成的空气传播真菌，会长成猛禽的形状。

不知为何，真菌猛禽获得了足够的智慧，能够模仿其同名飞行掠食者的形态。真菌猛禽会成群狩猎黑暗的森林与潮湿的沼泽，利用它们病变的翅膀制造瘟疫迷宫，将猎物驱赶得更深入它们的领地。一旦目标彻底迷失方向并走投无路，真菌猛禽便伏击猎物，用一种独特的嗜血疾病感染受害者，然后退回树丛中等待无助的受害者因失血而死。和真正的食腐者一样，真菌猛禽从不吞食活体猎物；更重要的是，新鲜血液本身会伤害真菌猛禽——绝望的防卫者或许会试图利用这一点来取得优势。

与大多数真菌一样，真菌猛禽会在阴冷、光线昏暗的区域（例如地城、洞窟与废墟）中绽放并生长，因此对洞穴探险者与寻宝的冒险者而言是常见威胁。此外，具有领地意识的德鲁伊有时会刻意培育真菌猛禽，以保护他们的原初领地。

孢子携带者

最初的真菌猛禽由一位痴迷于腐烂、朽坏与重生循环（尤其是腐烂与朽坏部分）的吸血鬼德鲁伊创造。自那以后，真菌猛禽利用孢子繁殖传播到已知世界各地。许多在林地中跋涉的冒险者在不知不觉间被藏在头顶树上的真菌猛禽洒落孢子，随后将猛禽的后代带往四面八方。

怪物部位子系统

真菌猛禽 生物 6

怪物部位 30/65/125 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（轻型）、察觉物品、技能物品（杂技、运动、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 bane、constitution、dexterity、energy resistant（positive）、sensory（darkvision、scent）、wild、winge

To the untrained eye, a fungal raptor initially appears to be a disease-ridden avian skeleton. In fact, however, this unsightly creature is a naturally occurring airborne fungus that grows in the shape of a bird of prey.

Somehow, fungal raptors have gained enough intelligence to imitate the forms of their namesake flying predators. Packs of fungal raptors hunt dark forests and damp swamps, using their diseased wings to drive prey deeper into their territory by creating a maze of pestilence. Once a target is thoroughly disoriented and lost, the fungal raptors ambush their prey, infect their victim with a unique blood-devouring disease, and then retreat into the trees where they wait for their helpless victims to succumb to exsanguination. Like true carrion feeders, fungal raptors never eat live prey, but even more importantly, fresh blood itself is harmful to fungal raptors-a fact desperate defenders might try to use to their advantage.

Like most fungi, fungal raptors blossom and grow in dank, dimly lit areas such as dungeons, grottos, and ruins, making them a common threat to spelunkers and treasure-hunting adventurers. In addition, territorial druids sometimes purposefully cultivate fungal raptors to protect their primal demesnes.

Spore Carriers

The first fungal raptors were created by a vampiric druid obsessed with the cycle of rot, decay, and rebirth (particularly the rot and decay parts). Since then, fungal raptors have spread throughout the known world utilizing sporal reproduction. Many woods- traipsing adventurers have unknowingly been sprinkled with the spores of a fungal raptor hiding in the trees above, only to carry the raptor's progeny far and wide.

Monster Part Subsystem

Fungal Raptor Creature 6

Monster Parts 30/65/125 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), sensory (darkvision, scent), wild, winge

Mechanical Maître d'.name: 机械主管侍者 Mechanical Maître d'
Mechanical Maître d'.tokenName: 机械领班 Mechanical Maître d'

Part of the Architecture.name: 建筑的一部分 Part of the Architecture
Part of the Architecture.description:
需求 机械领位员处于城市环境中；

效果 由于某种构造或魔法的巧妙手段，机械领位员能与城市环境天衣无缝地融为一体。直到它下一次行动之前，机械领位员看起来像是一座不起眼的半身像、立柱或其他环境的一部分。它在以建筑的一部分冒充时，其欺瞒检定与DC具有25的自动结果。

Requirements The mechanical maître d' is in an urban environment;

Effect Thanks to some trick of construction or magic, the mechanical maître d' blends in seamlessly with urban environments. Until the next time it acts, the mechanical maître d' appears to be a nondescript bust, pillar, or other part of the environment. It has an automatic result of 25 on Deception checks and DCs to pass as a part of the architecture.

Prepare and Serve.name: 准备并上菜 Prepare and Serve
Prepare and Serve.description:
机械领位从其躯干隔间取出一份注入魔法的食物与饮品，然后伸出手臂将餐点递给15英尺内的一名生物。生物可以以互动使用此食物来食用它。当其这样做时，该生物获得以下效果之一，由机械领位在使用“准备并上菜”时选择。

  • 食用者恢复[[/r 4d8 #Hit Points]]{4d8 生命值}。
  • 食用者在攻击掷骰、察觉检定、豁免和技能检定上获得+1状态加值。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-bestiary-effects.uKIfzjkMVXqr9Mpo]{效果：准备并上菜 - 战斗增益}

  • 食用者在变为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]{负荷过重}之前可以额外携带3负载，且其最大携带上限增加6负载。
  • 食用者的速度获得+10英尺状态加值。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-bestiary-effects.JYejjAkNWf8eiIme]{效果：准备并上菜 - 速度加值}

除恢复生命值外，每个效果持续1小时。生物一旦吃过一道菜，就会在1小时内免疫机械领位的魔法食物。

机械领位一次最多可储存12份食物与饮品。机械领位的躯干隔间会自动对放入其中的任何食物施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.rdTEF1hfAWbN58NE]{强化食物}。

The mechanical maître d' retrieves a serving of magic-infused food and drink from its torso compartment, then extends its arm to give the dish to a creature within 15 feet. A creature can Interact with this food to consume it. When it does so, the creature gains one of the following effects, which is chosen by the mechanical maître d' at the time of using Prepare and Serve.

  • The eater regains [[/r 4d8 #Hit Points]]{4d8 Hit Points}.
  • The eater gains a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception checks, saving throws, and skill checks.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-bestiary-effects.uKIfzjkMVXqr9Mpo]{Effect: Prepare and Serve - Combat Buff}

  • The eater can carry an additional 3 Bulk before becoming @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]{Encumbered}, and its maximum carrying limit is increased by 6 Bulk.
  • The eater gains a +10-foot status bonus to Speed.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-bestiary-effects.JYejjAkNWf8eiIme]{Effect: Prepare and Serve - Speed Bonus}

Except for regaining Hit Points, each effect lasts for 1 hour. Once it has eaten a dish, a creature is immune to the mechanical maître d's magical food for 1 hour.

A mechanical maître d' can store up to 12 servings of food and drink at a time. The mechanical maître d's torso compartment automatically casts @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.rdTEF1hfAWbN58NE]{Enhance Victuals} on any food placed inside.

Noxious Gases.name: 有毒气体 Noxious Gases
Noxious Gases.description:
频率 每小时一次；

效果 机械 maître d' 从其食物废弃物舱中排出一团腐臭的气体云，形成以其自身为中心的 @Template[type:burst|distance:20]。任何在云中开始其回合的生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:25|name:Noxious Gases DC|traits:conjuration, poison|showDC:gm]{强韧} 豁免，否则变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（大失败则为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}）。

该云团在 1 分钟后消散，或一旦暴露于强风中即消散（例如来自 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.g8QqHpv2CWDwmIm1]{造风术} 法术）。

Frequency once per hour;

Effect The mechanical maître d' vents a cloud of putrid gas from its food waste compartment in a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] centered on itself. A creature that starts its turn in the cloud must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:25|name:Noxious Gases DC|traits:conjuration, poison|showDC:gm]{Fortitude} save or become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure).

This cloud dissipates after 1 minute or once exposed to strong winds (such as from a @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.g8QqHpv2CWDwmIm1]{Gust of Wind} spell).

Mechanical Maître d'.publicNotes:
部分为主人、部分为侍从，机械领班最常见于奢华餐厅的门厅要位，或是高级饮酒场所的吧台后方。无论它栖身何处，这名领班都会令所有与之相遇者目眩神迷、心生愉悦，并以无可挑剔且潇洒自如的方式为其主人效劳。

机械领班通常依照创造者的相貌制造，但体型略大，且有着结实的躯干，专为盛放满盘佳肴与盛满葡萄酒和清水的杯盏而设计。每根手指中都储存着调味香草，而领班还能伸展其双腿与双臂，以便更好地触及热切的顾客。

冷盘最宜

尽管其主要职责是在繁忙的旅店或酒吧维持秩序，机械领班也同样负责宾客的安全。若其顾客受到威胁，机械领班可以挥舞原本用于备餐的刀叉，将其化作致命武器。在更为险恶的情势下，这具构装体还能从体内储存的厨余中排出恶臭气体，使敌人反胃作呕，争取足够时间让顾客撤离至安全处。

构装体伙伴

机械领班是一个构装体家族的成员，这个家族可被俏皮地称为合成仆役、构装体伙伴或人造盟友。这些构装体皆由极其娴熟的工程师、巧匠与来自各类戒律的施法者设计，其目的在于娱乐、侍奉并保护他们的活主人及其同伴。尽管这些生物各自拥有独特能力、关联生物与典型领地，机械领班、自动侍僧与定制护卫都共享同一项基本特性：它们是高度复杂——有些人甚至会称之为“智能”——由金属与木材制成的非活生物。

怪物部位子系统

机械领班 生物 6

怪物部位 30/65/125 gp

符合条件的精炼 护甲（重型），盾牌，察觉物品，技能物品（杂技，隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸根，敏捷，能量抗性（负能量，正能量），毒素，感官（黑暗视觉），力量，坚固，荒野

Part host, part squire, the mechanical maître d' is most often seen at the head of the house in luxurious restaurants or behind the bar at swanky drinking establishments. Wherever it resides, the maître d' dazzles and delights all who meet it, and it serves its master unerringly and with panache.

A mechanical maître d' is most often constructed in its creator's likeness, but a bit larger and with a stout torso designed to hold full dishes of food and glasses of wine and water. Seasoning herbs are kept in each individual finger, and the maître d' can extend its legs and arms to better reach eager patrons.

A Dish Best Served Cold

Though primarily tasked with keeping order around a busy inn or bar, a mechanical maître d' is also responsible for the safety of its guests. If its clientele are threatened, a mechanical maître d' can wield cutlery normally reserved for food preparation to deadly effect. In even more dire cases, the construct can vent fetid gases from food waste stored in its body, nauseating enemies long enough for clients to get to safety.

Constructed Companion

The mechanical maître d' is one member of a family of constructs that could be playfully described as synthetic servants, constructed companions, or artificial allies. All these constructs are designed by extremely skilled engineers, artificers, and spellcasters from a variety of disciplines for the purpose of entertaining, serving, and protecting their living masters and associates. Though each of these creatures has its own special abilities, associated creatures, and typical demesne, the mechanical maître d', automatic acolyte, and bespoke bodyguard all share the same basic feature of being highly complex—some might even say "intelligent"—non-living creatures made of metal and wood.

Monster Part Subsystem

Mechanical Maître D’ Creature 6

Monster Parts 30/65/125 gp

Eligible Refinements armor (heavy), shield, perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, dexterity, energy resistant (negative, positive), poison, sensory (darkvision), strength, sturdy, wild
Mechanical Maître d'.prototypeToken: 机械领班 Mechanical Maître d'

Arboreal Husk.name: 树栖残躯 Arboreal Husk

Axe Vulnerability.name: 斧易伤 Axe Vulnerability
Axe Vulnerability.description:
树木外壳受到斧类武器攻击时会额外受到5点伤害。

The arboreal husk takes 5 additional damage from axes.

Draining Impact.name: 枯竭冲击 Draining Impact
Draining Impact.description:
当树栖枯壳用其枯疫树枝或枯疫树根命中一个生物时，该生物必须进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:25|name:Draining Impact|traits:primal|showDC:gm]{强韧} 豁免。无论结果如何，该生物在24小时内对同一个树栖枯壳的汲取冲击免疫。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{汲取 1}。

大失败 该生物陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{汲取 2}。

When the arboreal husk hits a creature with its blighted branch or blighted root, the creature must make a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:25|name:Draining Impact|traits:primal|showDC:gm]{Fortitude} save. Whatever the result, the creature is immune to the same arboreal husk's draining impact for 24 hours.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Critical Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}.

Raise Tree.name: 升树 Raise Tree
Raise Tree.description:
树木残躯使180尺内的一棵枯死树木连根拔起，并使用带有树木残躯特性、采用 @Compendium[pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.oBMIc2S8ekmDgPpi]{觉醒树} 数据的方式作为一个仆从进行战斗。树木残躯同时最多可控制两棵觉醒树，并且它可以用一个单动作向两棵树同时下达命令，该动作具有专注与听觉（特征）。

The arboreal husk causes a dead tree within 180 feet to uproot itself and fight as a minion using the statistics for an @Compendium[pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.oBMIc2S8ekmDgPpi]{Awakened Tree} with the husk trait. The arboreal husk can control up to two awakened trees at a time, and it can issue commands to both trees as a single action, which has the concentrate and auditory traits.

Sow Despair.name: 播撒绝望 Sow Despair
Sow Despair.description:
很少有人能摆脱目睹被如此腐化的森林守护者所带来的悲恸。树木枯壳进行一次威吓检定，对30尺内所有生物进行一次 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize}。除Demoralize的通常效果外，若为大成功或大失败，枯壳会反制任何影响目标的有益情绪效果。

Few can shake the sorrow caused by the sight of a forest guardian so corrupted. The arboreal husk makes a single Intimidation check to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} all creatures within 30 feet. In addition to the usual effects of Demoralize, on a critical success, the husk counteracts any beneficial emotion effects affecting the target.

植物交谈 Speak with Plants (常驻法术).name: 植物交谈 Speak with Plants (常驻法术)
植物交谈 Speak with Plants (常驻法术).description:
你能向植物和真菌提出问题和得到回答，但是法术不会让植物变得比平时更加友善或获得更高的智能。大多数植物和真菌对周遭的世界都具有独特的视点，因此它们不会意识到生物的具体细节，也不会知晓附近地区以外的大千世界。狡猾的植物或真菌怪物的沟通表现得简短且模棱两可，而缺乏智能的植物通常会发表无意义的意见。

升阶（4环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Arboreal Husk.publicNotes:
树灵枯壳通常源自树灵守卫、摄政者以及其他树灵，它们未能保护其所守护的森林免遭邪恶的掠夺。这些心碎而扭曲的树木守护者，会继续散播它们在目睹家园遭受如此摧残时所感受到的同类绝望。

多数树灵只会攻击那些目标与森林繁荣不相容的生物，例如伐木工与入侵的好战者；但树灵枯壳在选择敌人时就没那么挑剔了。在这些枯壳眼中，所有活生物都是大自然的潜在亵渎者——从一名用滋养的原初魔法在植物身上“做实验”的精灵德鲁伊，到一只为过冬而“偷窃”橡实的卑微松鼠。无论多少道理或魅力，都无法动摇树灵枯壳那最基本的假设：其附近的任何人都意图伤害它与它那毁坏的领地。

一些树灵曾尝试让它们受扰的枯壳亲族恢复原本良善的天性，但迄今无人成功。扎根于健康森林中的树灵枯壳并不会复原——事实上恰恰相反，枯壳周围的森林会在其毁灭性的存在下枯萎并死去。因此，未受污染的树灵别无选择，只能杀死它们扭曲的同胞。树灵往往不会亲自狩猎并摧毁其领地内已知的枯壳，而是选择雇佣冒险者来承担这项可怕的任务。

此处呈现的树灵枯壳为一名树灵摄政者的枯壳。

守护虚无者

若树灵通常是森林的守护者，那么树灵枯壳又在保护什么？答案正是导致这类枯壳得以存在的生存危机之根源：什么都不保护。一些林地贤者坚称，只要将所有枯壳（包括树灵枯壳）置于一个繁盛的自然国度之中，它们就能被救赎。但枯壳本身一想到这一点便面露惧色，似乎反而沉溺于自身的绝望之中。若此说确有几分可信，那么将枯壳移植到新家园这一行为，就必然得以武力来完成。

枯壳

植物生物与自然世界共享一种特殊的羁绊，几乎没有其他存在能完全理解或珍视。当与其领域的羁绊破裂或被切断时，一个有感知的植物生物的怒火会将其变形为昔日自我的可怖阴影。温和甚至友善的植物，如莱西、树灵与树精，都有可能遭遇这种骇人的蜕变；然而它们自身的痛苦往往远不及它们施加于受害者的恐怖。孤独、愤怒而扭曲，植物枯壳会在胆敢旅行穿越其荒芜疫病般蔓延之野地的流浪者之肥沃尸体中，播下它们怪物般的疯狂。尽管在它们眼中任何活生物都值得被抹除，枯壳仍会把最惨烈的惩罚留给任何乱丢垃圾者、占地定居者或伐木工——这些人曾胆敢玷污、支配或剥光森林。

怪物部位子系统

树灵枯壳 生物 8

怪物部位 64/140/250 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型、中型），盾牌，察觉 物品，技能 物品（运动、威吓、自然、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 灾祸，混沌，体质，能量抗性（正能量），邪恶，精神，感官（黑暗视觉），法术（原初：与植物交谈），力量，坚固，荒野

Arboreal husks typically manifest from arboreal wardens, regents, and other arboreals who fail to protect their forest wards from evil depredations. These brokenhearted, twisted guardians of the trees go on to sow the same kinds of despair they felt upon seeing their home so ravaged.

Whereas most arboreals attack only creatures whose aims are incompatible with the prosperity of the forest, such as loggers and invading warmongers, arboreal husks are not so picky when it comes to choosing foes. To these husks, all living creatures are potential despoilers of nature, from an elven druid "experimenting" on plants with her nourishing primal magic to the lowly squirrel "stealing" acorns for the winter. No amount of reason or charm can sway an arboreal husk from the basic assumption that anyone in its vicinity means harm to it and its ruined domain.

Some arboreals have tried to revert their disturbed husk relatives to their original goodly natures, though so far none have succeeded. An arboreal husk rooted in a healthy forest doesn't recover—in fact, the opposite occurs, as the forest around the husk wilts and dies in its ruinous presence. Thus, untainted arboreals have no choice but to slay their twisted siblings. Rather than hunt down and destroy known husks in their territory, arboreals often choose to hire adventurers to take on this terrible task.

The arboreal husk presented here is of an arboreal regent.

Guardians of Nothing

If an arboreal is typically the guardian of a forest, then what do arboreal husks protect? The answer is at the root of the existential crisis that causes such husks to exist in the first place: nothing. Some woodland sages insist that all husks, including arboreal husks, can be redeemed if placed within a flourishing natural realm. But husks themselves blanch at the thought and seem to revel in their despair. If there is any validity to this claim, then the act of transplanting a husk into a new home must be undertaken necessarily by force.

Husk

Plant creatures share a special bond with the natural world that few other beings can completely understand or appreciate. When the bond to its realm is broken or severed, a sentient plant creature's rage can transform it into a terrible shadow of its former self. Benign and even friendly plants like leshies, arboreals, and dryads all run the risk of this horrible metamorphosis, though their own agony often pales in comparison to the horrors which they inflict on their victims. Lonely, angry, and twisted, plant husks sow their monstrous madness in the fertile corpses of wanderers who dare travel through the husk's blighted swath of wilderness. Though in their eyes any living creature is worthy of obliteration, husks reserve their most horrendous punishments for any litterer, land settler, or lumberjack who ever dared to desecrate, dominate, or denude the forest.

Monster Part Subsystem

Arboreal Husk Creature 8

Monster Parts 64/140/250 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light, medium), shield, perception item, skill items (Athletics, Intimidation, Nature, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, constitution, energy resistant (positive), evil, mental, sensory (darkvision), spells (Primal: speak with plants), strength, sturdy, wild

Muted Delver.name: 沉默探幽者 Muted Delver

Sealed Lips.name: 封唇 Sealed Lips
Sealed Lips.description:
沉默的探索者无法说话或以其他方式发声，但仍然可以施放带有言语成分的法术。这不会改变施放该法术所需的动作数量。

A muted delver cannot speak or otherwise vocalize, but it can still cast spells with verbal components. This doesn't change the number of actions required to cast the spell.

Aura of Quiet.name: 寂静灵光 Aura of Quiet
Aura of Quiet.description:
@Compendium[pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.v61oEQaDdcRpaZ9X]{灵光} 60英尺。

静音潜掘者的灵光会柔化受影响区域内的声音。使用具有听觉或音波（特征）的能力或施放具有口头成分的法术的生物，必须在一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:10|name:Aura of Quiet Flat Check DC|traits:aura, illusion, occult|showDC:owner]{纯骰检定} 中成功；若失败，该效果被对消。

@Compendium[pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.v61oEQaDdcRpaZ9X]{Aura} 60 feet.

A muted delver's aura softens sounds in the affected area. A creature that uses an ability or casts a spell with the auditory or sonic trait or a verbal component must succeed at a @Check[type:flat|dc:10|name:Aura of Quiet Flat Check DC|traits:aura, illusion, occult|showDC:owner]{Flat Check}; on a failure, the effect is counteracted.

Visual Overload.name: 视觉过载 Visual Overload
Visual Overload.description:
沉默掘穴者极度敏感的眼睛易受视觉过载影响。每当沉默掘穴者在 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30尺} 范围内看见带有视觉（特征）的法术被使用时，沉默掘穴者将变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 和 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated}，持续1轮。

沉默掘穴者的着迷的目标是效果的起源，而非效果本身；例如，掘穴者会对施放 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.f8SBoXiXQjlCKqly]{Illusory Creature} 的法师着迷，而不是对幻象本身着迷。

A muted delver's extremely sensitive eyes are susceptible to visual overload. Whenever a muted delver sees a spell used within @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} with the visual trait, the muted delver becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated} for 1 round.

The target of the muted delver's fascination is the origin of the effect, not the effect itself; for example, the delver would be fascinated by a wizard who casts @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.f8SBoXiXQjlCKqly]{Illusory Creature}, not the illusion itself.

Wrecking Ball.name: 破城球 Wrecking Ball
Wrecking Ball.description:
需求 失声掘洞者的爪中抓着一名生物 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}；

效果 失声掘洞者挥动被抓住的生物，将其像棍棒一样猛砸到15尺内至多两个生物身上。每个敌人（包括被抓住的生物）受到[[/r 5d8[bludgeoning]]]伤害（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:30|name:Wrecking Ball DC|traits:damaging-effect|showDC:gm]{基础强韧} 豁免）。若豁免失败，生物被击倒为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}；若豁免大失败，该生物还会 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}。

Requirements The muted delver has a creature @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} in its claw;

Effect The muted delver swings the grabbed creature around, slamming it like a cudgel into up to two creatures within 15 feet. Each foe, including the grabbed creature, takes [[/r 5d8[bludgeoning]]] damage (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:30|name:Wrecking Ball DC|traits:damaging-effect|showDC:gm]{basic Fortitude} save). On a failed save, a creature is knocked @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}; on a critically failed save, the creature is also @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

缓慢术 Slow.name: 缓慢术 Slow
缓慢术 Slow.description:
你令目标周围的时间膨胀，令其行动缓慢。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1} ，持续1轮。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}，持续1分钟。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 2}，持续1分钟。

升阶（6环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

血族驱命 Vampiric Exsanguination.name: 血族驱命 Vampiric Exsanguination
血族驱命 Vampiric Exsanguination.description:
你伸出手臂，抽取其他生物的血液和生命力。你对区域内的每个活物造成12d6点虚能伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免。

你获得等于一个生物从该法术受到的伤害一半的临时生命值；计算该临时生命时，使用承受最多伤害的生物。你在1分钟后失去任何剩余的临时生命值。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d6。

黑触手 Black Tentacles.name: 黑触手 Black Tentacles
黑触手 Black Tentacles.description:
区域 邻接一个平面的20尺爆发

无数油滑的黑触手涌出并尝试擒抱区域内的每个生物。尝试一次法术攻击骰，对抗每个生物的强韧DC。任何你成功对抗的生物都会@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]，并且承受3d6钝击伤害。当一个生物在触手中结束其回合时，如果触手还没擒抱它，触手会尝试擒抱该生物，并对任何已经被擒抱的生物造成@Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]]伤害。

触手的逃脱DC等于你的法术DC。生物可以通过攻击触手来尝试脱离它的掌控。触手的AC等于你的法术DC，并且在承受12点或更多伤害时会被摧毁。即使触手被摧毁，另外的触手们也会继续在区域中不断涌出，直到持续时间结束。你可以解消该法术。

虚假生命 False Life.name: 虚假生命 False Life
虚假生命 False Life.description:
你使用死灵系能量创造了一个生命力池，并获得等于6加上你的施法属性调整值的临时生命值。

升阶 (+1) 该临时生命值增加3。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.PANUWN5xXC20WBg2]{法术效果：虚假生命}

侦测魔法 Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
侦测魔法 Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

护盾术 Shield.name: 护盾术 Shield
护盾术 Shield.description:
你举起一面力场构成的魔法护盾。这视同你使用了举起盾牌动作，赋予你在AC上的+1环境加值，直到你的下个回合开始，但这里不需要手来使用。

当该法术生效时，你可以使用你的魔法护盾来进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡 Shield Block}反应动作。该盾牌具有硬度5。你可以使用该法术的反应动作来减少任何来自法术或者魔法效果的伤害，即使这不造成物理伤害。在你使用盾牌格挡后，该法术结束，并且你无法在10分钟内再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾术}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾术免疫}

升阶（+2） 该盾牌的硬度增加5。

浮空术 Levitate (仅限自身) (常驻法术).name: 浮空术 Levitate (仅限自身) (常驻法术)
浮空术 Levitate (仅限自身) (常驻法术).description:
你移去重力，令目标漂浮距离地面5尺。你可以通过维持法术来使目标上移或者下移10尺。因浮空术而漂浮的生物在攻击骰上承受-2环境减值。漂浮的生物可以花费一个交互动作来稳定自身，并在其回合剩余时间里取消该减值。如果目标邻接一个固定的物体，或者足够稳定的地形，他可以通过攀爬（如果平面是垂直的，例如一堵墙）或者匍匐（如果平面是水平的，例如天花板）沿着该平面移动。GM决定具体什么表面可以攀爬，什么表面应当匍匐。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.JqrTrvwV7pYStMXz]{法术效果：浮空术}

真视术 True Seeing (常驻法术).name: 真视术 True Seeing (常驻法术)
真视术 True Seeing (常驻法术).description: 你可以看见60尺内的事物的本来面貌。GM秘密骰反制检定，对抗区域中的所有幻术或者变形效果，但这只会决定你是否能看破它（例如，如果该检定成功对抗了一个变形法术，你可以看见该生物的本来形态，但你不会结束该变形法术）。

高等黑暗视觉 Greater Darkvision.name: 高等黑暗视觉 Greater Darkvision

Muted Delver.publicNotes:
沉默潜掘者是一种安静却以欢快的恶意为乐的生物，是徘徊在最深海域最孤寂角落里的巨型畸变怪物。它会攀爬上船只并掠过甲板，像影子一样悄无声息，以便将船员一个接一个吞噬，并把任何幸存者逼疯。它的形态过于骇人，战术又太过异样，以至于关于沉默潜掘者的报告几乎普遍被当作夸张的奇谈。

沉默潜掘者往往出没于深海水域以及航行其上的船只附近，但它们有时也会登上岸边，潜伏在湿滑的码头下方和废弃船屋外侧。无论何种情形，它们的劫掠总是压抑而阴魂不散的风格，从不喧闹或混乱。由于它们的双唇紧闭，无人能确切知道沉默潜掘者是如何吞食猎物的——然而它们确实能做到，证据便是它们离去后留下的一堆堆被细致清理过的白骨。

除了掌控海洋的原始魔法之外，这些海上畸变怪物还演化出数种不寻常的狩猎工具。它们的眼旁有两个小喷嘴，会从中发射致命的加压空气射流，从远处刺穿受害者。此外，它诱饵末端垂挂的一只可怖利爪，使得擒拿或劈砍猎物都变得轻而易举。

潜掘者走卒

格外贪吃的沉默潜掘者有时会聚集一群较弱的水栖（特征）憎恶之物——斯库姆、海魔鬼，甚至丘尔——来协助它们的虐待行径。尽管它们倾向于沉迷于视觉上令人兴奋的现象，包括闪亮的宝石与反光的小饰物，沉默潜掘者却并不怎么喜爱黯淡或乏味的贵重物；这些奖赏足以让它们的爪牙至少在一定程度上保持忠诚。

怪物部件子系统

沉默潜掘者 生物 11

怪物部件 175/390/720 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（轻型、中型）、察觉 物品、技能 物品（奥术、运动、威吓、秘术、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 克星、混乱、魅力、能量抗性（正能量、音波）、邪恶、精神、负能量、感官（高等黑暗视觉、真实视觉）、法术（秘术：黑色触手、侦测魔法、虚假生命、浮空术、护盾、缓慢术、真实视觉、吸血榨干）、力量、原野、感知

A creature of quiet, gleeful malice, the muted delver is a gigantic monstrosity that stalks the loneliest corners of the deepest seas. It climbs aboard ships and glides across the decks, silent as a shadow, so that it can devour the crew one by one and drive any survivors mad. Its form is so monstrous and its tactics so alien that reports of muted delvers are almost universally dismissed as tall tales.

Though muted delvers tend to haunt deep oceanic waters and the ships of those who ply them, they do sometimes venture ashore as well, where they lurk beneath slippery docks and outside derelict boathouses. In either case, their depredations are always of a subdued, haunting variety, never loud or chaotic. Nobody is quite sure how muted delvers manage to consume their prey, owing to their sealed lips, and yet they do, as evidenced by the piles of meticulously cleaned bones they leave in their wake.

In addition to their command over the primal magic of the sea, these maritime monstrosities have evolved several unusual hunting tools. They have two small nozzles next to their eyes, from which they fire deadly jets of pressurized air that pierce victims from a distance. In addition, a terrible claw dangling from its lure makes nabbing or slashing prey a simple affair.

Delver Flunkies

Particularly gluttonous muted delvers sometimes gather mobs of less powerful aquatic abominations—skum, sea devils, and even chuuls—to assist with their sadistic endeavors. Though they have a tendency to obsess over visually stimulating phenomena, including shiny gems and reflective trinkets, muted delvers have little love for dull or uninteresting valuables, prizes that keep their minions at least somewhat loyal.

Monster Part Subsystem

Muted Delver Creature 11

Monster Parts 175/390/720 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing, slashing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Arcana, Athletics, Intimidation, Occultism, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, energy resistant (positive, sonic), evil, mental, negative, sensory (greater darkvision, true seeing), spells (Occult: black tentacles, detect magic, false life, levitate, shield, slow, true seeing, vampiric exsanguination), strength, wild, wisdom
Muted Delver.prototypeToken: 沉默的探索者 Muted Delver

Hieroglyph Scorpion.name: 象形文字蝎 Hieroglyph Scorpion

震颤感知 (模糊感官) 120 尺.name: 震颤感知 (模糊感官) 120 尺

Limited Incorporeality.name: 有限非实体性 Limited Incorporeality
Limited Incorporeality.description:
象形文字蝎子那不同寻常的二维性质限制了它的虚体特性。蝎子不能穿过坚固的物体，不过有形的生物仍然可以穿过象形文字蝎子。

A hieroglyph scorpion's unusual two-dimensional nature limits its incorporeality. The scorpion cannot pass through solid objects, though corporeal creatures can still pass through the hieroglyph scorpion.

Reanimation.name: 再生动画 Reanimation
Reanimation.description:
当一只象形文字蝎被摧毁时，它会重新成形，并在[[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4天}后于其壁画内出现，完全恢复。一只象形文字蝎只有在摧毁其被创造出来以守护的那幅壁画时，才能被永久摧毁。

When a hieroglyph scorpion is destroyed, it re-forms, [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} later within its mural, fully healed. A hieroglyph scorpion can be permanently destroyed only by destroying the mural which it was created to protect.

Inscription Venom.name: 铭刻毒素 Inscription Venom
Inscription Venom.description:
豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:28|name:Inscription Venom DC|traits:arcane, incapacitation, transmutation|showDC:gm]{强韧};

最大持续时间 6轮;

阶段 1 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} (1轮);

阶段 2 措手不及且 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1} (1轮);

阶段 3 措手不及且 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 2} (1轮);

阶段 4 受害者被永久石化，且其肉体（包括其所有携带的物品）会被魔法铭刻到最近的平坦表面上，例如墙壁或地砖。

除其铭刻外，受害者不留下任何物理痕迹。被铭刻的生物可以通过以其铭刻为目标施放 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Pr1ruNTbzGn3H9w5]{石化复原} 从壁画中恢复，或通过摧毁其被铭刻其上的壁画来恢复。若壁画被摧毁，则位于被摧毁部分壁画上的所有被铭刻生物都会被释放、恢复为血肉，并治愈此毒素。

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:28|name:Inscription Venom DC|traits:arcane, incapacitation, transmutation|showDC:gm]{Fortitude};

Maximum Duration 6 rounds;

Stage 1 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} (1 round);

Stage 2 off-guard and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round);

Stage 3 off-guard and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} (1 round);

Stage 4 The victim is permanently petrified, and its physical body (including all its possessions) are magically inscribed onto the nearest flat surface, such as a wall or floor tile.

No physical trace of the victim remains except its inscription. An inscribed creature can be recovered from the mural by targeting its inscription with @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Pr1ruNTbzGn3H9w5]{Stone to Flesh} or by destroying the mural on which it is inscribed. If the mural is destroyed, all inscribed creatures on the destroyed portion of the mural are freed, restored to flesh, and are cured of this poison.

Weightless Climber.name: 无重攀登者 Weightless Climber
Weightless Climber.description:
象形文字蝎子可以在任何表面攀爬，甚至包括天花板。

A hieroglyph scorpion can climb on any surface, even ceilings.

Flatten.name: 压平 Flatten
Flatten.description:
圣书体蝎子将自己贴平在相邻的墙面上，与墙上的绘画或铭文完美融为一体。处于贴平状态时，蝎子在以看起来只是墙面的一部分为目的的欺瞒检定和DC上，自动获得35的结果。如果圣书体蝎子尝试做任何除保持静止或沿墙面移动之外的事情，它就会解除贴平状态，且该效果结束。

The hieroglyph scorpion flattens itself against an adjacent wall, blending in seamlessly with the wall's paintings or inscriptions. While flattened, the scorpion has an automatic result of 35 on Deception checks and DCs to appear as just another part of the wall. If the hieroglyph scorpion attempts to do anything other than remain stationary or move along the wall's surface, it becomes unflattened and this effect ends.

借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity.name: 借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity

Hieroglyph Scorpion.publicNotes:
象形文字蝎是魔法害虫，最初被构筑用来守卫法老的陵墓、神殿与金字塔。它们独特的能力使其能与彩绘壁画、凿刻铭文与华丽石棺融为一体，从而在盗墓者毫无察觉时尾随其后，随后跃出、攻击并使这些意图行窃者失去行动能力。

这些带有虚体（特征）的蝎子拥有强大的防御，因为它们不完全的实体化使其能够“压扁”自身并在二维表面巡逻。凭借细长的毒刺与螯钳，象形文字蝎往往会与对手保持距离，而且在战斗失利时也不介意撤退。

象形文字蝎最可怕的武器是其铭文毒液，会逐渐将受害者化为石像，并把他们添加进蝎子愈发致密的壁画之中。但危险之中也有机遇。受古老象形文字蝎守护的走廊上刻满了无数倒霉的宝藏猎人。摧毁壁画或许能解放他们——以及他们的战利品。

构筑灵体

尽管它没有实体躯体并具有虚体（特征），象形文字蝎并非亡灵。相反，它是由无生命的以太精粹构成的构筑存在。尽管如此，创造象形文字蝎的强大魔法也将其束缚在它被命令守护的墓室墙壁上，使其能以类似幽灵（特征）的方式“复苏”。

怪物部件子系统

象形文字蝎 生物 10

怪物部件 125/275/500 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（中型）、察觉物品、技能物品（特技动作、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 bane、魅力、敏捷、能量抗性（强酸、寒冷、电击、火焰、负能量、正能量、音波）、毒素、感官（黑暗视觉）、wild

Hieroglyph scorpions are magical vermin originally constructed to guard pharaonic mausoleums, temples, and pyramids. Their unique ability to blend in with painted murals, chiseled inscriptions, and ornate sarcophagi allow them to tail tomb-robbers unseen, then leap out, attack, and disable would-be thieves.

These incorporeal scorpions boast mighty defenses as their incomplete materialization allows them to flatten out and patrol two-dimensional surfaces. With long stingers and pincers, hieroglyph scorpions tend to keep their opponents at a distance, and are not above retreating from a lost fight.

The hieroglyph scorpion's most fearsome weapon is its inscription venom, which gradually turns its victims to stone and adds them to the scorpion's ever-denser mural. But there is opportunity in danger. The halls protected by ancient hieroglyph scorpions are inscribed with countless unlucky treasure hunters. Destroying the mural could free them—and their loot.

Constructed Spirit

Though it lacks a physical body and has the incorporeal trait, a hieroglyph scorpion is not undead. Instead, it is a constructed being made from inanimate ethereal quintessence. Nevertheless, the powerful magic that creates a hieroglyph scorpion also binds it to the walls of the tomb it is ordered with protecting, enabling it to "rejuvenate" similarly to the way a ghost does.

Monster Part Subsystem

Hieroglyph Scorpion Creature 10

Monster Parts 125/275/500 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (medium), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, dexterity, energy resistant (acid, cold, electricity, fire, negative, positive, sonic), poison, sensory (darkvision), wild

Iron Fern.name: 铁蕨 Iron Fern

震颤感知 (模糊感官) 30 尺.name: 震颤感知 (模糊感官) 30 尺

Metal Coating (Hardness 5).name: 金属涂层（硬度 5） Metal Coating (Hardness 5)
Metal Coating (Hardness 5).description:
铁蕨的叶片与茎秆覆有金属，为铁蕨提供火焰抗力5与硬度5。该硬度会使其受到的任何伤害减少等同于硬度的数值。一旦铁蕨的生命值降至不足一半，或在遭受大成功或大失败命中造成伤害时立即，蕨类的金属覆层便会剥落；铁蕨的AC降至15，失去其硬度与火焰抗力，并获得火焰弱点5。

An iron fern's leaves and stalk are coated in metal, providing the iron fern with fire resistance 5 and Hardness 5. This Hardness reduces any damage it takes by an amount equal to the Hardness. Once an iron fern is reduced to less than half its Hit Points, or immediately upon being damaged by a critical hit, the fern's metal coating flakes off; the iron fern's AC is reduced to 15, it loses its Hardness and fire resistance, and it gains fire weakness 5.

Release Spores.name: 释放孢子 Release Spores
Release Spores.description:
铁蕨猛力摇动叶片，在@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内制造一团铁孢子云。该云团持续1分钟，或直到被强风吹散。任何在该云团中开始其回合的生物会受到[[/r 4d4[piercing]]]伤害（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:17|name:Release Spores DC|traits:damaging-effect|showDC:gm]{基础 强韧}豁免）。在大失败时，该生物获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}1轮。

铁蕨在[[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}内无法再次释放孢子。

The iron fern shakes its fronds mightily, creating a cloud of iron spores in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. The cloud lasts for 1 minute or until dispersed by a strong wind. A creature that begins its turn in the cloud takes [[/r 4d4[piercing]]] damage (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:17|name:Release Spores DC|traits:damaging-effect|showDC:gm]{basic Fortitude} save). On a critical failure, the creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.

The iron fern can't Release Spores again for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Sharpen Leaves.name: 锋锐叶片 Sharpen Leaves
Sharpen Leaves.description:
铁蕨用叶片刮擦附近的石头来磨利其边缘。直到铁蕨下个回合结束前，它的铁叶打击造成额外的 [[/r 1d4[slashing]]] 伤害。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-bestiary-effects.ckKKQYhsZ2kSNcX9]{效果：磨利叶片}

The iron fern scrapes its leaves against a nearby stone to sharpen its edges. Until the end of the iron fern's next turn, its iron leaf Strikes deal an additional [[/r 1d4[slashing]]] damage.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-bestiary-effects.ckKKQYhsZ2kSNcX9]{Effect: Sharpen Leaves}

Iron Fern.publicNotes:
铁蕨是一种长着金属叶片的植物，生长在矿井竖井中、洞窟墙壁上以及岩石地貌的顶端。处于花苞形态时，铁蕨会分泌一种能溶解岩石与土壤的酸，使植物根系得以啜食暴露出来的微量矿物与矿石。当花苞长出第一片卷曲嫩叶时，它的叶片会被所吸收的金属覆盖，在柔软的植物组织外形成一种保护性的鞘层。由于铁蕨的种类和金属的种类一样多，这种植物的名字多少有些名不副实；最常见的铁蕨品种实际上是铜蕨、锡蕨与镍蕨。相对地，诸如金蕨与铂蕨之类的稀有品种在植物学家与寻宝者之中都极受追捧。

然而，铁蕨既有价值也同样危险。该植物的激素作用类似捕蝇草，使其会本能地用剃刀般锋利的叶片拍击潜在的捕食者。矿工与洞穴探险者在长有铁蕨的洞窟中会格外小心；带锯齿的金属叶片可能从隧道顶棚坠落到毫无防备的工人身上，或从裂开的岩壁间划向他们的脚踝。一些采矿公司会雇用受过专门训练的锈蚀怪物提前清除铁蕨，不过，一只吃得饱饱的锈蚀怪物带来的危险也仅仅比铁蕨森林稍微不那么令人畏惧一点。

和其他蕨类一样，铁蕨通过孢子繁殖。然而，铁蕨的孢子并非普通的植物物质。相反，这些孢子会显现为金属屑云团，对任何不幸路过的生物的眼睛与肺部都极其危险。对铁蕨来说更方便的是，被孢子杀死的动物尸体会成为极其肥沃的发芽培养基。

作为无心智的植物，铁蕨不具备恶意，尽管这并不能阻止许多活生物公开厌恶这些含铁的植物。然而，对那些愿意冒着被割几刀风险的人来说，铁蕨寄望城带来许多潜在财富，从普通的动物毛皮到洒落的黄金与魔法物品。

幸运之叶
