Mechanical Artillerist (Barrage).name: 机械炮术师（弹幕） Mechanical Artillerist (Barrage)

借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity.name: 借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity

Final Detonation.name: 终焉爆炸 Final Detonation
Final Detonation.description:
当一名机械炮手被降至0生命值时，其内部的黑火药储槽发生过热，引发炮手在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内爆炸。区域内的每个生物受到[[/r 4d6 #fire]]{4d6火焰伤害}（@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|name:Final Detonation DC|traits:damaging-effect,fire|showDC:gm]{基础反射}豁免；在大失败时，该生物还会被击倒@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}）。

When a mechanical artillerist is reduced to 0 Hit Points, its internal reservoir of black powder cooks off, causing the artillerist to explode in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. Each creature in the area takes [[/r 4d6 #fire]]{4d6 fire damage} (@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|name:Final Detonation DC|traits:damaging-effect,fire|showDC:gm]{basic Reflex} save; on a critical failure, the creature is also knocked @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}).

Sensitive Components.name: 敏感成分 Sensitive Components
Sensitive Components.description:
极端温度会干扰机械炮手的引擎。当机械炮手受到寒冷伤害时，它获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} 状态，持续1轮。若它受到火焰伤害，则它获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} 状态，持续1轮，并且它可以用其额外动作来进行疾走或打击。在同一轮中受到额外的寒冷或火焰伤害不会提高这些状态的效果。

Extreme temperatures can interfere with a mechanical artillerist's engine. When a mechanical artillerist takes cold damage, it is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round. If it takes fire damage, it is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} for 1 round and it can use its extra action to either Stride or Strike. Additional cold or fire damage in a single round does not increase these conditions.

Barrage.name: 弹幕 Barrage
Barrage.description:
机械炮兵进行三次火炮炮弹打击，每次都必须瞄准不同的目标。每次打击都计入其多重攻击减值，但在其完成全部三次攻击之前，减值不会增加。

The mechanical artillerist makes three artillery shell Strikes, each of which must be aimed at a different target. Each Strike counts toward its multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until after it has made all three attacks.

Mechanical Artillerist (Barrage).publicNotes:
尽管魔法是世界上许多最强大军队背后的主导力量，但在战争方面，一些国家仍更青睐科学、技术，或纯粹的火力。黑火药与火器或许是当代最重要的技术革新之一，但被称为“机械炮兵”的巨大战争机器注定将成为其中最后的一批。在那些魔法不可能实现、不可靠，或不受欢迎的战区里，机械炮兵是战场上无可争议的霸主。

机械炮兵由整洁的内部机构提供动力，这些机构以稳定的节奏引爆受控体积的黑火药。其燃料罐的易爆特性，使得一台受损或被摧毁的炮兵几乎和一台完全运作的同样危险。

虽然最常见的是单独遭遇机械炮兵，但它们也可能以小队形式集结。在这种情况下，这些构装体通常各自携带少量变化，并被赋予特定的战斗职责：一台炮兵被指定为小队的前锋盾牌，一台被指定为主要突击武器，而另一台位于后方，装载着多种远程导弹。

各种形状与体型

与它们统一的引擎形成对比的是，炮兵的外部形态可能千差万别。许多机械炮兵看起来像螃蟹、熊等动物的棱角分明的金属版本，有时甚至像人类。有些可能仅装备一排喷射弹壳的火炮，而另一些则会从四面八方喷吐火焰。

怪物部位子系统

机械炮兵 生物 7

怪物部位 45/100/180 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（重型），盾牌，察觉 物品，技能 物品（运动）

符合条件的灌注属性 克星，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（负能量，正能量），火焰，感官（黑暗视觉），力量，坚固，狂野

Although magic is the predominant force behind many of the world's most powerful militaries, some nations still favor science, technology, or sheer firepower when it comes to warfare. Black powder and firearms may have been some of the most significant technological innovations of the current era, but the massive war machines called mechanical artillerists promise to be among the last. In war zones where magic is impossible, unreliable, or undesirable, mechanical artillerists are the undisputed juggernauts of the battlefield.

Mechanical artillerists are powered by tidy internal mechanisms that detonate controlled volumes of black powder at a steady clip. The volatile nature of its fuel tanks makes a compromised or destroyed artillerist nearly as dangerous as a fully operational one.

Although most commonly encountered in isolation, mechanical artillerists might group together in small squads. In such cases, the constructs usually each bear a few variations and are given specific combat roles, with one artillerist designated as the group's forward shield, one designated as the primary assault weapon, and one in the rear, loaded with a variety of long-range missiles.

All Shapes and Sizes

In contrast to their uniform engines, artillerists' exteriors can vary wildly. Many mechanical artillerists resemble angular, metallic versions of animals such as crabs, bears, and sometimes even humans. Some might bear a single stripe of shell-spewing cannons, while others release gouts of fire from every side.

Monster Part Subsystem

Mechanical Artillerist Creature 7

Monster Parts 45/100/180 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (heavy), shield, perception item, skill items (Athletics)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (negative, positive), fire, sensory (darkvision), strength, sturdy, wild

Warp Wyrm.name: 扭曲巨龙 Warp Wyrm

灵敏嗅觉 (模糊感官) 30 尺.name: 灵敏嗅觉 (模糊感官) 30 尺

闪现术 Blink.name: 闪现术 Blink
闪现术 Blink.description:
你在物质位面和灵界位面之间快速闪现。你对所有伤害获得抗力5（除了力场）。你可以维持法术，消失不见并在10尺内由GM决定的随机方位上出现；该移动不会触发反应动作。在你的回合结束时，你会如上文所述地快速消失又重新出现。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ZlsuhS9J0S3PuvCO]{法术效果：闪现术}

升阶 (+2) 该抗力提高3。

Blink Breath.name: 闪烁吐息 Blink Breath
Blink Breath.description:
扭曲巨龙吐出一团以太灵质团块，射程50尺，并在@Template[type:burst|distance:15]内爆炸。爆发区域内的生物受到[[/r 7d6[force]]]{7d6力场伤害}（@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|name:Blink Breath DC|traits:damaging-effect,arcane,conjuration,teleportation|showDC:gm]{基础反射}豁免）。豁免失败的生物会被巨龙的灵质覆盖，使该生物可能会“闪烁”回到该区域：在其回合开始时，受影响的生物必须在@Check[type:will|dc:25|name:Blink Breath DC|traits:arcane,conjuration,teleportation|showDC:gm]{意志}豁免中成功，否则会立刻传送回其最初被闪烁吐息命中的位置。

该生物会被灵质覆盖6轮，直到其花费两个动作（这些动作具有交互特征）移除灵质，或直到扭曲巨龙再次使用闪烁吐息为止，以先发生者为准。

扭曲巨龙在[[/br 1d6 #rounds]]{1d6轮}内无法再次使用闪烁吐息。

The warp wyrm spits a glob of ethereal ectoplasm to a range of 50 feet that explodes in a @Template[type:burst|distance:15]. Creatures within the burst take [[/r 7d6[force]]]{7d6 force damage} (@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|name:Blink Breath DC|traits:damaging-effect,arcane,conjuration,teleportation|showDC:gm]{basic Reflex} save). A creature that fails its save is coated in the wyrm's ectoplasm, which causes the creature to potentially "blink" back to the area: At the beginning of its turn, an affected creature must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:25|name:Blink Breath DC|traits:arcane,conjuration,teleportation|showDC:gm]{Will} save or be instantly teleported back to the spot where it was originally hit with Blink Breath.

The creature remains coated in ectoplasm for 6 rounds, until it removes the ectoplasm by spending two actions (which have the Interact trait), or until the warp wyrm uses Blink Breath again, whichever comes first.

The warp wyrm can't use Blink Breath again for [[/br 1d6 #rounds]]{1d6 rounds}.

Blinking Slice.name: 闪烁斩击 Blinking Slice
Blinking Slice.description:
扭曲巨龙消失进入以太位面，移动，然后在该位面重新出现。若它以此动作结束时与一名生物相邻，扭曲巨龙可以对该生物进行一次颚部打击。命中时，它会额外造成[[/r 2d6[precision]]]{2d6 精确伤害}。

The warp wyrm disappears into the Ethereal Plane, Strides, then reappears on this plane. If it ends this action adjacent to a creature, the warp wyrm can make a jaws Strike against that creature. On a hit, it deals an extra [[/r 2d6[precision]]]{2d6 precision damage}.

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙族狂乱 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
扭曲龙虫以任意顺序进行两次爪与一次颚部的打击。

The warp wyrm makes two claw and one jaws Strike in any order.

Warp Lash.name: 扭曲鞭笞 Warp Lash
Warp Lash.description:
需求 扭曲巨龙的上一个动作是一次成功的尾巴打击；

效果 扭曲巨龙将目标击穿一个次元传送门。目标必须在一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:26|name:Warp Lash DC|traits:arcane, conjuration, teleportation|showDC:gm]{Fortitude} 豁免中成功，否则会消失并被送往以太位面，随后在本位面的一个空间内重新出现，距离其起始点 [[/br 1d4*5 #feet]]{1d4x5} 英尺远。（掷骰一个d8来决定目标被击飞的方向。）

Requirements The warp wyrm's last action was a successful tail Strike;

Effect The warp wyrm knocks the target through a dimensional portal. The target must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:26|name:Warp Lash DC|traits:arcane, conjuration, teleportation|showDC:gm]{Fortitude} save or disappear onto the Ethereal Plane before reappearing on this plane in a space [[/br 1d4*5 #feet]]{1d4x5} feet away from its starting point. (Roll a d8 to determine which direction the target is knocked.)

Warp Wyrm.publicNotes:
扭曲幼龙是小型龙科生物，能够在以太位面与物质位面之间迅速传送，并在所到之处造成惊人的伤害。大多数幼龙至少倾向于停留在其自然栖息地附近，而扭曲幼龙却不受此类边界所限，使其在四面八方的土地上都成为致命的威胁。

大多数幼龙群体被称为“暴走”，而一群扭曲幼龙则被称为“混沌”，名副其实，因为很少有怪物群体像这些残忍的巨龙一样展现出如此肆意的破坏与毁灭性的好奇心。即便扭曲幼龙缺少可供玩弄的猎物，它也必定会把鼻子伸进各种角落与缝隙里，揭开本应保持隐藏的事物，释放本应被收容的东西，并毁坏那些不可能修复的物件。

虐杀掠食者

扭曲幼龙比大多数幼龙更小，但同样凶残。如同猫或虐待狂一般，扭曲幼龙乐于在给予致命一击之前先玩弄受害者。没有什么比从以太位面一跃而出吓唬受害者，或把猎物撞进异次元传送门、推向其可怕的终局，更能让扭曲幼龙狂笑嚎叫。

怪物部件子系统

扭曲幼龙 生物 8

怪物部件 64/140/250 gp

可选精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（光、中型、重型）、察觉 物品、技能 物品（Acrobatics、Athletics、Stealth）

可选灌注属性 bane、chaotic、constitution、dexterity、能量抗性（positive）、evil、force、感官（黑暗视觉、scent）、法术（Arcane: blink）、wild、winged

Warp wyrms are small drakes capable of rapidly teleporting between the Ethereal and Material Planes, upon both of which they wreak incredible amounts of damage wherever they go. Whereas most drakes are at least prone to stay near their natural environs, warp wyrms know no such boundaries, making them a deadly menace in lands far and wide.

Whereas most drake collectives are known as rampages, a gang of warp wyrms is called a chaos, and rightly so, for few groups of monsters exhibit as much wanton mayhem and destructive curiosity as these cruel dragons. Even when a warp wyrm lacks prey with which to play, it will undoubtedly stick its nose in all manner of nooks and crannies, uncovering things that should remain hidden, releasing things that should be contained, and breaking things that are impossible to fix.

Sadistic Predators

Warp wyrms are smaller than most drakes, but no less vicious. Like cats or sadists, warp wyrms delight in playing with their victims before making the killing blow. Nothing gets a warp wyrm howling with laughter quite like leaping out of the Ethereal Plane to scare a victim or knocking prey through a dimensional portal toward its terrible demise.

Monster Part Subsystem

Warp Wyrm Creature 8

Monster Parts 64/140/250 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing, slashing), armor (light, medium, heavy), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), evil, force, sensory (darkvision, scent), spells (Arcane: blink), wild, winged

Hook Melon.name: 钩瓜 Hook Melon

灵敏嗅觉 (模糊感官) 60 尺.name: 灵敏嗅觉 (模糊感官) 60 尺

震颤感知 (精确感官) 30 尺.name: 震颤感知 (精确感官) 30 尺

Hanging Fruit.name: 垂悬的果实 Hanging Fruit
Hanging Fruit.description:
钩瓜由一条长藤悬挂在其母树上。与母树连接时，该瓜拥有快速治疗 10，但处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}状态。它可以以自由动作（）将自己从藤上脱离。若被移动到距离母树超过10英尺，钩瓜也会脱离。一旦脱离，它便无法重新连接。

A hook melon is suspended from its parent tree by a long vine. While connected to its parent tree, the melon has fast healing 10 but is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}. It can detach itself from its vine as a free action. A hook melon will also detach if moved more than 10 feet from its parent tree. Once detached, it cannot reattach itself.

Steer.name: 操控 Steer
Steer.description:
触发 一个附着的生物试图攻击钩瓜或使用一个移动动作；

效果 钩瓜打断该动作并使用偷取疾走。

Trigger An attached creature attempts to attack the hook melon or use a move action;

Effect The hook melon disrupts the action and uses Steal Stride.

Attach.name: 附加 Attach
Attach.description:
当钩瓜用其枝条打击命中一名小型或更大型的活生物时，其躯干上拖曳的根须会以自由动作（）附着在该生物身上。这类似于抓住该生物，但钩瓜会随该生物一起移动，而不是将其固定在原地。钩瓜在附着时处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 状态，且除非宿主为大型或更大型，否则其宿主处于负重状态。

钩瓜能够控制它所附着的死亡或 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷} 生物，不过它仅限于带有移动或操作（特征）的简单动作。钩瓜仍可使用其自身的所有能力与攻击，但它同一时间只能附着于一个生物。

生物可以以 DC 25 的检定进行逃脱以摆脱附着的钩瓜。相邻生物可以用一次 @Check[type:athletics|dc:20|name:Force Open DC|traits:action:force-option|showDC:gm]{Athletics} 检定进行强行撬开，将钩瓜从盟友身上强行移除，这会对被附着的生物造成 [[/r 2d8[bleed]]] 伤害。杀死钩瓜也会解放被附着的生物。

When a hook melon hits a Small or larger living creature with its branch Strike, roots trailing from its torso attach it to that creature as a free action. This is similar to grabbing the creature, but the hook melon moves with the creature rather than holding it in place. The hook melon is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} while attached, and its host is encumbered unless the host is Large or larger.

A hook melon is capable of controlling a dead or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} creature it is attached to, though it is limited to simple actions with the move or manipulate traits. The hook melon can still use all its own abilities and attacks, though it can be attached to only one creature at a time.

A creature can escape an attached hook melon with a DC 25 check to Escape. An adjacent creature can forcibly remove the hook melon from an ally with a @Check[type:athletics|dc:20|name:Force Open DC|traits:action:force-option|showDC:gm]{Athletics} check to Force Open, which deals [[/r 2d8[bleed]]] damage to the attached creature. Killing the melon also frees the attached creature.

Steal Stride.name: 偷窃疾行 Steal Stride
Steal Stride.description:
需求 钩瓜已附着在一个生物身上；

效果 钩瓜控制所附着生物的神经，迫使其行走。它使用所附着生物的一种速度进行疾走，同时移动它自己与所附着的生物。

Requirements The hook melon is attached to a creature;

Effect The hook melon controls the attached creature's nerves, forcing it to ambulate. It Strides using one of the attached creature's Speeds, moving both itself and the attached creature.

Hook Melon.publicNotes:
钩瓜是一种奇异而令人不安的果实品种，它们通过一根从“颈部”长出的藤蔓悬挂在母树的枝条上。当完全成熟时，它们与无头类人生物的躯体有着令人毛骨悚然的相似之处。

大多数果实会通过引诱其他生物食用来散播植物的种子，而钩瓜则采取不同的方法。当与另一种生物的神经系统交织在一起时，从其躯干拖曳而出的根状纤维能让钩瓜对生物的移动施加有限的控制。它们利用这种控制尽可能远离母树进行旅行，并寻找合适的地点发芽；在此过程中，它们常常会把不情愿的宿主殴打至昏迷甚至死亡。

钩瓜作为一种植物却拥有令人惊讶的智能，毕竟要控制另一种生物的身体需要相当的精密性。有时，一群钩瓜（称为“绞架”）会协同合作伏击更大群体的生物，以确保它们之中至少有一个能在附着于合适宿主的情况下逃脱。

偶尔，某个钩瓜会拒绝其生物本能的驱动，放弃发芽，转而进行进一步的探索。据说这类个体会用无定形的衣物伪装自己，以便穿过有人居住的区域。

在森林中踉跄前行、呈现出不寻常的半人马般剪影的目击事件，有时就可归因于这些阴森的果实。

选择性寄宿

尽管显然是植物性的生命形态，钩瓜却拥有诡异的智力，而它们的性格对大多数类人生物而言与其无脊椎的解剖结构一样陌生。多数钩瓜更喜欢附着在鹿、大型鸟类以及其他行动迅捷的森林生物身上，但不知为何，有些钩瓜反而对类人生物的身体情有独钟。

怪物部位子系统

钩瓜 生物 4

怪物部位 12/27/50 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（光），察觉物品，技能物品（运动）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌，体质，能量抗性（正能量），邪恶，感官（嗅觉），力量，荒野，wisdomd

Hook melons are a strange and unsettling breed of fruit that dangle from the branches of their parent tree by a vine growing from their "neck." When fully ripe, they bear an uncanny resemblance to a headless humanoid body.

While most fruit disperses a plant's seeds by enticing other creatures into eating them, hook melons take a different approach. When intertwined with another creature's nervous system, the root-like fibers that trail from their torso allow the hook melon a limited amount of control over a creature's movements. They use this control to travel as far as possible from their parent tree and seek out a suitable place to sprout, often bludgeoning their unwilling host into unconsciousness or death in the process.

Hook melons possess a surprising degree of intelligence for a plant, considering the sophistication required to control another creature's body. Sometimes a group of hook melons (called a gallows) will cooperate to ambush larger groups of creatures, ensuring that at least one of their kind can escape while attached to a suitable host.

Occasionally, a hook melon will shun its biological drive and forgo sprouting in favor of further exploration. Such individuals have been known to disguise themselves with shapeless clothing in order to pass through inhabited areas.

Sightings of unusual centaur-like silhouettes lumbering across forests can sometimes be attributed to these macabre fruits.

Selective Hosting

Though clearly plant-based life forms, hook melons possess eerie intellects, and their personalities are as alien to most humanoids as their invertebrate anatomy. Most hook melons prefer to attach to deer, large birds, and other swift-moving forest creatures, but for whatever reason, some instead have a predilection for humanoid bodies.

Monster Part Subsystem

Hook Melon Creature 4

Monster Parts 12/27/50 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Athletics)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, energy resistant (positive), evil, sensory (scent), strength, wild, wisdomd

Excubitor.name: 警卫猎犬 Excubitor

高等黑暗视觉 Greater Darkvision.name: 高等黑暗视觉 Greater Darkvision

Guarding the Principal.name: 守护要员 Guarding the Principal
Guarding the Principal.description:
侍卫者可以用魔法保护其主君免受最凶猛的攻击。

只要侍卫者位于其主君30英尺内，主君就使用侍卫者的等级来决定主君抵抗失能效果的能力。

An excubitor can magically shield its principal from the worst attacks.

As long as the excubitor is within 30 feet of its principal, the principal uses the excubitor's level to determine how well the principal resists incapacitation effects.

对抗魔法时全豁免+1状态加值.name: 对抗魔法时全豁免+1状态加值

借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity.name: 借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity

Exit Strategy.name: 退出策略 Exit Strategy
Exit Strategy.description:
需求 警卫者与其主人相邻，且没有任何生物被其吞噬；

效果 警卫者施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Dimension Door}，同时影响其自身与其主人。之后，两个生物均为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3}，并在1小时内免疫dimension door。

Requirements The excubitor is adjacent to its principal and has no creatures Swallowed Whole;

Effect The excubitor casts @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Dimension Door}, affecting both itself and its principal. Afterward, both creatures are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3} and are immune to dimension door for 1 hour.

次元门 Dimension Door.name: 次元门 Dimension Door
次元门 Dimension Door.description:
你通过开启一扇绕过通常空间的门，将自身以及任何你穿戴和持握的物品从你当前所在的空间立刻传送到你能看见的范围内的开阔空间。如果此时另一个生物会与你随行—即使你使用异次元存储空间—你会失去该法术。

升阶 （5环级） 该射程增加到1英里。你无须看见你的目标，只要你曾经去过那里，并且了解其与你的相对位置和距离。你会暂时免疫1小时。

火球术 Fireball.name: 火球术 Fireball
火球术 Fireball.description:
在你指定的位置爆发出咆哮的烈焰，造成6d6火焰伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d6。

次元门 Dimension Door (随意施法).name: 次元门 Dimension Door (随意施法)
次元门 Dimension Door (随意施法).description:
你通过开启一扇绕过通常空间的门，将自身以及任何你穿戴和持握的物品从你当前所在的空间立刻传送到你能看见的范围内的开阔空间。如果此时另一个生物会与你随行—即使你使用异次元存储空间—你会失去该法术。

升阶 （5环级） 该射程增加到1英里。你无须看见你的目标，只要你曾经去过那里，并且了解其与你的相对位置和距离。你会暂时免疫1小时。

闪电束 Lightning Bolt.name: 闪电束 Lightning Bolt
闪电束 Lightning Bolt.description:
一束闪电从你手中绽放而出，造成4d12电击伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d12。

隐秘领域 Private Sanctum.name: 隐秘领域 Private Sanctum
隐秘领域 Private Sanctum.description: 从外面看起来，该区域是一团看不透的黑色迷雾。感官信息（例如声音，气味和光线）无法从区域的一边传到另一边。探知法术无法得知区域中任何信息，并且区域中读心效果无法生效。

护卫他人 Shield Other (常驻法术) (On Prinicpal O.name: 护卫他人 Shield Other (常驻法术) (On Prinicpal Only)
护卫他人 Shield Other (常驻法术) (On Prinicpal O.description: 你在目标和自身的生命力之间建立了一种临时连接。目标仅从所有造成生命值伤害的效果中受到一半伤害，你承受剩余部分的伤害。当你通过该链接承受伤害时，你对该伤害不会应用任何抗力，弱点或者其他能力；你仅承受该数值的伤害。如果目标与你的距离超过30尺，该法术结束。如果你或者目标降低到0生命值，在本法术的伤害结算后，该法术结束。

炼狱契约 Infernal Pact.name: 炼狱契约 Infernal Pact
炼狱契约 Infernal Pact.description:
你恳请更强大的魔鬼，请求他派遣一些手下为你服务。若你的仪式成功，魔鬼会根据自身的选择派来一个魔鬼，其等级不超过炼狱契约的法术环级的两倍；两个魔鬼，每个魔鬼等级不超过法术环级的两倍减2；或者3个魔鬼，每个魔鬼等级不超过法术环级的两倍减3。

大成功 被派来的魔鬼会为你服务[[/r 1d4 #weeks]]{1d4周}。

成功 被派来的魔鬼会为你服务[[/r 1d4 #days]]{1d4天}。

失败 你的请求被拒绝了。

大失败 你的请求不仅被拒绝了，且强大的魔鬼会将自身的不满告知你的主人。

反刍 Regurgitate.name: 反刍 Regurgitate
反刍 Regurgitate.description:
圣卫吐出其胃部内容物，包括所有被整吞的生物。

The excubitor expels the contents of its stomach, including creatures Swallowed Whole.

Swallow Evidence.name: 吞噬证据 Swallow Evidence
Swallow Evidence.description:
执杖者怪诞地将其颌骨撑开，竟不可思议地吞下与自己一样大的生物，将被吞下的生物传送进一个异次元的胃囊。

执杖者 @Compendium[pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.uJSseLa57HZYSMUu]{整吞} 一个中型或更小的生物（[[/r {4d6[poison],2d6[spirit]}]]{4d6 毒素加2d6 灵体}，破裂阈值 15）。该魔鬼可以放弃造成此伤害，并且能够吸入空气，使被吞下的生物不会窒息。执杖者的胃最多可容纳三个中型生物。

当该魔鬼的胃中有任何存活的生物时，它无法使用 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{任意门} 效果。

The excubitor grotesquely distends its jaws and, impossibly, swallows a creature as big as itself, transporting the swallowed creature into an extradimensional stomach.

The excubitor @Compendium[pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.uJSseLa57HZYSMUu]{Swallows Whole} a Medium or smaller creature ([[/r {4d6[poison],2d6[spirit]}]]{4d6 poison plus 2d6 spirit}, Rupture 15). The devil can forgo dealing this damage and can breathe in air so swallowed creatures don't suffocate. The excubitor's stomach can hold up to three Medium creatures.

While the devil has any surviving creatures in its stomach it cannot use @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Dimension Door} effects.

Excubitor.publicNotes:
魔鬼以阴险狡诈的策划大师而闻名，但并非所有魔鬼都配得上这名声。护卫魔鬼（亦称侍从魔鬼）由凡人灵魂锻造而成：这些凡人在人世时并非亲手犯下暴行，而是协助并纵容他人的邪恶。在地狱中，尽管护卫魔鬼力量强大，它们在魔鬼的等级体系中却位阶相当低，因为它们很少能取得真正可称为“自己的”胜利。

对那种生前“只是服从命令”的魔鬼而言，奖赏便是永恒地服从凡人的命令。侍从魔鬼擅长保护地狱最重要的凡人资产——恶棍、犯罪策划者，以及其阴谋诡计之能远胜过体能技巧的撒旦军阀。护卫魔鬼被契约雇来保护这些重要人物，使其免遭潜在的执法者、骑士与其他行善者的袭击。不止一位准英雄几乎就要直面穷凶极恶的反派，却先倒在那反派的“秘书”手下——一个邪魔般的护卫魔鬼保镖，铁拳如铸，且胃口几近无底深渊。

邪魔伙伴

菲斯托弗利斯（亦称契约魔鬼；见《Pathfinder Second Edition Bestiary》）可以在凡人所签署的契约中，指派一名护卫魔鬼负责保护该凡人。护卫魔鬼自身无法缔结新的契约。该契约的凡人受益者被称为“委托人”。

怪物部件子系统

护卫魔鬼（侍从魔鬼） 生物 8

怪物部件 64/140/250 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺），护甲（中甲），盾牌，察觉物品，技能物品（运动、欺瞒、威吓、医疗、宗教、社会）

符合条件的灌注属性 灾祸，体质，电击，能量抗性（火焰、正能量），邪恶，火焰，守序，心灵，毒素，感官（高等黑暗视觉），法术（神术：任意门，任意门，火球术，闪电束，私密圣所，为他人护盾），力量，坚固，狂野

Devils have a reputation for being diabolical masterminds, but not all of them live up to that reputation. Excubitors, also known as chaperone devils, are forged from the souls of mortals who aided and abetted the evils of others rather than committing their own atrocities. In Hell, despite their formidable power, excubitors rank quite low in the diabolic hierarchy as they rarely achieve any triumphs which they can truly call their own.

The reward for a devil who in life was "just following orders" is an eternity of following the orders of mortals. Chaperone devils specialize in protecting Hell's most important mortal assets-villains, criminal masterminds, and satanic warlords whose capacity for scheming overshadows their physical acumen. Excubitors are contracted to protect these important individuals from would-be law officers, knights, and other do-gooders. More than one would-be hero has nearly confronted a heinous villain only to first fall to that villain's "secretary"-a fiendish excubitor bodyguard, with fists like iron and an almost bottomless pit of a stomach.

Fiendish Partners

A phistophilus (also called a contract devil; see the Pathfinder Second Edition Bestiary) can assign an excubitor to protect a mortal as part of the contract signed by that mortal. Excubitors cannot create new contracts themselves. The mortal beneficiary of this contract is known as the "principal."

Monster Part Subsystem

Excubitor (Chaperone Devil) Creature 8

Monster Parts 64/140/250 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing), armor (medium), shield, perception item, skill items (Athletics, Deception, Intimidation, Medicine, Religion, Society)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, electricity, energy resistant (fire, positive), evil, fire, lawful, mental, poison, sensory (greater darkvision), spells (Divine: dimension door, dimension door, fireball, lightning bolt, private sanctum, shield other), strength, sturdy, wild
Excubitor.allSaves: 对抗魔法时全豁免+1状态加值

Nobbler.name: 诺布勒 Nobbler

Hungry Tracker.name: 饥饿追踪者 Hungry Tracker
Hungry Tracker.description:
如果喂给诺布勒一个有价值的物品，例如纪念品或标志性装备，它可以确定该物品之目标的位置以及到该目标的大致距离，最大射程为5英里。被吞食的物体会被摧毁。

If fed a valuable item such as a memento or signature piece of equipment, a nobbler can determine the location and approximate distance to the item's target to a maximum range of 5 miles. The consumed object is destroyed.

Gobble.name: 狼吞虎咽 Gobble
Gobble.description:
触发 当诺布勒使用“瘫软”而处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} 时，一名生物触碰诺布勒；

效果 诺布勒对触发生物进行一次嘴部打击。

Trigger A creature touches the nobbler while the nobbler is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} using Go Limp;

Effect The nobbler makes a mouth Strike against the triggering creature.

Nobble.name: 绊倒 Nobble
Nobble.description:
饕啃兽对一名被它在口中@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}的中型或更小的生物使用@Compendium[pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.uJSseLa57HZYSMUu]{吞噬}（[[/r (2d6+6)[bludgeoning]]]{2d6+6 非致命钝击}，破裂 10）。饕啃兽最多可容纳总计25负载。被吞下的生物不会开始窒息（但见排出空气）。

The nobbler uses @Compendium[pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.uJSseLa57HZYSMUu]{Swallow Whole} on a Medium or smaller creature it has @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} in its mouth ([[/r (2d6+6)[bludgeoning]]]{2d6+6 nonlethal bludgeoning}, Rupture 10). The nobbler can contain up to a total of 25 Bulk. Creatures swallowed do not begin to suffocate (but see Expel Air).

Expel Air.name: 排出空气 Expel Air
Expel Air.description:
小啃吞者排出其体内的空气。在小啃吞者体内的生物必须屏住呼吸，否则将开始窒息。一旦小啃吞者吞下另一个生物，小啃吞者就会重新充满空气，体内的生物将不再窒息。

The nobbler expels the air inside it. Creatures inside the nobbler must hold their breath or begin suffocating. As soon as the nobbler swallows another creature, the nobbler refills with air and creatures inside are no longer suffocating.

Go Limp.name: 瘫软 Go Limp
Go Limp.description:
诺布勒倒下并陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}，身体瘫软。只要它保持倒地状态，诺布勒在以麻袋伪装时的欺骗检定和DC上都获得自动结果31。

The nobbler drops @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and goes limp. As long as it remains prone, the nobbler has an automatic result of 31 on Deception checks and DCs to pass as a sack.

Nobbler.publicNotes:
诺布勒，有时也被称为袋人，是一种隐秘的构装体，被设计用于在夜深人静时追踪并绑走毫无防备的猎物。处于惰性状态时，诺布勒看起来不过是一个由皮革、粗麻布或大麻纤维制成的空袋子。然而在活动时，这个生物会呈现出大致类人形态，像是一个披着厚重斗篷、鬼鬼祟祟的绑匪。瞥一眼斗篷内侧，只能看到张开的黑暗。

绑匪会派诺布勒在大城镇、城市以及其他人口稠密的区域追踪它们的目标，在那里诺布勒可以轻易不被察觉地穿行。诺布勒几乎总是被派去抓捕目标并把他们活着带回，使袋人既对狡诈的暴君有用，也对寻常的勒索绑匪同样有用。王冠的敌人往往会发现自己落入诺布勒之手，好让某个无耻贵族之流能用勒索、监禁或洗脑来利用他们。

诺布勒没有智力，并且常常以令人抓狂的字面程度执行命令。当诺布勒无法找到其目标时，它可能就会直接转为惰性状态，直到某个符合目标描述的人走过。随着时代推移，诺布勒会磨损，且其感官变得迟钝，从而扩大它所认为的猎物范围。冒险者以及其他看起来有趣的人物在下水道沟渠或小巷里遭遇迷糊的诺布勒并不罕见。

与储物袋不同，诺布勒在被摧毁时会吐出其内容物。它可能装着之前受害者所携带的任意数量的贵重物品——有时甚至包括受害者本人。

变体诺布勒

制造诺布勒最简单的方法是将一个储物袋赋予动画。一般而言，诺布勒的等级等于 1 + 用来制作它的储物袋的物品等级。此处展示的诺布勒由 I 型储物袋制成。更高等级的诺布勒不仅更强，而且它们的“吞噬全体”能力的容量也会按所使用的储物袋类型成比例提升。

怪物部位子系统

诺布勒 生物 5

怪物部位 18/45/80 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型），察觉 物品，技能物品（杂技、运动、欺瞒、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌，体质，能量抗性（负能量、正能量），感官（黑暗视觉），力量，狂野

Nobblers, sometimes called bag-people, are stealthy constructs designed to track and abduct unsuspecting quarry in the middle of the night. When inert, a nobbler appears to be nothing more than an empty sack made of leather, burlap, or hemp. While mobile, however, the creature takes a roughly humanoid shape, resembling a skulking kidnapper wearing a heavy cloak. A glance at the cloak's interior reveals nothing but yawning darkness.

Kidnappers send nobblers to track their targets in large towns, cities, and other densely populated areas where the nobbler can easily pass through unnoticed. Nobblers are almost always sent to collect targets and return them alive, making bag-people useful to duplicitous despots as well as run-of-the-mill ransomers. Enemies of the crown often find themselves on the wrong side of a nobbler so that one unscrupulous noble or another can exploit them with blackmail, imprisonment, or brainwashing.

Nobblers possess no intellect and frequently perform their orders to a frustratingly literal degree. When a nobbler is unable to locate its target, it might simply go inert until someone matching the target's description wanders by. As time goes on, the nobbler becomes frayed and its senses dull, expanding the scope of what it considers its quarry. It is not uncommon for adventurers and other interesting-looking folk to encounter confused nobblers in sewer gutters or alleyways.

Unlike a bag of holding, a nobbler expels its contents when destroyed. It may contain any number of valuables held by previous victims—and sometimes the victims themselves.

Variant Nobblers

The easiest way to create a nobbler is to animate a bag of holding. In general, a nobbler's level is equal to 1 + the item level of the bag of holding from which it was created. The nobbler presented here was made from a bag of holding type I. Higher- level nobblers are not only stronger, but the capacity of their Swallow Whole ability is also increased in proportion to the type of bag of holding utilized.

Monster Part Subsystem

Nobbler Creature 5

Monster Parts 18/45/80 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, energy resistant (negative, positive), sensory (darkvision), strength, wild

Sanguine Rose.name: 血红玫瑰 Sanguine Rose

Deathly Blossom.name: 死之花绽 Deathly Blossom
Deathly Blossom.description:
当血红玫瑰被摧毁时，植物内部的死灵魔法能量会爆发成一个 @Template[type:burst|distance:20]，对区域内的生物造成 [[/r 5d6[void]]]{5d6 负能量伤害}（@Check[type:reflex|dc:20|name:Deathly Blossom DC|traits:damaging-effect,divine,necromancy,negative|showDC:gm]{基础反射} 豁免）。

任何被这次爆发杀死的生物都会被玫瑰的魔法腐化。除非尸体被火化或埋葬在祝圣过的土地中，否则它会在 1 周内作为一株血红玫瑰复活。

When the sanguine rose is destroyed, the necromantic energy within the plant explodes in a @Template[type:burst|distance:20], dealing [[/r 5d6[void]]]{5d6 negative damage} to creatures in the area (@Check[type:reflex|dc:20|name:Deathly Blossom DC|traits:damaging-effect,divine,necromancy,negative|showDC:gm]{basic Reflex} save).

Any creature slain by this burst is corrupted by the rose's magic. Unless the corpse is cremated or is buried in consecrated ground, it rises as a sanguine rose within 1 week.

seductive scent.name: 诱惑香气 seductive scent
seductive scent.description:
@Compendium[pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.v61oEQaDdcRpaZ9X]{灵光} 60尺。

血红玫瑰不断散发出一种强力而诱人的魔法香氛，使其猎物失去戒备。一名在灵光中开始其回合的生物必须在一次 @Check[type:will|dc:18|name:Seductive Scent DC|traits:aura,divine,enchantment,olfactory|showDC:gm]{意志} 豁免中成功，否则将变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 1轮。若成功，该生物在1小时内免疫此灵光。

@Compendium[pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.v61oEQaDdcRpaZ9X]{Aura} 60 feet.

A sanguine rose constantly emits a potent and alluring magical perfume to puts its prey off guard. A creature that starts its turn in the aura must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:18|name:Seductive Scent DC|traits:aura,divine,enchantment,olfactory|showDC:gm]{Will} save or become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round. On a success, the creature is immune to this aura for 1 hour.

Blood Drain.name: 吸血排干 Blood Drain
Blood Drain.description:
需求 血红玫瑰擒抱了一个生物 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}；

效果 血红玫瑰的根系吮吸被擒抱生物的鲜血。这会造成 [[/r 2d6[piercing]]]{2d6 穿刺伤害}，并且血红玫瑰获得等同于所造成伤害的临时生命值。被血红玫瑰吸血的生物将处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} 状态，直到其接受任意种类或任意数量的治疗为止。

Requirements The sanguine rose has a creature @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed};

Effect The sanguine rose's roots lap up the blood of the grabbed creature. This deals [[/r 2d6[piercing]]]{2d6 piercing damage}, and the sanguine rose gains temporary Hit Points equal to the damage dealt. A creature that has its blood drained by a sanguine rose is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} until it receives healing of any kind or amount.

Sanguine Rose.publicNotes:
由吸血鬼（特征）创造并种植在其阴郁的花园空间中，猩红玫瑰是一种行动缓慢的植物，以那些在吸血鬼来不及饮尽其鲜血前便已死去的受害者遗骸为肥料。此类肥料中残存的几滴鲜血，就足以赋予这种诡异花朵猩红的色泽——至少传闻如此。不论真相如何，猩红玫瑰将玫瑰灌木坚韧的生理结构与古典之美，与不死的非自然邪恶力量结合在一起，使其成为吸血鬼庄园极为强力的守卫者。

猩红玫瑰通常种植在花园中，或在外墙旁与普通植物混种以作伪装；它们会攻击任何靠近的活生物，以便用新鲜的血液浸润周围的土壤。与真正的玫瑰一样，猩红玫瑰散发怡人的香气，但这些怪物植物的气味远比任何寻常花朵更为浓烈。它们用这种诱人的香味将类人生物与动物引向自己，随后以荆棘般的攻击爆发成一阵疯狂的攻势。

猩红玫瑰很容易通过其不自然的暗沉叶片与藤蔓辨认出来，这使其鲜红的花朵与一英寸长的尖刺更加显眼。尽管特征如此明显，仍有无数动物与类人生物葬身于猩红玫瑰之口，因为关于这些可憎植物的知识在吸血鬼（特征）与其他狡猾的不死者之间被严密保守。

猩红玫瑰及其变种可以像其他不死者一样，通过@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.c3b6LdLlQDPngNIb]{创造不死生物}仪式来创造。施行该仪式的施法者可以用自然（专家）替代通常的主要技能检定。这使得猩红玫瑰在邪恶德鲁伊及其同类之中尤为受欢迎。

墓百合

猩红玫瑰存在数个变种，其中包括更为罕见的墓百合；据说它以不死生物而非活者为食。已知两种变种中尤其古老的样本会获得有限的智能，并随之获得污秽的原初魔法力量，例如@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.MlpbeZ61Euhl0d60]{死亡之云}或@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.M0jQlpQYUr0pp2Sv]{骇人枯萎}。

怪物部位子系统

猩红玫瑰 生物 4

怪物部位 12/27/50 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（轻型）、察觉物品、技能物品（运动）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸根、体质、能量抗性（负能量）、邪恶、负能量、力量、野性

Created by vampires and planted in their dour garden spaces, sanguine roses are slow-moving plants fertilized with the remains of victims who perished before the vampire could finish drinking their blood. The few remaining drops of blood in such fertilizer are enough to give this eerie flower its crimson hue—or so the stories go. Whatever the case, sanguine roses combine the sturdy physiology and classical beauty of a rose bush with the unnatural and evil powers of undeath, making them terribly potent guardians of vampiric estates.

Usually planted in gardens or along exterior walls amid mundane plants that serve as camouflage, sanguine roses attack any living creatures that draw near in order to soak the soil around them with fresh blood. Like true roses, sanguine roses emit a pleasant aroma, but the odor of these monstrous plants is far more potent than any mundane flower. They draw humanoids and animals toward them using this seductive scent, then explode into a frenzy of thorny attacks.

A sanguine rose can easily be identified by its unnaturally dusky leaves and vines, which make its bright red flowers and inch-long thorns stand out all the more. Regardless of their telltale features, countless animals and humanoids fall prey to sanguine roses since knowledge of these wretched plants is a well-kept secret among vampires and other cunning undead.

Sanguine roses and their varieties can be created with the @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.c3b6LdLlQDPngNIb]{Create Undead} ritual like other undead. The caster of this ritual can substitute Nature (expert) for the usual primary skill check. This makes sanguine roses particularly popular among evil druids and their ilk.

Grave Lilies

Several varieties of sanguine rose exist, including the much rarer grave lily, which supposedly feasts upon undead creatures rather than the living. Particularly ancient specimens of either variety have been known to gain a modest level of intelligence, and with it, foul primal magical powers such as @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.MlpbeZ61Euhl0d60]{Cloudkill} or @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.M0jQlpQYUr0pp2Sv]{Horrid Wilting}.

Monster Part Subsystem

Sanguine Rose Creature 4

Monster Parts 12/27/50 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing, slashing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Athletics)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, energy resistant (negative), evil, negative, strength, wild

Rope Golem.name: 绳索魔像 Rope Golem

Impersonate Rope.name: 伪装绳索 Impersonate Rope
Impersonate Rope.description:
在一分钟的过程中，绳索魔像可以将自身松开并塌缩成一堆不起眼的绳索。在这种伪装下，它在用于伪装成普通绳堆的欺骗检定与DC上具有22的自动结果。绳索魔像在使用单动作起身以重构自身之前，无法使用其任何能力或攻击。

Over the course of a minute, a rope golem can unspool itself and collapse into an inconspicuous heap. In this guise, it has an automatic result of 22 on Deception checks and DCs to pass as a mundane pile of rope. The rope golem cannot use any of its abilities or attacks until it reconstructs itself by using a single action to Stand.

Tangle Up.name: 缠绕 Tangle Up
Tangle Up.description:
触发 一个相邻生物对绳索魔像进行一次近战攻击掷骰并大成功失败；

效果 触发生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:24|name:Tangle Up DC|showDC:gm]{反射} 豁免。若失败，绳索魔像用其绳索般的身体将该生物的肢体缠住。该生物陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱} 状态，并随魔像一同移动，直到它掷出一次成功的DC 22检定以逃脱。

Trigger An adjacent creature critically fails a melee attack roll against the rope golem;

Effect The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:24|name:Tangle Up DC|showDC:gm]{Reflex} saving throw. On a failure, the rope golem tangles up the creature's appendage with its ropy body. The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} and moves with the golem until it rolls a successful DC 22 check to Escape.

Vulnerable to Grease.name: 易受油脂术影响 Vulnerable to Grease
Vulnerable to Grease.description:
绳魔像会正常受到油腻法术的区域影响。施法者可以以@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Wu0xFpewMKRK3HG8]{Grease}为绳魔像指定目标，即使该魔像不是物体。当绳魔像进入油腻法术的区域，或被油腻指定为目标时，任何被该魔像@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}的生物都可以立即尝试一次检定以逃脱，并且该魔像在法术的持续时间内无法使用其绳鞭的擒拿能力。

Rope golems are affected by areas of the grease spell normally. A caster can target a rope golem with @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Wu0xFpewMKRK3HG8]{Grease} even though the golem is not an object. When a rope golem enters the area of a grease spell or is targeted by grease, any creatures @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} by the golem can attempt an immediate check to Escape, and the golem cannot use its rope whip's Grab ability for the duration of the spell.

Strangle.name: 绞杀 Strangle
Strangle.description:
需求 绳索魔像擒抱了一个生物 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}；

效果 魔像将一根绳索缠绕在该生物的喉咙上，勒住它。被勒住的生物无法说话，也无法施放带有言语成分的法术，并且它必须屏住呼吸以避免窒息。

Requirements The rope golem has a creature @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed};

Effect The golem wraps one of its cords around the creature's throat, strangling it. A strangled creature can't speak or cast spells with a verbal component, and it must hold its breath to avoid suffocating.

Toss Away.name: 扔开 Toss Away
Toss Away.description:
需求 绳魔像有一个生物处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}；

效果 绳魔像用力将该生物投掷到至多20英尺远处，方向由其选择。被投掷的生物落地时处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} 并受到 [[/r 4d8[bludgeoning]]] 伤害。

Requirements The rope golem has a creature @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed};

Effect The rope golem forcefully tosses the creature up to 20 feet away in a direction of its choice. The thrown creature lands @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and takes [[/r 4d8[bludgeoning]]] damage.

Golem Antimagic.name: 魔像反魔法 Golem Antimagic
Golem Antimagic.description:
受到火焰伤害（[[/r 4d6 #damage]]{4d6 伤害}；来自区域或持续性伤害的[[/r 2d6 #damage]]{2d6 伤害}）；被植物或水治愈（区域 [[/r 2d6 #Hit Points]]{2d6 生命值}）；被酸缓慢

魔像免疫除了自身之外的法术与魔法能力，但每一种魔像都会以特殊方式受到少数几种魔法的影响。这些例外会以缩略形式列在魔像的数据表中，而完整规则如下所示。若某条目列出多种类型（例如“寒冷与水”），则任一类型的法术都能影响该魔像。

  • 受到……伤害 任何此类型、以魔像为目标的魔法，会使其承受所列数值的伤害（此伤害没有类型），而非通常效果。若魔像在其回合开始时处于此类型魔法的区域内，或受到相应类型的持续性效果影响，则它承受括号内所列的伤害。
  • 被……治愈 任何此类型、以魔像为目标的魔法，会使魔像失去缓慢（状态）并获得等同于该法术本应造成伤害一半的生命值。若魔像在其回合开始时处于此类型魔法的区域内，则它获得括号内所列的生命值。
  • 被……缓慢 任何此类型、以魔像为目标的魔法，会使其变为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}，持续[[/br 2d6 #rounds]]{2d6 轮}，而非通常效果。若魔像在其回合开始时处于此类型魔法的区域内，则该轮它被缓慢 1。
  • 易受……影响 每个魔像会易受一个或多个特定法术影响，其效果如其数据表所述。

harmed by fire ([[/r 4d6 #damage]]{4d6 damage}, [[/r 2d6 #damage]]{2d6 damage} from areas or persistent damage); healed by plant or water (area [[/r 2d6 #Hit Points]]{2d6 Hit Points}); slowed by acid

A golem is immune to spells and magical abilities other than its own, but each type of golem is affected by a few types of magic in special ways. These exceptions are listed in shortened form in the golem's stat block, with the full rules appearing here. If an entry lists multiple types (such as "cold and water"), either type of spell can affect the golem.

  • Harmed By Any magic of this type that targets the golem causes it to take the listed amount of damage (this damage has no type) instead of the usual effect. If the golem starts its turn in an area of magic of this type or is affected by a persistent effect of the appropriate type, it takes the damage listed in the parenthetical.
  • Healed By Any magic of this type that targets the golem makes the golem lose the slowed condition and gain HP equal to half the damage the spell would have dealt. If the golem starts its turn in an area of this type of magic, it gains the HP listed in the parenthetical.
  • Slowed By Any magic of this type that targets the golem causes it to be @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for [[/br 2d6 #rounds]]{2d6 rounds} instead of the usual effect. If the golem starts its turn in an area of this type of magic, it's slowed 1 for that round.
  • Vulnerable To Each golem is vulnerable to one or more specific spells, with the effects described in its stat block.
